This file is a merged representation of the entire codebase, combined into a single document by Repomix.

<file_summary>
This section contains a summary of this file.

<purpose>
This file contains a packed representation of the entire repository's contents.
It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
or other automated processes.
</purpose>

<file_format>
The content is organized as follows:
1. This summary section
2. Repository information
3. Directory structure
4. Repository files (if enabled)
5. Multiple file entries, each consisting of:
  - File path as an attribute
  - Full contents of the file
</file_format>

<usage_guidelines>
- This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
  original repository files, not this packed version.
- When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
  between different files in the repository.
- Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
  the same level of security as you would the original repository.
</usage_guidelines>

<notes>
- Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
- Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
- Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
- Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
- Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)
</notes>

</file_summary>

<file path="data/ages/ages.js">
{
	"woodenAge":{
		"type":"age",
		"no":0,
		"name":{"EN":"Wood Age",
				"FR":"Âge de Bois",
				"DE":"Holz Zeitalter",
				"JP":"木の時代"},
		"label":"I",
		"time":100
	},
	"stoneAge":{
		"type":"age",
		"no":1,
		"name":{"EN":"Stone Age",
				"FR":"Âge de Pierre",
				"DE":"Stein Zeitalter",
				"JP":"石の時代"},
		"message":{"EN":"You have reached the Stone Age.",
				   "FR":"Vous avez atteint l'Âge de Pierre.",
				   "DE":"Du Hast das Stein Zeitalter erreicht!",
				   "JP":"石の時代に到達しました"},
		"label":"II",
		"time":200
	},
	"ironAge":{
		"type":"age",
		"no":2,
		"name":{"EN":"Iron Age",
				"FR":"Âge de Fer",
				"DE":"Eisen Zeitalter",
				"JP":"鉄の時代"},
		"message":{"EN":"You have reached the Iron Age.",
				   "FR":"Vous avez atteint l'Âge de Fer.",
				   "DE":"Du hast das Eisen Zeitalter erreicht!",
				   "JP":"鉄の時代に到達しました"},
		"label":"III",
		"time":300
	},
	"etherAge":{
		"type":"age",
		"no":3,
		"name":{"EN":"Ether Age",
				"FR":"Âge de l'Éther",
				"DE":"Ether Zeitalter",
				"JP":"エーテルの時代"},
		"message":{"EN":"You have reached the Ether Age.",
				   "FR":"Vous avez atteint l'Âge de l'Éther.",
				   "DE":"Du hast das Ether Zeitalter erreicht",
				   "JP":"エーテルの時代に到達しました"},
		"label":"IV",
		"time":400
	},
	"goldenAge":{
		"type":"age",
		"no":4,
		"name":{"EN":"Gold Age",
				"FR":"Âge d'Or",
				"DE":"Goldene Zeitalter",
				"JP":"黄金の時代"},
		"message":{"EN":"You have reached the Gold Age.",
				   "FR":"Vous avez atteint l'Âge d'Or.",
				   "DE":"Du hast das Goldene Zeitalter erreich",
				   "JP":"黄金の時代に到達しました"},
		"label":"V",
		"time":500
	}
}
</file>

<file path="data/caracteristics/characteristics.js">
{
	"health":{
		"type":"primaryCharacteristic",
		"no":0,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"timeRecovery":0.125,
		"timeRegeneration":5,
		"autoRecovery":1,
		"picture":{"file":"health.png"},
		"color":39168,
		"name":{"EN":"health",
				"FR":"santé",
				"DE":"Gesundheit",
				"JP":"体力"},
		"description":{"EN":"Health determines how much damage you can take before dying.",
					   "FR":"La santé détermine la quantité de dégâts que vous pouvez subir avant de mourir.",
					   "DE":"Gesundheit bestimmt wie viel Schaden du erleiden kannst bevor du stirbst.",
					   "JP":"どの程度の傷に耐えられるかを示します。"},
		"autoRestoreOn":{"EN":"Health auto restoration ON.",
						 "FR":"Récupération auto de la vie ACTIVÉE.",
						 "DE":"Gesundheit automatisch auffüllen AKTIVIERT.",
						 "JP":"体力の自動回復をONにしました"},
		"autoRestoreOff":{"EN":"Health auto restoration OFF.",
						  "FR":"Récupération auto de la vie DÉSACTIVÉE.",
						  "DE":"Gesundheit automatisch auffüllen DEAKTIVIERT.",
						  "JP":"体力の自動回復をOFFにしました"},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I have passed away."]},
				"FR":{"M":["Je suis mort."], "F":["Je suis morte."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich bin gestorben."]},
				"JP":{"D":["死んじゃった……"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough health."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas suffisamment de santé."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe nicht genug Gesundheit."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な体力がない……"]}},
		"regeneration":{"EN":"Health regeneration",
						"FR":"Régénération de santé",
						"DE":"Gesundheit regeneration",
						"JP":"体力再生"}
	},
	"stamina":{
		"type":"primaryCharacteristic",
		"no":1,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"timeRecovery":0.125,
		"timeRegeneration":5,
		"autoRecovery":0.5,
		"picture":{"file":"stamina.png"},
		"color":10027008,
		"name":{"EN":"stamina",
				"FR":"énergie",
				"DE":"Ausdauer",
				"JP":"持久力"},
		"description":{"EN":"Stamina determines how many physical actions you can make.",
					   "FR":"L'énergie détermine la quantité d'actions physiques que vous pouvez effectuer.",
					   "DE":"Ausdauer bestimmt wie viele praktische Tätigkeiten man hintereinander ausführen kann.",
					   "JP":"物理的な行動を取る余力がどの程度あるかを示します。"},
		"autoRestoreOn":{"EN":"Stamina auto restoration ON.",
						 "FR":"Récupération auto de l'énergie ACTIVÉE.",
						 "DE":"Ausdauer automatisch auffüllen AKTIVIERT.",
						 "JP":"持久力の自動回復をONにしました"},
		"autoRestoreOff":{"EN":"Stamina auto restoration OFF.",
						  "FR":"Récupération auto de l'énergie DÉSACTIVÉE.",
						  "DE":"Ausdauer automatisch aufüllen DEAKTIVIERT.",
						  "JP":"持久力の自動回復をOFFにしました"},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I'm exhausted."]},
				"FR":{"M":["Je suis épuisé."], "F":["Je suis épuisée."]},
				"DE":{"D":["ich kann nicht mehr!..."]},
				"JP":{"D":["疲れて行動できない……"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough stamina."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas suffisamment d'énergie."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich bin zu erschöpft dafür..."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な持久力がない……"]}},
		"regeneration":{"EN":"Stamina regeneration",
						"FR":"Régénération d'énergie",
						"DE":"Ausdauer regeneration",
						"JP":"持久力再生"}
	},
	"mana":{
		"type":"primaryCharacteristic",
		"no":2,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"timeRecovery":0.125,
		"timeRegeneration":5,
		"autoRecovery":0.5,
		"picture":{"file":"mana.png"},
		"color":153,
		"name":{"EN":"mana",
				"FR":"mana",
				"DE":"Mana",
				"JP":"魔力"},
		"description":{"EN":"Mana determines how many spells you can cast.",
					   "FR":"La mana détermine le nombre de sortilèges que vous pouvez lancer.",
					   "DE":"Mana bestimmt wie viele magische Fähigkeiten und Zaubersprüche man hintereinander verwenden kann.",
					   "JP":"呪文をどの程度唱えられるかを示します。"},
		"autoRestoreOn":{"EN":"Mana auto restoration ON.",
						 "FR":"Récupération auto de la mana ACTIVÉE.",
						 "DE":"Mana automatisch auffüllen AKTIVIERT.",
						 "JP":"魔力の自動回復をONにしました"},
		"autoRestoreOff":{"EN":"Mana auto restoration OFF.",
						  "FR":"Récupération auto de la mana DÉSACTIVÉE.",
						  "DE":"Mana automatisch auffüllen DEAKTIVIERT.",
						  "JP":"魔力の自動回復をOFFにしました"},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I'm out of mana."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de mana."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe kein Mana mehr!"]},
				"JP":{"D":["魔力切れだ……"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough mana."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas suffisamment de mana."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Dafür habe ich nicht genug Mana"]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な魔力がない……"]}},
		"regeneration":{"EN":"Mana regeneration",
						"FR":"Régénération de mana",
						"DE":"Mana regeneration",
						"JP":"魔力再生"}
	},
	"attack":{
		"type":"secondaryCharacteristic",
		"no":0,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"name":{"EN":"attack",
				"FR":"attaque",
				"DE":"Angriff",
				"JP":"攻撃力"},
		"description":{"EN":"Attack determines the damages you cause when hitting an enemy.",
					   "FR":"L'attaque détermine les dégâts que vous causez quand vous frappez un ennemi.",
					   "DE":"Der Angriffs wert bestimmt den schaden den man einem Gegner mit einem schlag zufügen kann.",
					   "JP":"敵に攻撃が当たった時に与える損害に影響します。"}
	},
	"defense":{
		"type":"secondaryCharacteristic",
		"no":1,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"name":{"EN":"defence",
				"FR":"défense",
				"DE":"Verteidigung",
				"JP":"防御力"},
		"description":{"EN":"Defence decreases the damages you take when hit by an enemy.",
					   "FR":"La défense diminue votre perte de santé quand vous êtes frappé par un ennemi.",
					   "DE":"Der Verteidigungs wert verringert den dir zugefügten schaden von einem gegnerischen angriff.",
					   "JP":"敵から攻撃を受けた際の損害を減少させます。"}
	},
	"strength":{
		"type":"secondaryCharacteristic",
		"no":2,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"name":{"EN":"strength",
				"FR":"force",
				"DE":"Stärke",
				"JP":"筋力"},
		"description":{"EN":"Strength determines your attack score when using a melee weapon.",
					   "FR":"La force détermine votre score d'attaque quand vous utilisez une arme de contact.",
					   "DE":"Stärke beeinflusst dein angriffsschaden mit Nahkampfwaffen.",
					   "JP":"近接武器を利用した際の攻撃力などに影響します。"}
	},
	"endurance":{
		"type":"secondaryCharacteristic",
		"no":3,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"name":{"EN":"endurance",
				"FR":"endurance",
				"DE":"Durchhaltevermögen",
				"JP":"耐久力"},
		"description":{"EN":"Endurance determines your defence score when using a shield or wearing a heavy armour.",
					   "FR":"L'endurance détermine votre score de défense quand vous portez un bouclier ou une armure lourde.",
					   "DE":"Durchhaltevermögen bestimmt dein Verteidigungswert beim tragen von einem Schild oder Schwerer Rüstung.",
					   "JP":"盾や重鎧利用時の防御能力などに影響します。"}
	},
	"address":{
		"type":"secondaryCharacteristic",
		"no":4,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"name":{"EN":"address",
				"FR":"adresse",
				"DE":"Adressiert",
				"JP":"技量"},
		"description":{"EN":"Address determines your attack score with a range weapon.",
					   "FR":"L'adresse détermine votre score d'attaque quand vous utilisez une arme à distance.",
					   "DE":"Adressiert an den gegner! Damit beeinflusst man den Angriffsschaden bei verwendung von Fernkampfwaffen.",
					   "JP":"遠隔武器の攻撃力などに影響します。"}
	},
	"rapidity":{
		"type":"secondaryCharacteristic",
		"no":5,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"name":{"EN":"rapidity",
				"FR":"rapidité",
				"DE":"Athletisch",
				"JP":"敏捷性"},
		"description":{"EN":"Rapidity determines your defence score when wearing a light armour.",
					   "FR":"La rapidité détermine votre score de défense quand vous portez une armure légère.",
					   "DE":"Athletisch bestimmt dein Verteidigungswert beim tragen von Leichter Rüstung.",
					   "JP":"軽鎧利用時の防御能力などに影響します。"}
	},
	"intelligence":{
		"type":"secondaryCharacteristic",
		"no":6,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"name":{"EN":"intelligence",
				"FR":"intelligence",
				"DE":"Intelligenz",
				"JP":"知力"},
		"description":{"EN":"Intelligence determines your attack score when using a magic power.",
					   "FR":"L'intelligence détermine votre score d'attaque quand vous utilisez un pouvoir magique.",
					   "DE":"Intelligenz beeinflusst den Schaden von Magischen Fähigkeiten und Angriffen.",
					   "JP":"魔法の力を扱う際の攻撃力などに影響します。"}
	},
	"willpower":{
		"type":"secondaryCharacteristic",
		"no":7,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"name":{"EN":"willpower",
				"FR":"volonté",
				"DE":"Willenskraft",
				"JP":"意志力"},
		"description":{"EN":"Willpower determines your mana score when wearing magic robes.",
					   "FR":"La volonté détermine votre score de mana quand vous portez des vêtements magiques.",
					   "DE":"Willenskraft beeinflusst dein Mana wert beim tragen von Magischen Roben.",
					   "JP":"魔法のローブを装備した際の魔力などに影響します。"}
	},
	"charisma":{
		"type":"secondaryCharacteristic",
		"no":8,
		"defaultScore":100,
		"name":{"EN":"charisma",
				"FR":"charisme",
				"DE":"Ausstrahlung",
				"JP":"魅力"},
		"description":{"EN":"Charisma increases your skills in military recruitment and in trading and gives you bonuses in jewellery.",
					   "FR":"Le charisme améliore vos compétences de recrutement militaire et de commerce. Il vous donne également un bonus en bijouterie.",
					   "DE":"Ausstrahlung steigert Ihre Fähigkeiten bei der Rekrutierung von Militär und beim Handel und gibt Ihnen Boni in Schmuck.",
					   "JP":"兵士雇用や交易の技能、宝石装備時などのボーナスに影響します。"}
	},
	"speed":{
		"name":{"EN":"speed",
				"FR":"vitesse",
				"DE":"Geschwindigkeit",
				"JP":"速度"},
		"description":{"EN":"Speed allows you to move faster.",
					   "FR":"La vitesse permet de vous déplacer plus vite.",
					   "DE":"Geschwindigkeit bestimmt wie schnell du dich auf dem Schlachtfeld bewegen kannst.",
					   "JP":"どの程度の速度で動けるかを示します。"}
	}
}
</file>

<file path="data/characters/defenseTowers/defenseTowers.js">
{
	"woodenTower":{
		"type":"defenseTower",
		"age":"woodenAge",
		"no":0,
		"picture":{"file":"woodenTower.png",
				   "file100":"woodenTower100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"wooden tower",
				"FR":"tour en bois",
				"JP":"木製監視塔"},
		"description":{"EN":"The wooden tower is a light defence tower which can shoot assegais at enemies.",
					   "FR":"La tour en bois est une tourelle de défense légère qui tire des sagaies sur vos ennemis.",
					   "JP":"アセガイを敵に向かって投げつける軽度な防衛用の塔です。木材を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"wood":250},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":1},
			"prebuild":{"id":"woodenTowerYard", "time":0.5}
		},
		"repair":{
			"health":4,
			"time":0.5,
			"costRessource":{"wood":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":1}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.25}
		},
		"width":64,
		"height":128,
		"visualHeight":160,
		"health":1000,
		"attack":200, "attackTime":3, "range":500, "missile":"assegaiMissile", "attackDY":-104, "sound":"soundThrow",
		"damage":["missile", "piercing"],
		"defense":100,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0}
	},
	"woodenTowerYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"woodenTowerYard.png",
				   "file100":"woodenTowerYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"wooden tower",
				"FR":"tour en bois",
				"JP":"木製監視塔"},
		"description":{"EN":"The wooden tower is a light defence tower which can shoot assegais at enemies.",
					   "FR":"La tour en bois est une tourelle légère qui tire des sagaies sur vos ennemis.",
					   "JP":"アセガイを敵に向かって投げつける軽度な防衛用の塔です。木材を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.25}
		},
		"width":64,
		"height":128,
		"visualHeight":160,
		"defense":100,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"steps":0
	},
	"totem":{
		"type":"resurrectTower",
		"age":"woodenAge",
		"no":1,
		"picture":{"file":"totem.png",
				   "file100":"totem100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"totem",
				"FR":"totem",
				"JP":"トーテム像"},
		"description":{"EN":"The totem can resurrect one dead person.",
					   "FR":"Le totem permet de ressusciter une personne morte.",
					   "JP":"死者を1名甦らせることができます。木材を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{

		"pluralName":{"EN":"siege golems",
					  "FR":"golems de siège",
					  "JP":"シージゴーレム"},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"castIron":400},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"golemology",
			"xpSkill":{"golemology":3},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":3},
			"prebuild":{"id":"siegeGolemYard", "time":1.5}
		},
		"repair":{
			"health":20,
			"time":1.5,
			"costRessource":{"castIron":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"golemology",
			"xpSkill":{"golemology":3},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":3}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.25}
		},
		"width":90,
		"height":96,
		"visualHeight":120,
		"health":4000,
		"attack":800, "attackTime":6, "attackEffect":"default",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":500,
		"resistance":{"electricity":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "golemKiller":4, "poison":0},
		"speed":4
	},
	"siegeGolemYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"siegeGolemYard.png",
				   "file100":"siegeGolemYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"siege golem",
				"FR":"golem de siège",
				"JP":"シージゴーレム"},
		"description":{"EN":"The siege golem is an ultimate mobile golem which punches enemies.",
					   "FR":"Le golem de siège est un golem suprême. Il est mobile et cogne vos ennemis.",
					   "JP":"腕を敵に振るう究極の歩行ゴーレムです。鋳鉄を用いて建造することができます。"},

<file path="data/characters/dungeons/dungeons.js">
{
	"crepusculumDungeon":{
		"type":"dungeon",
		"picture":{"file":"crepusculumDungeon.png",
				   "file100":"crepusculumDungeon100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"crepusculum dungeon",
				"FR":"donjon du Crépuscule",
				"DE":"Crepusculum dungeon",
				"JP":"黄昏のダンジョン"},
		"description":{"EN":"The Crepusculum dungeon is the headquarters of the Dusk Hordes.",
					   "FR":"Le donjon du Crépuscule est le quartier général des Hordes du Crépuscule.",
					   "DE":"Crepusculums Dungeon ist das Hauptquartier der Dunklen Horde",
					   "JP":"黄昏の軍勢の司令部です。周囲の敵への攻撃能力も持っています。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction","scale":2.25}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":192,
		"visualHeight":224,
		"health":8000,
		"attack":300,"attackTime":6,"range":600,"missile":"blackOrb","attackDY":-194,
		"damage":["magic", "death"],
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"light":1.5, "fire":1.25, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"timeRegeneration":5,
		"regeneration":1,
		"spawn":{"interval":150,
				 "baseNumber":0,
				 "coefPopulation":1}
	}
}
</file>

			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":1},
			"prebuild":{"id":"villaYard", "time":0.5}
		},
		"repair":{
			"health":90,
			"time":3,
			"costRessource":{"plank":3, "goldBar":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":6},

			"xpSkill":{"repairing":6},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":6}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":2.25}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":162,
		"visualHeight":192,
		"health":4550,
		"defense":100,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0}
	},

				   "file100":"villaYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"villa",
				"FR":"villa",
				"JP":"邸宅"},
		"description":{"EN":"The villa is an ultimate home.",
					   "FR":"La villa est une maison ultime.",
					   "JP":"厚板と棒金で作られた、素晴らしい家屋です。家主の体力、持久力、魔力を向上させる他、屋内で休むことも可能です。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":2.25}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":162,
		"visualHeight":192,
		"defense":100,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"steps":3
	}
}

		"description":{"EN":"Gold ores provide gold to manufacture jewellery.",
					   "FR":"Le minerai d'or fournit de l'or pour fabriquer des bijoux.",
					   "DE":"Golderze liefern Gold, um Schmuck herzustellen.",
					   "JP":"宝石細工などで用いる棒金の元になる金原料を入手することができます。"},
		"rate":1,
		"build":{
			"buildable":"all",
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":65},
			"sound":"soundPlant",
			"bonusSkill":"prospecting",
			"xpSkill":{"prospecting":65},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":65},
			"prebuild":{"id":"pebble", "time":98, "anim":"pop"}
		},
		"quantity":20,
		"produce":[{
				"time":2.5,
				"gainRessource":{"gold":1},
				"sound":"soundMineral",
				"anim":"shake",
				"bonusSkill":"mining",
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":5},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":5},
				"xpSkill":{"mining":5},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
			}],
		"width":32,
		"height":32
	},
	"sprout":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"sprout.png",
				   "file100":"sprout100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"sprout",
				"FR":"pousse",
				"DE":"Sprössling",
				"JP":"新芽"},
		"description":{"EN":"The sprout will soon become a plant.",
					   "FR":"La pousse va bientôt devenir une plante.",
					   "DE":"Der Sprössling wird in kurzer zeit zu einer Pflanze.",
					   "JP":"しばらくすると植物に成長します。"},
		"width":32,
		"height":32
	},
	"sproutS":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"sproutS.png",
				   "file100":"sproutS100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"sprout",
				"FR":"pousse",
				"DE":"Sprössling",
				"JP":"新芽"},
		"description":{"EN":"The sprout will soon become a plant.",
					   "FR":"La pousse va bientôt devenir une plante.",
					   "DE":"Der Sprössling wird in kurzer zeit zu einer Pflanze.",
					   "JP":"しばらくすると植物に成長します。"},
		"width":16,
		"height":16
	},
	"sproutL":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"sproutL.png",
				   "file100":"sproutL100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"sprout",
				"FR":"pousse",
				"DE":"Sprössling",
				"JP":"新芽"},
		"description":{"EN":"The sprout will soon become a plant.",
					   "FR":"La pousse va bientôt devenir une plante.",
					   "DE":"Der Sprössling wird in kurzer zeit zu einer Pflanze.",
					   "JP":"しばらくすると植物に成長します。"},
		"width":64,
		"height":64
	},
	"pebble":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"pebble.png",
				   "file100":"pebble100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"deposit",
				"FR":"gisement",
				"DE":"Kieselstein",
				"JP":"鉱床"},
		"description":{"EN":"The deposit will soon become a mineral ore.",
					   "FR":"Ce gisement va bientôt devenir un minerai.",
					   "DE":"Der Kleine Kieselstein wird schon bald zu einem vollwärtigen Erz Heranwachsen",
					   "JP":"しばらくすると鉱石になります。"},
		"width":32,
		"height":32
	},
	"crystalPebble":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"crystalPebble.png",
				   "file100":"crystalPebble100.atf"},

				"FR":"gisement de cristal",

					   "DE":"Der Kleine Kristallsplitter wird schon bald zu einem Großen Kristall Heranwachsen.",
					   "JP":"しばらくすると水晶鉱石になります。"},
		"width":32,
		"height":32
	}
}
</file>

<file path="data/characters/playables/playables.js">
{
	"humanM":{
		"type":"playable",
		"no":0,
		"pictures":[{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps"}, "folder":"bodiesM/", "colors":[16636065, 13147004, 12356961, 16573107, 14988178, 7226145]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages"}, "folder":"facesM/"}},
					{"shoes":{"name":{"EN":"shoes", "FR":"chaussures"}, "folder":"shoesM/", "colors":[16777215, 6262964, 3624028, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 13155208, 7232851, 3552822, 13395456, 10240062, 13411742, 3626049, 7957675]}},
					{"clothes":{"name":{"EN":"clothes", "FR":"vêtements"}, "folder":"clothesM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641, 255, 16711680, 65280, 16776960, 0, 16777215, 16711935, 65535]}},
					{"belts":{"name":{"EN":"belts", "FR":"ceintures"}, "folder":"beltsM/"}},
					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"hairs":{"name":{"EN":"hair", "FR":"cheveux"}, "folder":"hairsM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"human",
				"FR":"humain",
				"DE":"Mensch",
				"JP":"人間"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"humans",
					  "FR":"humains",
					  "DE":"Menschen",
					  "JP":"人間"},
		"description":{"EN":"Humans represent the dominant people.\nTheir advanced technique in civil engineering allows them to build impressive fortified cities. For centuries, due to their ability to kill each other, humans have revolutionised military tactics and exceeded those of all the other races combined.\n\nThey have average characteristics. This is the most versatile breed, but they lack specialisation. As a result, they will never be the best in any field.\n\nPlaying with a human is the best choice for new players who discover the game.",
					   "FR":"Les humains sont les représentants du peuple dominant.\nLeur avancée en génie civil leur permet de bâtir d'imposantes villes fortifiées. Depuis des siècles, grâce à leur capacité à s'entre-tuer, les humains ont révolutionné les techniques militaires et dépassent celles de toutes les autres races réunies.\n\nLes caractéristiques des humains sont toutes dans la moyenne. C'est la race la plus polyvalente, mais l'absence de spécialisation fait qu'ils ne seront jamais les meilleurs dans aucun domaine.\n\nJouer avec un humain est un choix idéal pour les nouveaux joueurs qui découvrent le jeu.",
					   "JP":"人間は主な種族の代表格です。\n土木工学においての優れた技術は、印象的な要塞化都市の建築を可能とします。何世紀にも渡り人間同士での戦争に明け暮れていたため、革命的な軍事戦術を所有しており、他の種族すべてを合わせたよりも強力です。\n\n平均的な能力値を持ち、最も汎用性の高い種族ですが、専門技能に欠けています。従って最高の結果を出すことはどの分野でも難しいでしょう。\n\nゲームを始めたばかりの新規プレイヤーに向いた種族です。"},
		"sex":"M",
		"otherSex":"humanF",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"health":100,
		"stamina":100,
		"mana":100,
		"attack":100, "attackEffect":"default",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,

	"humanF":{
		"type":"playable",
		"no":1,
		"pictures":[{"back":{"folder":"backF/", "visible":false, "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps"}, "folder":"bodiesF/", "colors":[16636065, 13147004, 12356961, 16573107, 14988178, 7226145]}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages"}, "folder":"facesF/"}},
					{"shoes":{"name":{"EN":"shoes", "FR":"chaussures"}, "folder":"shoesF/", "colors":[16777215, 6262964, 3624028, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 13155208, 7232851, 3552822, 13395456, 10240062, 13411742, 3626049, 7957675]}},
					{"clothes":{"name":{"EN":"clothes", "FR":"vêtements"}, "folder":"clothesF/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641, 255, 16711680, 65280, 16776960, 0, 16777215, 16711935, 65535]}},
					{"belts":{"name":{"EN":"belts", "FR":"ceintures"}, "folder":"beltsF/"}},
					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"hairs":{"name":{"EN":"hair", "FR":"cheveux"}, "folder":"hairsF/", "linkShape":"back", "linkColor":"back", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"human",
				"FR":"humaine",
				"DE":"Mensch",
				"JP":"人間"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"humans",
					  "FR":"humaines",
					  "DE":"Menschen",
					  "JP":"人間"},
		"changeBestiary":"humanM",
		"description":{"EN":"Humans represent the dominant people.\nTheir advanced technique in civil engineering allows them to build impressive fortified cities. For centuries, due to their ability to kill each other, humans have revolutionised military tactics and exceeded those of all the other races combined.\n\nThey have average characteristics. This is the most versatile breed, but they lack specialisation. As a result, they will never be the best in any field.\n\nPlaying with a human is the best choice for new players who discover the game.",
					   "FR":"Les humaines sont les représentantes du peuple dominant.\nLeur avancée en génie civil leur permet de bâtir d'imposantes villes fortifiées. Depuis des siècles, grâce à leur capacité à s'entre-tuer, les humains ont révolutionné les techniques militaires et dépassent celles de toutes les autres races réunies.\n\nLes caractéristiques des humains sont toutes dans la moyenne. C'est la race la plus polyvalente, mais l'absence de spécialisation fait qu'ils ne seront jamais les meilleurs dans aucun domaine.\n\nJouer avec une humaine est un choix idéal pour les nouveaux joueurs qui découvrent le jeu.",
					   "JP":"人間は主な種族の代表格です。\n土木工学においての優れた技術は、印象的な要塞化都市の建築を可能とします。何世紀にも渡り人間同士での戦争に明け暮れていたため、革命的な軍事戦術を所有しており、他の種族すべてを合わせたよりも強力です。\n\n平均的な能力値を持ち、最も汎用性の高い種族ですが、専門技能に欠けています。従って最高の結果を出すことはどの分野でも難しいでしょう。\n\nゲームを始めたばかりの新規プレイヤーに向いた種族です。"},
		"sex":"F",
		"otherSex":"humanH",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"health":100,
		"stamina":100,
		"mana":100,
		"attack":100, "attackEffect":"default",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,
		"strength":100,
		"endurance":100,
		"address":100,
		"rapidity":100,
		"intelligence":100,
		"willpower":100,
		"charisma":100,
		"speed":5,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けて！", "私を助けて！", "お願い……助けて！", "助けて欲しいの！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かります。", "ありがとうございます！", "感謝します！", "素敵です！", "これはいいものですね。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くわよ！", "さあ、やるわよ！", "来て下さい！", "付いてきて！", "進軍して！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃！", "蹴散らせ！", "突撃！"]
			},
			"destroy":{

				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],

	"elfeM":{
		"type":"playable",
		"no":2,
		"pictures":[{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps"}, "folder":"bodiesM/", "linkColor":"ears", "colors":[16636065, 13147004, 12356961, 16573107, 14988178, 7226145]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages"}, "folder":"facesM/"}},
					{"shoes":{"name":{"EN":"shoes", "FR":"chaussures"}, "folder":"shoesM/", "colors":[16777215, 6262964, 3624028, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 13155208, 7232851, 3552822, 13395456, 10240062, 13411742, 3626049, 7957675]}},
					{"clothes":{"name":{"EN":"clothes", "FR":"vêtements"}, "folder":"clothesM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641, 255, 16711680, 65280, 16776960, 0, 16777215, 16711935, 65535]}},

					{"ears":{"name":{"EN":"ears", "FR":"oreilles"}, "folder":"ears/elvesM/", "linkColor":"bodies", "colors":[16636065, 13147004, 12356961, 16573107, 14988178, 7226145]}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"elf",
				"FR":"elfe",
				"DE":"Elf",
				"JP":"エルフ"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"elfs",
					  "FR":"elfes",
					  "DE":"Elfen",
					  "JP":"エルフ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Elves are forest dwellers.\nThey look like humans, but are more slender, with faces with fine features and long spiked ears. Due to the expansion of human cities, many elves were forced to leave their native forests and live among men. Over generations, they eventually lost their magical gifts.\n\nElves are gifted in magic and archery. They are weak in melee combat and better with a bow or magic spells.\n\nPlayers who choose an elf make good second-line defenders. The elves are a fragile breed, so you should play cautiously during battles.",
					   "FR":"Les elfes sont des habitants des forêts.\nIls ressemblent aux humains, mais sont plus sveltes, avec des visages aux traits fins et de longues oreilles pointes. À cause de l'expansion des villes humaines, beaucoup d'elfes ont été contraints de quitter leurs forêts natales et de vivre parmi les hommes. Au fil des générations, ils finirent par perdre leurs dons magiques.\n\nLes elfes sont doués en magie et en archerie. Ils sont faibles au combat au corps-à-corps, mais bien meilleurs avec un arc ou des sorts magiques.\n\nLes joueurs qui choisissent un elfe feront de bons défenseurs de deuxième ligne. Les elfes étant une race fragile, il faudra jouer prudemment pendant les batailles.",
					   "JP":"エルフは森の住人です。\n人間のような姿をしていますがより華奢な体躯で、美貌と、長い尖った耳を持っています。人間の都市の拡大に伴って多くのエルフは元々の住処である森を追われ、人間とともに暮らすようになりました。世代を重ねるうちにかつての魔法的な恩恵を失っています。\n\n近接戦闘に劣る代わりに魔法と弓の利用でより良い結果を得ることができます。\n\n後衛に適したキャラクターを作ることができますが、傷に脆いため戦闘中は慎重な操作が必要です。"},
		"sex":"M",
		"otherSex":"elfeF",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"health":80,
		"stamina":100,
		"mana":120,
		"attack":100, "attackEffect":"default",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,
		"strength":80,
		"endurance":80,
		"address":120,
		"rapidity":100,
		"intelligence":100,
		"willpower":120,
		"charisma":100,
		"zoology":20,
		"forestry":20,
		"lithology":-20,
		"prospecting":-20,
		"bows":20,
		"firearms":-20,
		"speed":5,

				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けてくれ！", "俺を助けてくれ！", "お願いだから助けてくれ！", "援護が必要だ！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かる。", "本当にありがとう！", "恩に着る！", "素晴らしいな！", "これはいいな。"]

				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],

		"name":{"EN":"elf",

		"changeBestiary":"elfeM",
		"description":{"EN":"Elves are forest dwellers.\nThey look like humans, but are more slender, with faces with fine features and long spiked ears. Due to the expansion of human cities, many elves were forced to leave their native forests and live among men. Over generations, they eventually lost their magical gifts.\n\nElves are gifted in magic and archery. They are weak in melee combat and better with a bow or magic spells.\n\nPlayers who choose an elf make good second-line defenders. The elves are a fragile breed, so you should play cautiously during battles.",
					   "FR":"Les elfes sont des habitants des forêts.\nIls ressemblent aux humains, mais sont plus sveltes, avec des visages aux traits fins et de longues oreilles pointes. À cause de l'expansion des villes humaines, beaucoup d'elfes ont été contraints de quitter leurs forêts natales et de vivre parmi les hommes. Au fil des générations, ils finirent par perdre leurs dons magiques.\n\nLes elfes sont doués en magie et en archerie. Ils sont faibles au combat au corps-à-corps, mais bien meilleurs avec un arc ou des sorts magiques.\n\nLes joueurs qui choisissent un elfe feront de bons défenseurs de deuxième ligne. Les elfes étant une race fragile, il faudra jouer prudemment pendant les batailles.",
					   "JP":"エルフは森の住人です。\n人間のような姿をしていますがより華奢な体躯で、美貌と、長い尖った耳を持っています。人間の都市の拡大に伴って多くのエルフは元々の住処である森を追われ、人間とともに暮らすようになりました。世代を重ねるうちにかつての魔法的な恩恵を失っています。\n\n近接戦闘に劣る代わりに魔法と弓の利用でより良い結果を得ることができます。\n\n後衛に適したキャラクターを作ることができますが、傷に脆いため戦闘中は慎重な操作が必要です。"},

		"name":{"EN":"half elf",
				"FR":"demi elfe",
				"DE":"Halb Elf",
				"JP":"ハーフエルフ"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"halves elfs",
					  "FR":"demis elfes",
					  "DE":"Halbe Elfen",
					  "JP":"ハーフエルフ"},
		"description":{"EN":"The halves elves are both elven and human.\nThey have a human body structure and long ears.\n\nHalf-elves are hardened city dwellers. They live among humans as though they were their peers. They share their lifestyle and customs.\n\nIf you hesitate between an elf or a human, half-elves are a good choice. They remain relatively polyvalent. Even if a half elf is better with range weapons or with magical powers, they are decent melee fighters.",
					   "FR":"Les demi-elfes sont à la fois elfes et humains.\nIls ont une carrure humaine, mais se différencient de par leur longues oreilles.\n\nLes demi-elfes sont des citadins endurcis. Ils vivent parmi les humains comme s'ils étaient leur semblables. Ils partagent leur style de vie et leurs coutumes.\n\nSi vous hésitez entre un elfe ou un humain, les demi-elfe sont un bon compromis. Ils restent une race relativement polyvalente. Même si un demi-elfe est meilleur à distance ou avec des pouvoirs magiques, il se débrouille correctement au corps-à-corps.",
					   "JP":"ハーフエルフは、エルフと人間両方である種族です。\n人間と同じ体躯に長い耳を持っています。\n\n常習的に都市に居住しており、元々そうであるようにライフスタイルや習慣を共にしながら人間に溶け込んでいます。\n\nエルフか人間かで悩んでいるプレイヤーにはハーフエルフは良い選択になります。比較的多価を保っており、優れた遠距離戦闘能力を持ちながら近接戦闘を十分にこなすこともできます。"},
		"sex":"M",
		"otherSex":"halfElfF",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"health":90,
		"stamina":100,
		"mana":110,
		"attack":100, "attackEffect":"default",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,
		"strength":90,
		"endurance":90,
		"address":110,
		"rapidity":100,
		"intelligence":100,
		"willpower":110,
		"charisma":100,
		"speed":5,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けてくれ！", "俺を助けてくれ！", "お願いだから助けてくれ！", "援護が必要だ！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かる。", "本当にありがとう！", "恩に着る！", "素晴らしいな！", "これはいいな。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くぞ！", "さあ行こう！", "来てくれ！", "付いてこい！", "進め！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃！", "蹴散らせ！", "突撃！"]
			},
			"destroy":{
				"EN":["Destroy this.", "Raze this."],
				"FR":["Détruisez ça.", "Rasez ça."],
				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],
				"JP":["あれを破壊しろ！", "あれを打ち壊してやれ！"]
			}
		}
	},
	"halfElfF":{
		"type":"playable",
		"no":5,
		"pictures":[{"back":{"name":{"EN":"back", "FR":"dos"}, "folder":"backF/", "visible":false,"forbidden":["mary.png"],"colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps"}, "folder":"bodiesF/", "linkColor":"ears", "colors":[16636065, 13147004, 12356961, 16573107, 14988178, 7226145]}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages"}, "folder":"facesF/"}},
					{"shoes":{"name":{"EN":"shoes", "FR":"chaussures"}, "folder":"shoesF/", "colors":[16777215, 6262964, 3624028, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 13155208, 7232851, 3552822, 13395456, 10240062, 13411742, 3626049, 7957675]}},
					{"clothes":{"name":{"EN":"clothes", "FR":"vêtements"}, "folder":"clothesF/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641, 255, 16711680, 65280, 16776960, 0, 16777215, 16711935, 65535]}},

					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"hairs":{"name":{"EN":"hair", "FR":"cheveux"}, "folder":"hairsF/", "linkShape":"back", "linkColor":"back","forbidden":["mary.png"],"colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"ears":{"name":{"EN":"ears", "FR":"oreilles"}, "folder":"ears/elvesF/", "linkColor":"bodies", "colors":[16636065, 13147004, 12356961, 16573107, 14988178, 7226145]}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"half elf",
				"FR":"demi elfe",
				"DE":"Halb Elfe",
				"JP":"ハーフエルフ"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"half elfs",
					  "FR":"demi elfes",
					  "DE":"Halbe Elfen",
					  "JP":"ハーフエルフ"},
		"changeBestiary":"halfElfM",
		"description":{"EN":"The halves elves are both elven and human.\nThey have a human body structure and long ears.\n\nHalf-elves are hardened city dwellers. They live among humans as though they were their peers. They share their lifestyle and customs.\n\nIf you hesitate between an elf or a human, half-elves are a good choice. They remain relatively polyvalent. Even if a half elf is better with range weapons or with magical powers, they are decent melee fighters.",
					   "FR":"Les demi-elfes sont à la fois elfes et humains.\nIls ont une carrure humaine, mais se différencient de par leur longues oreilles.\n\nLes demi-elfes sont des citadins endurcis. Ils vivent parmi les humains comme s'ils étaient leur semblables. Ils partagent leur style de vie et leurs coutumes.\n\nSi vous hésitez entre un elfe ou un humain, les demi-elfe sont un bon compromis. Ils restent une race relativement polyvalente. Même si un demi-elfe est meilleur à distance ou avec des pouvoirs magiques, il se débrouille correctement au corps-à-corps.",
					   "JP":"ハーフエルフは、エルフと人間両方である種族です。\n人間と同じ体躯に長い耳を持っています。\n\n常習的に都市に居住しており、元々そうであるようにライフスタイルや習慣を共にしながら人間に溶け込んでいます。\n\nエルフか人間かで悩んでいるプレイヤーにはハーフエルフは良い選択になります。比較的多価を保っており、優れた遠距離戦闘能力を持ちながら近接戦闘を十分にこなすこともできます。"},
		"sex":"F",
		"otherSex":"halfElfM",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"health":90,
		"stamina":100,
		"mana":110,
		"attack":100, "attackEffect":"default",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,
		"strength":90,
		"endurance":90,
		"address":110,
		"rapidity":100,
		"intelligence":100,
		"willpower":110,
		"charisma":100,
		"speed":5,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けて！", "私を助けて！", "お願い……助けて！", "助けて欲しいの！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かります。", "ありがとうございます！", "感謝します！", "素敵です！", "これはいいものですね。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くわよ！", "さあ、やるわよ！", "来て下さい！", "付いてきて！", "進軍して！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃！", "蹴散らせ！", "突撃！"]
			},
			"destroy":{
				"EN":["Destroy this.", "Raze this."],
				"FR":["Détruisez ça.", "Rasez ça."],
				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],
				"JP":["あれを壊して！", "あれを潰すのよ！"]
			}
		}
	},
	"dwarfM":{
		"type":"playable",
		"no":6,
		"pictures":[{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps"}, "folder":"bodiesM/", "linkColor":"ears", "colors":[16636065, 13147004, 12356961, 16573107, 14988178, 7226145]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages"}, "folder":"facesM/"}},
					{"shoes":{"name":{"EN":"shoes", "FR":"chaussures"}, "folder":"shoesM/", "colors":[16777215, 6262964, 3624028, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 13155208, 7232851, 3552822, 13395456, 10240062, 13411742, 3626049, 7957675]}},
					{"clothes":{"name":{"EN":"clothes", "FR":"vêtements"}, "folder":"clothesM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641, 255, 16711680, 65280, 16776960, 0, 16777215, 16711935, 65535]}},
					{"belts":{"name":{"EN":"belts", "FR":"ceintures"}, "folder":"beltsM/"}},
					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"hairs":{"name":{"EN":"hair", "FR":"cheveux"}, "folder":"hairsM/", "linkColor":"beard", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"beard":{"name":{"EN":"beards", "FR":"barbes"}, "folder":"beards/", "linkColor":"hairs", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"dwarf",
				"FR":"nain",
				"DE":"Zwerg",
				"JP":"ドワーフ"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"dwarfs",
					  "FR":"nains",
					  "DE":"Zwerge",
					  "JP":"ドワーフ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Dwarves are half-men.\nThey often live in mines where they extract valuable minerals for blacksmiths and jewellers. In cities, they easily find work as a blacksmiths or warriors.\n\nDwarves are slow but powerful melee fighters specialised in axes and hammers. They don't have any talent with precision weapons, except for firearms. They are also limited in magic.\n\nThis choice of character is perfect to fight on the front line. Dwarves are tough, but they are slow  and they can hardly run away from a battle.",
					   "FR":"Les nains sont des hommes de petite taille.\nIls vivent souvent dans des mines, où ils extraient des minerais rares pour les fonderies et les joailleries. Dans les villes, ils trouvent facilement du travail en tant que forgerons ou que guerriers.\n\nLes nains sont lentes, mais sont de puissants combattants au corps-à-corps, spécialisée dans les haches et les marteaux. Ils sont peu doués avec les armes de précision, sauf les armes à feu. Ils sont aussi limités en magie.\n\nCe choix de personnage est idéal pour aller combattre en première ligne. Les nains sont résistants, mais leur lenteur de déplacement fait qu'ils ont peu de chance fuir une bataille.",
					   "JP":"ドワーフは半人間の種族です。\n鍛冶や宝石細工のための貴重な鉱石を入手するため、しばしば鉱山に住んでいます。都市部においては鍛冶屋や戦士として働く姿を簡単に見つけることができるでしょう。\n\n斧やハンマーでの近接戦闘を得意とする強力な戦士ですが、銃器を除いて遠隔武器に才能がありません。同様に魔法の才能も限られています。\n\n前線で戦う戦士に最適な種族です。タフですが鈍重で、戦闘から逃げるのは難しいでしょう。"},
		"sex":"M",
		"otherSex":"dwarfF",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"scaleY":0.8,
		"health":120,
		"stamina":120,
		"mana":80,
		"attack":100, "attackEffect":"default",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,
		"strength":120,
		"endurance":120,
		"address":80,
		"rapidity":80,
		"intelligence":100,
		"willpower":100,
		"charisma":100,
		"alcohols":20,
		"prospecting":20,
		"mining":20,
		"metalSmelting":20,
		"weaponsForging":20,
		"armorsForging":20,
		"firearmsForging":20,
		"gemmology":20,
		"goldsmithery":20,
		"bluntWeapons":20,
		"axes":20,
		"firearms":20,
		"picking":-20,

		"forestry":-20,

		"hunting":-20,

		"bakery":-20,

		"bows":-20,
		"pyrotechnicMagic":-20,
		"redemptiveMagic":-20,
		"speed":4.5,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けてくれ！", "俺を助けてくれ！", "お願いだから助けてくれ！", "援護が必要だ！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かる。", "本当にありがとう！", "恩に着る！", "素晴らしいな！", "これはいいな。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くぞ！", "さあ行こう！", "来てくれ！", "付いてこい！", "進め！"]

		"changeBestiary":"dwarfM",
		"description":{"EN":"Dwarves are half-women.\nThey often live in mines where they extract valuable minerals for blacksmiths and jewellers. In cities, they easily find work as a blacksmiths or warriors.\n\nDwarves are slow but powerful melee fighters specialised in axes and hammers. They don't have any talent with precision weapons, except for firearms. They are also limited in magic.\n\nThis choice of character is perfect to fight on the front line. Dwarves are tough, but they are slow  and they can hardly run away from a battle.",
					   "FR":"Les naines sont des femmes de petite taille.\nElles vivent souvent dans des mines, où elles extraient des minerais rares pour les fonderies et les joailleries. Dans les villes, elles trouvent facilement du travail en tant que forgeronnes ou que guerrières.\n\nLes naines sont lentes, mais sont de puissantes combattantes au corps-à-corps, spécialisées dans les haches et les marteaux. Elles sont peu douées avec les armes de précision, sauf les armes à feu. Elles sont aussi limitées en magie.\n\nCe choix de personnage est idéal pour aller combattre en première ligne. Les naines sont résistantes, mais leur lenteur de déplacement fait qu'elles ont peu de chance fuir une bataille.",
					   "JP":"ドワーフは半人間の種族です。\n鍛冶や宝石細工のための貴重な鉱石を入手するため、しばしば鉱山に住んでいます。都市部においては鍛冶屋や戦士として働く姿を簡単に見つけることができるでしょう。\n\n斧やハンマーでの近接戦闘を得意とする強力な戦士ですが、銃器を除いて遠隔武器に才能がありません。同様に魔法の才能も限られています。\n\n前線で戦う戦士に最適な種族です。タフですが鈍重で、戦闘から逃げるのは難しいでしょう。"},

				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くわよ！", "さあ、やるわよ！", "来て下さい！", "付いてきて！", "進軍して！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃！", "蹴散らせ！", "突撃！"]
			},
			"destroy":{
				"EN":["Destroy this.", "Raze this."],
				"FR":["Détruisez ça.", "Rasez ça."],
				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],
				"JP":["あれを壊して！", "あれを潰すのよ！"]
			}
		}
	},
	"felineM":{
		"type":"playable",
		"no":8,
		"pictures":[{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps"}, "folder":"bodiesM/", "linkColor":"ears", "colors":[16636065, 13147004, 12356961, 16573107, 14988178, 7226145]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages"}, "folder":"facesM/"}},
					{"clothes":{"name":{"EN":"clothes", "FR":"vêtements"}, "folder":"clothesM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641, 255, 16711680, 65280, 16776960, 0, 16777215, 16711935, 65535]}},
					{"belts":{"name":{"EN":"belts", "FR":"ceintures"}, "folder":"beltsM/"}},
					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"hairs":{"name":{"EN":"hair", "FR":"cheveux"}, "folder":"hairsM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"ears":{"name":{"EN":"ears", "FR":"oreilles"}, "folder":"ears/felinesM/", "linkColor":"bodies", "colors":[16636065, 13147004, 12356961, 16573107, 14988178, 7226145]}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"feline",
				"FR":"félin",
				"JP":"フェリーン"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"felines",
					  "FR":"félin",
					  "JP":"フェリーン"},
		"description":{"EN":"Felines are half-men, half-cat creatures.\nThey are peaceful, they enjoy cooking, partying and eating all kinds of foods. In society, they often play the role of servants, but they know how to fight with their claws out.\n\nFelines are very fast. They are specialised in light weapons and range weapons. They have no interest in wearing heavy armours, so they focus on light ones.\n\nA feline is a third-line character who uses his advantages in crafting to supply other fighting forces. If a feline is in danger, he can easily stay away, due to his huge movement speed.",
					   "FR":"Les félins sont des créatures mi-homme, mi-félin.\nCe sont des êtres pacifiques qui aiment cuisiner, faire la fête et manger toutes sortes de nourriture. En société, ils jouent souvent le rôle de domestiques, mais savent néanmoins se battre quand il s'agit de sortir les griffes.\n\nLes félins sont très rapides et spécialisés dans les armes légères ou à distance. Ils n'ont aucun intérêt à porter des armures lourdes, alors mieux vaut privilégier les armures légères.\n\nUn félin est un personnage de troisième ligne qui utilise ses capacités en artisanat pour soutenir les autres forces combattantes. Si un félin est en danger, il pourra facilement rester à distance grâce à sa grande vitesse de déplacement.",
					   "JP":"フェリーンは半獣人の種族です。\n平和的で、調理やパーティー、あらゆる食事を楽しむことを好んでいます。社会ではしばしば使用人となっていますが、その身に備えた爪で戦う方法も知っています。\n\n非常にすばやく、小型武器や遠隔武器を得意としています。重装甲を身にまとうことには興味がなく、軽量なものに集中しています。\n\nその特性を生かして軍のための補給物資の製造などを行う再後衛のキャラクターに向いています。危機が迫っているならば移動速度を活かして、すぐに場を離脱することが可能です。"},
		"sex":"M",
		"otherSex":"felineF",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"scale":0.9,
		"health":80,
		"stamina":120,
		"mana":100,
		"attack":80, "attackEffect":"scratch",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "slashing"],
		"defense":100,
		"strength":80,
		"endurance":80,
		"address":120,
		"rapidity":120,
		"intelligence":100,
		"willpower":100,
		"charisma":100,
		"hunting":20,
		"bakery":20,
		"breeding":20,
		"alcohols":20,
		"shoemaking":-20,
		"lithology":-20,
		"stonecutting":-20,
		"prospecting":-20,
		"speed":6,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けてくれ！", "俺を助けてくれ！", "お願いだから助けてくれ！", "援護が必要だ！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かる。", "本当にありがとう！", "恩に着る！", "素晴らしいな！", "これはいいな。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くぞ！", "さあ行こう！", "来てくれ！", "付いてこい！", "進め！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃！", "蹴散らせ！", "突撃！"]
			},
			"destroy":{
				"EN":["Destroy this.", "Raze this."],
				"FR":["Détruisez ça.", "Rasez ça."],
				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],
				"JP":["あれを破壊しろ！", "あれを打ち壊してやれ！"]
			}
		}
	},

		"type":"playable",

		"name":{"EN":"feline",

		"changeBestiary":"felineM",
		"description":{"EN":"Felines are half-women, half-cat creatures.\nThey are peaceful, they enjoy cooking, partying and eating all kinds of foods. In society, they often play the role of servants, but they know how to fight with their claws out.\n\nFelines are very fast. They are specialised in light weapons and range weapons. They have no interest in wearing heavy armours, so they focus on light ones.\n\nA feline is a third-line character who uses her advantages in crafting to supply other fighting forces. If a feline is in danger, she can easily stay away, due to her huge movement speed.",
					   "FR":"Les félines sont des créatures mi-femme, mi-félin.\nCe sont des êtres pacifiques qui aiment cuisiner, faire la fête et manger toutes sortes de nourriture. En société, elles jouent souvent le rôle de domestiques, mais savent néanmoins se battre quand il s'agit de sortir les griffes.\n\nLes félines sont très rapides et spécialisées dans les armes légères ou à distance. Elles n'ont aucun intérêt à porter des armures lourdes, alors mieux vaut privilégier les armures légères.\n\nUne féline est un personnage de troisième ligne qui utilise ses capacités en artisanat pour soutenir les autres forces combattantes. Si une féline est en danger, elle pourra facilement rester à distance grâce à sa grande vitesse de déplacement.",
					   "JP":"フェリーンは半獣人の種族です。\n平和的で、調理やパーティー、あらゆる食事を楽しむことを好んでいます。社会ではしばしば使用人となっていますが、その身に備えた爪で戦う方法も知っています。\n\n非常にすばやく、小型武器や遠隔武器を得意としています。重装甲を身にまとうことには興味がなく、軽量なものに集中しています。\n\nその特性を生かして軍のための補給物資の製造などを行う再後衛のキャラクターに向いています。危機が迫っているならば移動速度を活かして、すぐに場を離脱することが可能です。"},
		"sex":"F",
		"otherSex":"felineM",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"scale":0.9,
		"health":80,
		"stamina":120,
		"mana":100,
		"attack":80, "attackEffect":"scratch",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "slashing"],
		"defense":100,
		"strength":80,
		"endurance":80,
		"address":120,
		"rapidity":120,
		"intelligence":100,
		"willpower":100,
		"charisma":100,
		"bakery":20,
		"breeding":20,
		"alcohols":20,
		"shoemaking":-20,
		"lithology":-20,
		"stonecutting":-20,
		"prospecting":-20,
		"speed":6,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けて欲しいにゃ！", "みゃーを助けて！", "頼むのにゃ……助けて！", "手伝いが必要にゃ！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かるにゃ。", "ありがたいにゃ！", "感謝するにゃ！", "素敵だにゃ！", "これはいいものだにゃ。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くにゃ！", "さあ、やるにゃ！", "来るんだにゃ！", "付いてくるにゃ！", "進軍にゃ！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃にゃ！","進むのにゃ！","蹴散らすのにゃ！"]
			},
			"destroy":{
				"EN":["Destroy this.", "Raze this."],
				"FR":["Détruisez ça.", "Rasez ça."],
				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],
				"JP":["あれを壊すんだにゃ！", "あれをタタキにしてやるのにゃ！"]
			}
		}

	"colossusM":{
		"type":"playable",
		"no":10,
		"pictures":[{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps"}, "folder":"bodiesM/", "colors":[16636065, 13147004, 12356961, 16573107, 14988178, 7226145]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages"}, "folder":"facesM/"}},
					{"shoes":{"name":{"EN":"shoes", "FR":"chaussures"}, "folder":"shoesM/", "colors":[16777215, 6262964, 3624028, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 13155208, 7232851, 3552822, 13395456, 10240062, 13411742, 3626049, 7957675]}},
					{"clothes":{"name":{"EN":"clothes", "FR":"vêtements"}, "folder":"clothesM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641, 255, 16711680, 65280, 16776960, 0, 16777215, 16711935, 65535]}},
					{"belts":{"name":{"EN":"belts", "FR":"ceintures"}, "folder":"beltsM/"}},
					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"hairs":{"name":{"EN":"hair", "FR":"cheveux"}, "folder":"hairsM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"colossus",
				"FR":"colosse",
				"DE":"Koloss",
				"JP":"コロッサス"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"colossus",
					  "FR":"colosses",
					  "DE":"Kolosse",
					  "JP":"コロッサス"},
		"description":{"EN":"Colossus are men of great size.\nThey are aggressive creatures who live in remote mountains. When colossus need to express their violence, they go to town where big guys always find their place.\n\nColossus are very strong and very resistant, but their magical abilities are very limited. They are ideal warriors. As for crafting, they are good at smashing stones.\n\nA colossus is a character specifically designed for physical combat and to rush into the brawl. They are penalised in activities that require dexterity or a brain.",
					   "FR":"Les colosses sont des hommes de très grande taille.\nCe sont des êtres agressifs qui vivent dans des montagnes isolées. Quand les colosses ont besoin d'extérioriser leur violence, ils se rendent en ville ou les gros bras trouvent toujours leur place.\n\nLes colosses sont très forts et très résistants. Leurs capacités magiques sont par contre très limitées. Ce sont des guerriers idéaux. En artisanat, ils sont doués pour fracasser des pierres.\n\nUn colosse est un personnage spécialement conçu pour le combat physique et pour foncer dans le tas. Ils sont par contre pénalisés dans les activités qui exigent de la dextérité ou des cellules grises.",
					   "JP":"コロッサスは巨人種族です。\n遠い山々に住んでいる攻撃的な種族で、力を見せつける必要があるときは街にその居場所を見つけます。\n\n非常に力強く頑健ですが、魔法の能力は大きく限られています。理想的な戦士であるほか、岩を砕くことにも向いています。\n\n物理的な乱戦に特に向いている種族で、器用さや頭を使う活動にはペナルティがあります。"},
		"sex":"M",
		"otherSex":"colossusF",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"scale":1.2,
		"health":140,
		"stamina":80,
		"mana":60,
		"attack":120, "attackEffect":"shock",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,
		"strength":140,
		"endurance":140,
		"address":80,
		"rapidity":80,
		"intelligence":80,
		"willpower":80,
		"charisma":100,
		"building":20,
		"lithology":20,
		"stonecutting":20,
		"repairing":-20,
		"forestry":-20,
		"picking":-20,
		"bluntWeapons":20,
		"lightWeapons":-20,
		"golemology":20,
		"conscription":-20,
		"speed":5,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けてくれ！", "俺を助けてくれ！", "お願いだから助けてくれ！", "援護が必要だ！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かる。", "本当にありがとう！", "恩に着る！", "素晴らしいな！", "これはいいな。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くぞ！", "さあ行こう！", "来てくれ！", "付いてこい！", "進め！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃！", "蹴散らせ！", "突撃！"]
			},
			"destroy":{
				"EN":["Destroy this.", "Raze this."],
				"FR":["Détruisez ça.", "Rasez ça."],
				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],
				"JP":["あれを破壊しろ！", "あれを打ち壊してやれ！"]
			}
		}
	},

En artisanat, ils sont doués pour fracasser des pierres.\n\nUn colosse est un personnage spécialement conçu pour le combat physique et pour foncer dans le tas. 					   "JP":"コロッサスは巨人種族です。\n遠い山々に住んでいる攻撃的な種族で、力を見せつける必要があるときは街にその居場所を見つけます。\n\n非常に力強く頑健ですが、魔法の能力は大きく限られています。理想的な戦士であるほか、岩を砕くことにも向いています。\n\n物理的な乱戦に特に向いている種族で、器用さや頭を使う活動にはペナルティがあります。"},

		"attack":120, "attackEffect":"shock",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,
		"strength":140,
		"endurance":140,
		"address":80,
		"rapidity":80,
		"intelligence":80,
		"willpower":80,
		"charisma":100,
		"building":20,
		"lithology":20,
		"stonecutting":20,
		"repairing":-20,
		"forestry":-20,
		"picking":-20,
		"bluntWeapons":20,
		"lightWeapons":-20,
		"golemology":20,
		"conscription":-20,
		"speed":5,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けて！", "私を助けて！", "お願い……助けて！", "助けて欲しいの！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かります。", "ありがとうございます！", "感謝します！", "素敵です！", "これはいいものですね。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くわよ！", "さあ、やるわよ！", "来て下さい！", "付いてきて！", "進軍して！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃！", "蹴散らせ！", "突撃！"]
			},
			"destroy":{
				"EN":["Destroy this.", "Raze this."],
				"FR":["Détruisez ça.", "Rasez ça."],
				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],
				"JP":["あれを壊して！", "あれを潰すのよ！"]
			}
		}
	}
}
</file>

<file path="data/characters/townCenters/townCenters.js">
{
	"townCenterWoodenAge":{
		"type":"townCenter",
		"age":"woodenAge",
		"endingAge":"stoneAge",
		"no":0,
		"picture":{"file":"townCenterWoodenAge.png",
				   "file100":"townCenterWoodenAge100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"town centre",
				"FR":"hôtel de ville",
				"JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"town centres",
					  "FR":"hôtels de ville",
					  "JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"description":{"EN":"The town centre allows you to move to the next age.",
					   "FR":"L'hôtel de ville vous permet de passer à l'époque suivante.",
					   "JP":"木の時代のタウンセンター。周囲の敵への攻撃能力を持つ他、次の年代に進むために必要です。資源倉庫にもなります。木材を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"wood":200},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":1},
			"prebuild":{"id":"townCenterWoodenAgeYard", "time":1}
		},
		"repair":{
			"health":15,
			"time":1.5,
			"costRessource":{"wood":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":1}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":2}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":240,
		"visualHeight":256,
		"health":3000,
		"attack":200,"attackTime":3,"range":500,"missile":"dart","attackDY":-165,"sound":"shoot",
		"damage":["missile", "piercing"],
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"warehouse":true
	},
	"townCenterWoodenAgeYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"townCenterWoodenAgeYard.png",
				   "file100":"townCenterWoodenAgeYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"town centre",
				"FR":"hôtel de ville",
				"JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"description":{"EN":"The town centre allows you to move to the next age.",
					   "FR":"L'hôtel de ville vous permet de passer à l'époque suivante.",
					   "JP":"木の時代のタウンセンター。周囲の敵への攻撃能力を持つ他、次の年代に進むために必要です。資源倉庫にもなります。木材を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":2}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":240,
		"visualHeight":256,
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"steps":3
	},
	"townCenterStoneAge":{
		"type":"townCenter",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"endingAge":"ironAge",
		"no":1,
		"picture":{"file":"townCenterStoneAge.png",
				   "file100":"townCenterStoneAge100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"town centre",
				"FR":"hôtel de ville",
				"JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"town centres",
					  "FR":"hôtels de ville",
					  "JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"description":{"EN":"The town centre allows you to move to the next age.",
					   "FR":"L'hôtel de ville vous permet de passer à l'époque suivante.",
					   "JP":"石の時代のタウンセンター。周囲の敵への攻撃能力を持つ他、次の年代に進むために必要です。収穫者の雇用元や資源倉庫にもなります。厚板と切石を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"plank":150, "freeStone":150},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":2},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":2},
			"prebuild":{"id":"townCenterStoneAgeYard", "time":1}
		},
		"title":{"EN":"Recruit servants", "FR":"Recruter des serviteurs","JP":"収獲者の雇用"},
		"produce":[{
				"time":0.5,
				"gainItem":{"crown":1},
				"costRessource":{"silverCoin":200}
			},{
				"time":25,
				"createCharacter":{"servantM":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"conscription",
				"costRessource":{"silverCoin":50},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":50},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":50},
				"xpSkill":{"conscription":50},
				"repeat":true
			},{
				"time":25,
				"createCharacter":{"servantF":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"conscription",
				"costRessource":{"silverCoin":50},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":50},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":50},
				"xpSkill":{"conscription":50},
				"repeat":true
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":28,
			"time":1.5,
			"costRessource":{"plank":1, "freeStone":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":3},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":3}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":2}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":240,
		"visualHeight":256,
		"health":4200,
		"attack":300,"attackTime":3,"range":500,"missile":"stoneJavelinMissile","attackDY":-145,"sound":"soundThrow",
		"damage":["missile", "piercing"],
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"warehouse":true
	},
	"townCenterStoneAgeYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"townCenterStoneAgeYard.png",
				   "file100":"townCenterStoneAgeYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"town centre",
				"FR":"hôtel de ville",
				"JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"description":{"EN":"The town centre allows you to move to the next age.",
					   "FR":"L'hôtel de ville vous permet de passer à l'époque suivante.",
					   "JP":"石の時代のタウンセンター。周囲の敵への攻撃能力を持つ他、次の年代に進むために必要です。収穫者の雇用元や資源倉庫にもなります。厚板と切石を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":2}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":240,
		"visualHeight":256,
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"steps":3
	},
	"townCenterIronAge":{
		"type":"townCenter",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"endingAge":"etherAge",
		"no":2,
		"picture":{"file":"townCenterIronAge.png",
				   "file100":"townCenterIronAge100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"town centre",
				"FR":"hôtel de ville",
				"JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"town centres",
					  "FR":"hôtels de ville",
					  "JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"description":{"EN":"The town centre allows you to move to the next age.",
					   "FR":"L'hôtel de ville vous permet de passer à l'époque suivante.",
					   "JP":"鉄の時代のタウンセンター。周囲の敵への攻撃能力を持つ他、次の年代に進むために必要です。収穫者の雇用元や資源倉庫にもなります。厚板と鋳鉄を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"plank":200, "castIron":100},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":2},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":2},
			"prebuild":{"id":"townCenterIronAgeYard", "time":1}
		},
		"title":{"EN":"Recruit servants", "FR":"Recruter des serviteurs","JP":"収獲者の雇用"},
		"produce":[{
				"time":0.5,
				"gainItem":{"crown":1},
				"costRessource":{"silverCoin":300}
			},{
				"time":25,
				"createCharacter":{"servantM":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"conscription",
				"costRessource":{"silverCoin":50},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":50},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":50},
				"xpSkill":{"conscription":50},
				"repeat":true
			},{
				"time":25,
				"createCharacter":{"servantF":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"conscription",
				"costRessource":{"silverCoin":50},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":50},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":50},
				"xpSkill":{"conscription":50},
				"repeat":true
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":51,
			"time":2.5,
			"costRessource":{"plank":2, "castIron":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":5},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":5},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":5}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":2}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":240,
		"visualHeight":256,
		"health":5100,

		"damage":["missile", "piercing"],
		"defense":150,

		"warehouse":true
	},
	"townCenterIronAgeYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"townCenterIronAgeYard.png",
				   "file100":"townCenterIronAgeYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"town centre",
				"FR":"hôtel de ville",
				"JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"description":{"EN":"The town centre allows you to move to the next age.",
					   "FR":"L'hôtel de ville vous permet de passer à l'époque suivante.",

<file path="data/characters/workshops/archeryCamp.js">
{
	"archeryCamp":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":4,

				   "file100":"archeryCamp100.atf"},

				"FR":"camp d'archerie",
				"JP":"射場"},
		"description":{"EN":"The archery camp is a workshop which allows you to manufacture bows and crossbows.",
					   "FR":"Le camp d'archerie est un atelier dans lequel vous pouvez fabriquer des arcs et des arbalètes.",

<file path="data/characters/workshops/arsenal.js">
{
	"arsenal":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"no":20,
		"picture":{"file":"arsenal.png",
				   "file100":"arsenal100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"arsenal",
				"FR":"arsenal",
				"JP":"造兵廠"},
		"description":{"EN":"The arsenal is a workshop which allows you to manufacture firearms from cast iron and sulphur.",
					   "FR":"L'arsenal est un atelier qui vous permet de fabriquer des armes à feu à partir de lingots de fonte et de soufre.",
					   "JP":"鋳鉄や鋼鉄、硫黄を用いて銃器および弾薬の製造が可能です。厚板を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"plank":15},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":1},

		},

				"FR":{"D":["Je ne trouve pas d'arsenal."]},
				"JP":{"D":["造兵廠が見当たらないな。"]}},

				 "FR":"Fabriquer des armes à feu",
				 "JP":"銃器製造"},

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":8},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":8},
				"xpSkill":{"firearmsForging":8},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-2
			},{

				"gainItem":{"shoulderCannon":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"firearmsForging",

				"xpSkill":{"firearmsForging":60},
				"quantity":-20

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":11},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":11},
				"xpSkill":{"firearmsForging":11},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-3
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":10,
			"time":0.5,
			"costRessource":{"plank":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":1}
		},

		"height":64,
		"health":150,

					   "FR":"L'arsenal est un atelier qui vous permet de fabriquer des armes à feu à partir de lingots de fonte et de soufre.",
					   "JP":"鋳鉄や鋼鉄、硫黄を用いて銃器および弾薬の製造が可能です。厚板を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"death":{

<file path="data/characters/workshops/bakeryOven.js">
{
	"bakeryOven":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":7,
		"picture":{"file":"bakeryOven.png",
				   "file100":"bakeryOven100.atf"},

				"FR":"four à pain",
				"JP":"製パン用オーブン"},
		"description":{"EN":"The oven is a workshop which allows you to bake bread.",
					   "FR":"Le four permet de faire du pain.",
					   "JP":"小麦粉などを用いてパンや菓子を焼くことが可能です。切石を用いて建築することができます。"},

			"buildable":"all",

			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":3},
				"xpSkill":{"bakery":3},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-3
			},{
				"time":4,
				"gainItem":{"brioche":4},
				"sound":"soundPick",
				"bonusSkill":"bakery",
				"costRessource":{"flour":4},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":8},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":8},
				"xpSkill":{"bakery":8},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-8
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":15,
			"time":1,
			"costRessource":{"freeStone":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":2},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":2}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction"}
		},
		"width":64,
		"height":64,
		"health":150,
		"defense":200,
		"resistance":{"death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0}
	},

<file path="data/characters/workshops/distillery.js">
{
	"distillery":{
		"type":"workshop",

		"no":11,
		"picture":{"file":"distillery.png",

<file path="data/characters/workshops/foundry.js">
{
	"foundry":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"no":13,
		"picture":{"file":"foundry.png",
				   "file100":"foundry100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"foundry",
				"FR":"fonderie",
				"JP":"鋳造所"},
		"description":{"EN":"The foundry is a workshop which allows you to manufacture metal bars from minerals.",
					   "FR":"La fonderie permet de fabriquer des lingots de métal à partir de minerais.",
					   "JP":"原鉄などの鉱物から各種金属棒の鋳造が可能です。切石を用いて建築することができます。"},

				 "FR":"Fondre des lingots de métal",
				 "JP":"金属棒の鋳造"},

				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":5},
				"xpSkill":{"metalSmelting":5},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
			}],

			"xpSkill":{"repairing":2},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":2}
		},

	},
