<file path="kingdom/resources/resources.js">
{
	"goldCoin":{
		"type":"ressource",
		"no":0.5,
		"maxQuantity":"infinity",
		"disableRawMaterial":true,
		"value":10,
		"sellResource":true,
		"picture":{"file":"goldCoin.png"},
		"name":{"EN":"gold coins",
				"FR":"pièces d'or",
				"DE":"Goldmünze",
				"JP":"金貨"},
		"description":{"EN":"Gold coins are useful to the king.",
					   "FR":"Les pièces d'or sont utiles au roi.",
					   "DE":"Goldmünzen sind für den König nützlich.",
					   "JP":"金貨は王にとって有用です。"},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any gold coins."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de pièces d'or."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe keine Goldmünze."]},
				"JP":{"D":["金貨はありません。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough gold coins."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de pièces d'or."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe nicht genug Goldmünze."]},
				"JP":{"D":["金貨が足りません。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of gold coins."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de pièces d'or."]},
			   "DE":{"D":["Ich habe all meine Goldmünze verbraucht."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["金貨がなくなりました。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many gold coins."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de pièces d'or."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe viel zu viele Goldmünze."]},
				"JP":{"D":["金貨が多すぎます。"]}}
	}
}
</file>

<file path="kingdom/crown.js">
{
	"crown":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"category":"head",
		"picture":{"file":"crown.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"crown",
				"FR":"couronnne",
				"JP":"クラウン"},
		"description":{"EN":{"M":"The crown designates you as the king.", "F":"The crown designates you as the queen."},
					   "FR":{"M":"La couronne fait de vous le roi.", "F":"La couronne fait de vous la reine."},
					   "JP":{"M":"王冠はあなたを王にします。", "F":"王冠はあなたを女王にします。"}},
		"bonus":{"health":{"jewellery":1},
				 "conscription":{"jewellery":1}},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"health":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"jewellery":0.25}
				}
		},
		"xpSkill":{
			"conscription":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"jewellery":0.25}
				}
		},
		"autoUse":{
			"time":10,
			"gainRessource":{"goldCoin":1}
		},
		"appearance":{"hat":{"D":"crownD.png"}},
		"equip":true,
		"gain":{
			"equip":true,
			"king":true,
			"message":{"EN":{"M":"[playerName] has been proclaimed king!", "F":"[playerName] has been proclaimed queen!"},
					   "FR":{"M":"[playerName] est proclamé roi !", "F":"[playerName] est proclamée reine !"},
					   "JP":{"M":"[playerName]宣言された王です！", "F":"[playerName]宣言された女王です！"}}
		},
		"unequip":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"king":false,
			"message":{"EN":{"M":"The king has given up his crown!", "F":"The queen has given up her crown!"},
					   "FR":{"M":"Le roi a renoncé à sa couronne !", "F":"La reine a renoncé à sa couronne !"},
					   "JP":{"M":"王は王冠をあきらめた！", "F":"女王は王冠をあきらめた！"}}
		},
		"death":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"king":false,
			"message":{"EN":{"M":"The king is dead!", "F":"The queen is dead!"},
					   "FR":{"M":"Le roi est mort !", "F":"Le reine est morte !"},
					   "JP":{"M":"王は死んでいる！", "F":"女王は死んでいる！"}}
		},
		"secret":true
	}
}
</file>

<file path="kingdom/palace.js">
{
	"palace":{
		"type":"house",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"picture":{"file":"palace.png",
				   "file100":"palace100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"palace",
				"FR":"palais",
				"JP":"宮殿"},
		"description":{"EN":"The palace is the residence of the king.",
					   "FR":"Le palais est la demeure du roi.",
					   "JP":"宮殿は王の住居です。"},
		"bonus":{"health":100,"stamina":100,"mana":100},
		"bonusRegeneration":{"health":1,"stamina":1,"mana":1},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"king",
			"costRessource":{"freeStone":100},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":2},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":2},
			"prebuild":{"id":"palaceYard", "time":1}
		},
		"title":{"EN":"Create royal items", "FR":"Créer des équipements royaux","JP":"ロイヤルアイテムを作成する"},
		"produce":[{
				"time":5,
				"gainRessource":{"goldCoin":1},
				"sound":"soundPick",
				"bonusSkill":"trading",
				"costRessource":{"silverCoin":10},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":10},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":10},
				"xpSkill":{"trading":10},
				"repeat":true
			},{
				"time":1.5,
				"gainItem":{"kingScepter":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"weaponsForging",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":3},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":3},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":3},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":4,
				"gainItem":{"royalMantle":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"sewing",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":8},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":8},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":8},
				"xpSkill":{"sewing":8},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":0.5,
				"gainItem":{"ambroisia":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"alcohols",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":1},
				"xpSkill":{"alcohols":1},
				"repeat":true,
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":2,
				"gainItem":{"rapier":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"weaponsForging",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":4},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":4},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":4},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":4},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":2.5,
				"gainItem":{"curtana":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"weaponsForging",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":5},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":5},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":5},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":5},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":3,
				"gainItem":{"royalFlair":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"weaponsForging",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":6},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":6},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":6},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":6},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":5,
				"gainItem":{"crosier":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"enchantment",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":10},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":10},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":10},
				"xpSkill":{"enchantment":10},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":0.5,
				"gainItem":{"royalJelly":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"picking",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":1},
				"xpSkill":{"picking":1},
				"repeat":true,
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":6,
				"gainItem":{"sovereignsOrb":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"enchantment",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":12},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":12},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":12},
				"xpSkill":{"enchantment":12},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":5,
				"gainRessource":{"goldCoin":1},
				"sound":"soundPick",
				"bonusSkill":"trading",
				"costRessource":{"goldBar":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":10},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":10},
				"xpSkill":{"trading":10},
				"repeat":true
			},{
				"time":2,
				"gainItem":{"sigillaryRing":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"goldsmithery",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":4},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":4},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":4},
				"xpSkill":{"goldsmithery":4},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":4,
				"gainItem":{"diamondNecklace":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"goldsmithery",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":8},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":8},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":8},
				"xpSkill":{"goldsmithery":8},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":10,
				"gainItem":{"mountPegasus":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"training",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":20},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":20},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":20},
				"xpSkill":{"training":20},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":5,
				"createCharacter":{"eliteProtector":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"conscription",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":10},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":10},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":10},
				"xpSkill":{"conscription":10},
				"repeat":true,
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":0.5,
				"gainItem":{"pastry":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"bakery",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":1},
				"xpSkill":{"bakery":1},
				"repeat":true,
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":3,
				"gainItem":{"velvetGloves":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"sewing",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":6},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":6},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":6},
				"xpSkill":{"sewing":6},
				"buildable":"king"
			},{
				"time":0.5,
				"gainItem":{"chocolate":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"bakery",
				"costRessource":{"goldCoin":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":1},
				"xpSkill":{"bakery":1},
				"repeat":true,
				"buildable":"king"
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":20,
			"time":1,
			"costRessource":{"freeStone":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":2},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":2}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction","scale":2}
		},
		"width":128,
		"height":166,
		"visualHeight":192,
		"health":2000,
		"defense":200,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"secret":true
	},
	"palaceYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"palaceYard.png",
				   "file100":"palaceYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"palace",
				"FR":"palais",
				"JP":"宮殿"},
		"description":{"EN":"The palace is the residence of the king.",
					   "FR":"Le palais est la demeure du roi.",
					   "JP":"宮殿は王の住居です。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction","scale":2}
		},
		"width":128,
		"height":166,
		"visualHeight":192,
		"defense":200,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"steps":4
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/ages/ages.js">
{
	"steamAge":{
		"type":"age",
		"no":5,
		"name":{"EN":"Steam Age",
				"FR":"Âge de la Vapeur",
				"DE":"Steam Zeitalter",
				"JP":"蒸気の時代"},
		"message":{"EN":"You have reached the Steam Age.",
				   "FR":"Vous avez atteint l'Âge de la Vapeur.",
				   "DE":"Du hast das Steam Zeitalter erreicht",
				   "JP":"蒸気の時代に到達しました"},
		"label":"VI",

}

<file path="steamAge/ais/engineer.js">

			{"endingAge":"ironAge","item":"woodenHelmet"},

<file path="steamAge/characters/defenseTowers/defenseTowers.js">
{
	"siegeWorkshop":{
		"type":"barrack",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"no":9.5,
		"picture":{"file":"siegeWorkshop.png",
				   "file100":"siegeWorkshop100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"siege workshop",
				"FR":"atelier de siège",
				"JP":"制圧兵器工廠"},
		"description":{"EN":"The siege workshop allows you to build siege weapons.",
					   "FR":"L'atelier de siège vous permet de fabriquer des armes de siège.",
					   "JP":"各種の制圧兵器の建造が可能です。厚板と切石を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"freeStone":150, "plank":150},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":2},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":2},
			"prebuild":{"id":"siegeWorkshopYard", "time":1}
		},
		"title":{"EN":"Build siege weapons",
				 "FR":"Fabriquer des armes de siège",
				 "JP":"制圧兵器の建造"},
		"produce":[{
				"time":0.5,
				"createCharacter":{"siegeScorpion":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"militaryEngineering",
				"costRessource":{"plank":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":1},
				"xpSkill":{"militaryEngineering":1},
				"steps":70
			},{
				"time":1.5,
				"createCharacter":{"catapult":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"militaryEngineering",
				"costRessource":{"plank":2,"stone":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":3},
				"xpSkill":{"militaryEngineering":3},
				"steps":50
			},{
				"time":5.5,
				"createCharacter":{"bombard":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"militaryEngineering",
				"costRessource":{"castIron":2, "sulfur":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":11},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":11},
				"xpSkill":{"militaryEngineering":11},
				"steps":50
			},{
				"time":5.5,
				"createCharacter":{"heavyCannon":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"militaryEngineering",
				"costRessource":{"steel":2, "sulfur":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":11},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":11},
				"xpSkill":{"militaryEngineering":11},
				"steps":50
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":16,

		"attacks":[{"attack":800, "attackTime":50, "damage":["missile", "demolition"], "range":675, "missile":"bigMissile",  "sound":"soundRocket", "attackDY":-80, "special":{"fixedAngle":-1.57, "selfGuided":0.1, "pierce":true}},

				   {"attack":400, "attackTime":20, "damage":["missile", "demolition"], "range":675, "missile":"microMissile", "sound":"soundRocket", "attackDX":-26, "attackDY":-94, "special":{"fixedAngle":-2.57, "selfGuided":0.125}},

		"defense":500,

	},
	"siegeGolemYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"siegeGolemYard.png",
				   "file100":"siegeGolemYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"siege golem",
				"FR":"golem de siège",
				"JP":"シージゴーレム"},
		"description":{"EN":"The siege golem is an over-armed golem with long-range missiles and machine guns.",
					   "FR":"Le golem de siege est un golem sur-armé équipé de missiles longue portée et de mitrailleuses.",
					   "JP":"機関銃と長距離ミサイル群で武装した、圧倒的な火力のゴーレムです。鋼鉄を用いて建造することができます。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.25}
		},
		"width":90,
		"height":96,
		"visualHeight":120,
		"defense":500,
		"resistance":{"fire":1.5, "death":0.5, "electricity":1.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"steps":7
	},
	"ironWall":{

		"no":17,
		"picture":{"file":"ironWall.png",
				   "file100":"ironWall100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"steel wall",
				"FR":"mur d'acier",
				"JP":"鋼鉄の壁"},
		"description":{"EN":"Steel walls can stop your enemies.",
					   "FR":"Le mur d'acier bloque les ennemis.",
					   "JP":"敵の侵攻を留めることができる非常に強靭な壁です。鋼鉄を用いて建築することができます。"},

<file path="steamAge/characters/dungeons/dungeons.js">
{
	"beastDungeon":{
		"type":"dungeon",
		"picture":{"file":"beastDungeon.png",
				   "file100":"beastDungeon100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"dungeon of the beasts",
				"FR":"donjon des bêtes",
				"DE":"Tiere Dungeon",
				"JP":"獣のダンジョン"},
		"description":{"EN":"This dungeon is the headquarters of the beasts.",
					   "FR":"Ce donjon est le quartier général des bêtes.",
					   "DE":"Dieser Kerker ist der Hauptsitz der Tiere.",
					   "JP":"獣たちの司令部です。周囲の敵への攻撃能力も持っています。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction","scale":2.25}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":192,
		"visualHeight":224,
		"health":8000,
		"attack":300,"attackTime":6,"range":600,"missile":"stoneJavelinMissile","attackDY":-194,
		"damage":["missile", "piercing"],
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"light":1.5, "fire":1.25, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"timeRegeneration":5,
		"regeneration":1,
		"spawn":{"interval":150,
				 "baseNumber":0,
				 "coefPopulation":1}
	},
	"undeadDungeon":{
		"type":"dungeon",
		"picture":{"file":"undeadDungeon.png",
				   "file100":"undeadDungeon100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"dungeon of the undead",
				"FR":"donjon des morts-vivants",
				"DE":"Untoter Dungeon",
				"JP":"不死者のダンジョン"},
		"description":{"EN":"This dungeon is the headquarters of the undead.",
					   "FR":"Ce donjon est le quartier général des morts-vivants.",
					   "DE":"Dieser Kerker ist der Hauptsitz der Untoter.",
					   "JP":"不死者たちの司令部です。周囲の敵への攻撃能力も持っています。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction","scale":2.25}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":192,
		"visualHeight":224,
		"health":8000,
		"attack":300,"attackTime":6,"range":600,"missile":"boneSpearMissile","attackDY":-194,
		"damage":["magic", "death"],
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"light":2, "death":0.25, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"timeRegeneration":5,
		"regeneration":1,
		"spawn":{"interval":150,
				 "baseNumber":0,
				 "coefPopulation":1}
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/characters/houses/houses.js">
{
	"twoFloorsHouse":{
		"type":"house",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"no":8,
		"picture":{"file":"twoFloorsHouse.png",
				   "file100":"twoFloorsHouse100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"two-floored house",
				"FR":"maison à deux étages",
				"JP":"2階建て家屋"},
		"description":{"EN":"The two-floored house is a modern building.",
					   "FR":"La maison à deux étages est une demeure moderne.",
					   "JP":"厚板と切石で作られた、現代的な家屋です。家主の持久力及び回復速度を大幅に向上させる他、屋内で休むことも可能です。"},
		"bonus":{"stamina":150},
		"bonusRegeneration":{"stamina":2},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"plank":50, "freeStone":50},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":2},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":2},
			"prebuild":{"id":"twoFloorsHouseYard", "time":1}
		},
		"repair":{
			"health":40,
			"time":1.5,
			"costRessource":{"plank":1, "freeStone":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":3},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":3}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.5}
		},
		"width":150,
		"height":128,
		"visualHeight":143,
		"health":2000,
		"defense":200,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0}
	},
	"twoFloorsHouseYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"twoFloorsHouseYard.png",
				   "file100":"twoFloorsHouseYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"two-floored house",
				"FR":"maison à deux étages",
				"JP":"2階建て家屋"},
		"description":{"EN":"The two-floored house is a modern building.",
					   "FR":"La maison à deux étages est une demeure moderne.",
					   "JP":"厚板と切石で作られた、現代的な家屋です。家主の持久力及び回復速度を大幅に向上させる他、屋内で休むことも可能です。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.5}
		},
		"width":150,
		"height":128,
		"visualHeight":143,
		"defense":200,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"steps":4
	},
	"militaryCasemat":{
		"type":"house",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"no":9,
		"picture":{"file":"militaryCasemat.png",
				   "file100":"militaryCasemat100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"military barracks",
				"FR":"baraquement militaire",
				"JP":"軍用住宅"},
		"description":{"EN":"Military barracks are used to quarter soldiers.",
					   "FR":"Le baraquement militaire sert de cantonnement aux soldats.",
					   "JP":"鋼鉄で作られた、兵士の居住区です。家主の体力及び回復速度を向上させる他、屋内で休むことも可能です。"},
		"bonus":{"health":150},
		"bonusRegeneration":{"health":1},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"steel":50},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":3},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":3},
			"prebuild":{"id":"militaryCasematYard", "time":1.5}
		},
		"repair":{
			"health":5,
			"time":1.5,
			"costRessource":{"steel":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":3},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":3}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.25}
		},
		"width":96,
		"height":120,
		"visualHeight":144,
		"health":1050,
		"defense":200,
		"resistance":{"fire":1.5, "death":0.5, "electricity":1.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0}
	},
	"militaryCasematYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"militaryCasematYard.png",
				   "file100":"militaryCasematYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"military barracks",
				"FR":"baraquement militaire",
				"JP":"軍用住宅"},
		"description":{"EN":"Military barracks are shelters for soldiers.",
					   "FR":"Le baraquement militaire sert de cantonnement aux soldats.",
					   "JP":"鋼鉄で作られた、兵士の居住区です。家主の体力及び回復速度を向上させる他、屋内で休むことも可能です。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.25}

		"defense":200,

		"steps":2

<file path="steamAge/characters/landResources/landResources.js">
{
	"boar":{
		"type":"animal",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":8.5,
		"picture":{"file":"boar.png",
				   "file100":"boar100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"boar",
				"FR":"sanglier",
				"DE":"Eber",
				"JP":"猪"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"boars", "FR":"sangliers", "DE":"Ebern", "JP":"猪"},
		"description":{"EN":"Boars provide raw meat and skin.",
					   "FR":"Le sanglier fournit de la viande crue et de la peau.",
					   "DE":"Der Eber, einst getötet bietet sein kadaver Rohes Fleisch und Tierhaut.",
					   "JP":"死体から生皮と生肉を入手することができます。"},
		"rate":10,
		"build":{
			"buildable":"all",
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":45},
			"sound":"soundPlant",
			"bonusSkill":"zoology",
			"xpSkill":{"zoology":45},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":45},
			"prebuild":{"id":"cage", "time":22.5, "anim":"pop"}
		},
		"width":48,
		"height":48,
		"health":150,
		"defense":100,
		"speed":6,
		"death":{
			"build":{
				"name":"boarCarcass",
				"quantity":1
			}
		}
	},
	"boarCarcass":{
		"type":"landRessource",
		"picture":{"file":"boarCarcass.png",
				   "file100":"boarCarcass100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"boar carcass",
				"FR":"carcasse de sanglier",
				"DE":"Eberkadaver",
				"JP":"猪の死体"},
		"description":{"EN":"Boar carcasses provide raw meat and skin.",
					   "FR":"La caracasse de sanglier fournit de la viande crue et de la peau.",
					   "DE":"Eberkadaver sorgen für rohes Fleisch und Haut.",
					   "JP":"生皮と生肉を入手することができます。"},
		"quantity":30,
		"produce":[{
				"time":1,
				"gainRessource":{"rawMeat":1, "animalSkins":1},
				"sound":"soundVegetable",
				"anim":"shake",
				"bonusSkill":"hunting",
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":2},
				"xpSkill":{"hunting":2},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
			}],
		"width":32,
		"height":32
	},
	"coalOre":{
		"type":"landRessource",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"no":13,
		"picture":{"file":"coalOre.png",
				   "file100":"coalOre100.atf"},
		"icon":"rock",
		"name":{"EN":"coal ore",
				"FR":"minerai de charbon",
				"JP":"石炭鉱石"},
		"description":{"EN":"Coal ores provide coal to manufacture steel.",
					   "FR":"Le minerai de charbon fournit du charbon pour fabriquer de l'acier.",
					   "JP":"鋼鉄などに用いる石炭を入手することができます。"},
		"rate":1,
		"build":{
			"buildable":"all",
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":45},
			"sound":"soundPlant",
			"bonusSkill":"prospecting",
			"xpSkill":{"prospecting":45},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":45},
			"prebuild":{"id":"coalPebble", "time":68, "anim":"pop"}
		},
		"quantity":14,
		"produce":[{
				"time":2.5,
				"gainRessource":{"coal":1},
				"sound":"soundMineral",
				"anim":"shake",
				"bonusSkill":"mining",
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":5},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":5},
				"xpSkill":{"mining":5},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
			}],
		"width":32,
		"height":32
	},
	"coalPebble":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"coalPebble.png",
				   "file100":"coalPebble100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"coal deposit",
				"FR":"gisement de charbon",
				"JP":"石炭鉱床"},
		"description":{"EN":"The coal deposit will soon become a coal ore.",
					   "FR":"Ce gisement de charbon va bientôt devenir un minerai de charbon.",
					   "JP":"しばらくすると石炭鉱石になります。"},
		"width":32,
		"height":32
	},
	"cow":{
		"type":"animal",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":8.5,
		"picture":{"file":"cow.png",
				   "file100":"cow100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"cow",
				"FR":"vache",
				"DE":"Kuh",
				"JP":"乳牛"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"cows", "FR":"vaches", "DE":"Kühe", "JP":"乳牛"},
		"description":{"EN":"Cows provide milk.",
					   "FR":"La vache fournit du lait.",
					   "DE":"Die Kuh liefert Milch.",
					   "JP":"牛乳を入手することができます。"},
		"rate":0,
		"build":{

				   "file100":"stoneJavelinMissile100.atf"},

		"speed":14,

		"frames":3

}

<file path="steamAge/characters/playables/astalans/astalan.js">
{
	"astalanM":{
		"type":"playable",
		"no":16,
		"pictures":[{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps", "JP":"体"}, "folder":"bodiesM/", "colors":[14736347,10523532,9338992,7033419,5063748,13421772,10066329,6710886,16777215,11913169,6195902,16377229,14066502,10119711]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages", "JP":"顔"}, "folder":"facesM/"}},
					{"clothes":{"visible":false}},
					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"astalan",
				"FR":"astalan",
				"DE":"astalan",
				"JP":"アスタラン"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"astalans",
					  "FR":"astalans",
					  "DE":"astalans",
					  "JP":"アスタラン"},
		"description":{"EN":"The Astalans are ancient humans who have transferred their souls into artificial golems, in order to become immortal. Their body are made of stone, iron, gold or even crystal. They are very resistant but also very slow.\nThe Astalans have lost everything that made them human beings. They are above all rational and have forgotten what feelings were.\nThey can not understand the behaviour of living beings and prefer to live among themselves, isolated from the world.\n\nAs mineral creatures, they are experts in all materials. They are extremely specialised in golem construction. They are less skilled in traditional crafting.\n\nThis race is recommended for players who want to specialise in this specific area.",
					   "FR":"Les Astalans sont d'anciens humains qui ont transféré leur âme dans un golem artificiel afin de devenir immortels. Leur corps peut être fait de pierre, de fer, d'or ou même de cristal. Ils sont naturellement très résistants, mais aussi très lents.\n\nes Astalans ont perdu tout ce qui faisait d'eux des êtres humains. Ils sont avant tout rationnels et ont oublié ce qu'étaient les sentiments. Ils n'arrivent pas à comprendre le comportement des êtres vivants et préfèrent vivre entre eux, isolés du monde.\n\nÉtant des créatures minérales, ils sont experts dans tous les matériaux. Ils sont extrêmement spécialisés dans la construction des golems. Ils sont moins habiles dans l'artisanat traditionnel.\n\nCette race est recommandée aux joueurs qui veulent se spécialiser dans ce domaine précis.",
					   "JP":"アスタランは、不死を得るためゴーレムの体にその精神を移し替えた太古の人類です。石や鉄、黄金や水晶でできたその体は強固である代わりに、動きは非常に緩慢です。\n既にかつての人間性は失われており、感情を忘れ非常に合理的となった彼らは、生物の行動を理解できず、今では世間から離れ生活を営んでいます。\n\n鉱物であるため、すべての素材の扱いに優れ、ゴーレム工学にも精通していますが、一般的な工芸は得意ではありません。\n\n特定の領域に精通した専門家向けの種族です。"},
		"playable":"completeMissions-",
		"sex":"M",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"scale":1.2,
		
		"health":120,
		"stamina":80,
		"mana":100,
		
		"attack":100, "attackEffect":"shock",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,
		"resistance":{"poison":0},
		
		"strength":120,
		"endurance":120,
		"address":80,
		"rapidity":80,
		"intelligence":120,
		"willpower":100,
		"charisma":80,
		
		"forestry":-20,			"lithology":20,
		"picking":-20,			"stonecutting":20,
		"woodcutting":-20,		"sculpting":20,
		"zoology":-20,			"prospecting":20,
		"hunting":-20,			"mining":20,
		"tanning":-20,			"metalSmelting":20,
		"sawing":-20,			"weaponsForging":20,
		
		"farming":-20,			"crossbowsForging":20,
		"harvesting":-20,		"armorsForging":20,
		"bakery":-20,			"gemmology":20,
		"bowsCrafting":-20,		"apothecary":20,
		
		"breeding":-20,			"enchantment":20,
		"sheepShearing":-20,	"goldsmithery":20,
		
		"lightWeapons":-20,		"bluntWeapons":20,
		"edgedWeapons":-20,		"axes":20,
		"throwingWeapons":-20,	"polearms":20,
		
		"bows":-20,				"shields":20,
		"shootingWeapons":-20,	"lightArmors":20,
		"firearms":-20,			"mediumArmors":20,
		
		"clothes":-20,			"heavyArmors":20,
		
		"shamanicMagic":-20,	"repressiveMagic":20,
		"druidicMagic":-20,		"redemptiveMagic":20,
		"pyrotechnicMagic":-20,
		"conjuration":-20,
		
								"golemology":100,
								"fortification":20,
							
		"butchery":-20,
		"leatherwork":-20,
		"chaoticMagic":-20,
		"necromanticMagic":-20,
		"throwingWeapons":-20,	"tools":20,
		
								"toolsForging":20,
							
		"training":-20,
		
		"speed":5,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けてくれ！", "私を助けてくれ！", "お願いだから助けてくれ！", "援護が必要だ！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かる。", "本当にありがとう！", "恩に着る！", "素晴らしいな！", "これはいいな。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くぞ！", "さあ行こう！", "来てくれ！", "付いてこい！", "進め！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃！", "蹴散らせ！", "突撃！"]
			},
			"destroy":{
				"EN":["Destroy this.", "Raze this."],
				"FR":["Détruisez ça.", "Rasez ça."],
				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],
				"JP":["あれを破壊しろ！", "あれを打ち壊してやれ！"]
			}
		}
	}
}
</file>

{
	"darkElfM":{
		"type":"playable",
		"no":12,
		"pictures":[{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/bodiesM/", "linkColor":"ears", "colors":[3293508, 11700565, 7629943]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/facesM/"}},
					{"shoes":{"name":{"EN":"shoes", "FR":"chaussures"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/shoesM/", "colors":[16777215, 6262964, 3624028, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 13155208, 7232851, 3552822, 13395456, 10240062, 13411742, 3626049, 7957675]}},
					{"clothes":{"name":{"EN":"clothes", "FR":"vêtements"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/clothesM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641, 255, 16711680, 65280, 16776960, 0, 16777215, 16711935, 65535]}},
					{"belts":{"name":{"EN":"belts", "FR":"ceintures"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/beltsM/"}},
					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"hairs":{"name":{"EN":"hair", "FR":"cheveux"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/hairsM/", "colors":[16777215, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504]}},
					{"ears":{"name":{"EN":"ears", "FR":"oreilles"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/ears/elvesM/", "linkColor":"bodies", "colors":[3293508, 11700565, 7629943]}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"dark elf",
				"FR":"elfe noir",
				"JP":"ダークエルフ"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"dark elfs",
					  "FR":"elfes noirs",
					  "JP":"ダークエルフ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Dark elves live in the depths of the Earth. They have the same shape as the other elves, but they have a dark skin and light hair.\nGenerally, dark elves are evil and want to destroy the people of the surface. But there are renegades  who rejected these doctrines of the underworld and joined humans. Because of their origins, they are often rejected and have issues integrating.\nDark elves are gifted in black and destructive magic. They have more difficulty in learning other magic.\nPlayers who choose a dark elf will have a good offensive character and can focus on fighting alone.",
					   "FR":"Les elfes noirs vivent dans les profondeurs de la Terre. Ils ont la même silhouette que les autres elfes, mais ont la peau sombre et les cheveux clairs.\nGénéralement, les elfes noirs sont maléfiques et ne songent qu'à anéantir les peuples de la surface. Mais il existe des renégats qui ont rejeté les doctrines du monde souterrain et rejoint le peuple humain. A cause de leurs origines, ils sont souvent rejetés et ont du mal à s'intégrer.\nLes elfes noirs sont doués en magie noire et en magie destructrice. Ils ont plus de mal à assimiler les autres types de magie.\nLes joueurs qui choisissent un elfe noir auront  un bon personnage offensif et porté sur le combat en solitaire.",
					   "JP":"ダークエルフは地下深くに住まう種族で、他のエルフ種と同じ形をしていますが、黒い肌と明るい髪が特徴です。\n一般的にダークエルフは邪悪で地上のものの破壊を望んでいます。その方針に反旗を翻し、人間たちへと合流しようとするものもいますが、度々その出自から拒否され問題となることもあります。\n死霊術と破壊魔術に優れていますが、その他の魔術の習熟はより難しいです。\n攻撃的かつ単身で戦うことが可能なキャラクター向けの種族です。"},
		"playable":"completeMissions-",
		"sex":"M",
		"otherSex":"darkElfF",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"scale":0.9,
		"health":100,
		"stamina":80,
		"mana":120,
		"attack":100, "attackEffect":"default",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,
		"resistance":{"light":1.2, "death":0.8},
		"strength":100,
		"endurance":100,
		"address":110,
		"rapidity":100,
		"intelligence":120,
		"willpower":80,
		"charisma":80,
		"chaoticMagic":20,
		"conjuration":20,
		"druidicMagic":-20,
		"necromanticMagic":20,
		"pyrotechnicMagic":20,
		"redemptiveMagic":-20,
		"repressiveMagic":-20,
		"shamanicMagic":-20,
		"shootingWeapons":20,
		"speed":5,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けてくれ！", "俺を助けてくれ！", "お願いだから助けてくれ！", "援護が必要だ！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かる。", "本当にありがとう！", "恩に着る！", "素晴らしいな！", "これはいいな。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くぞ！", "さあ行こう！", "来てくれ！", "付いてこい！", "進め！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃！", "蹴散らせ！", "突撃！"]
			},
			"destroy":{
				"EN":["Destroy this.", "Raze this."],
				"FR":["Détruisez ça.", "Rasez ça."],
				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],
				"JP":["あれを破壊しろ！", "あれを打ち壊してやれ！"]
			}
		}
	},

But there are renegades  who rejected these doctrines of the underworld and joined humans. Because of their origins, they are often rejected and have issues integrating.\nDark elves are gifted in black and destructive magic. They have more difficulty in learning other magic.\nPlayers who choose a dark elf will have a good offensive character and can focus on fighting alone.",
					   "FR":"Les elfes noirs vivent dans les profondeurs de la Terre. Ils ont la même silhouette que les autres elfes, mais ont la peau sombre et les cheveux clairs.\nGénéralement, les elfes noirs sont maléfiques et ne songent qu'à anéantir les peuples de la surface. Mais il existe des renégats qui ont rejeté les doctrines du monde souterrain et rejoint le peuple humain. A cause de leurs origines, ils sont souvent rejetés et ont du mal à s'intégrer.\nLes elfes noirs sont doués en magie noire et en magie destructrice. Ils ont plus de mal à assimiler les autres types de magie.\nLes joueurs qui choisissent un elfe noir auront  un bon personnage offensif et porté sur le combat en solitaire.",
					   "JP":"ダークエルフは地下深くに住まう種族で、他のエルフ種と同じ形をしていますが、黒い肌と明るい髪が特徴です。\n一般的にダークエルフは邪悪で地上のものの破壊を望んでいます。その方針に反旗を翻し、人間たちへと合流しようとするものもいますが、度々その出自から拒否され問題となることもあります。\n死霊術と破壊魔術に優れていますが、その他の魔術の習熟はより難しいです。\n攻撃的かつ単身で戦うことが可能なキャラクター向けの種族です。"},

		"type":"playable",
		"no":14,
		"pictures":[{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/bodiesM/", "linkColor":"ears", "colors":[16639702, 16636065, 16573107, 16105113, 14083573]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/facesM/"}},
					{"shoes":{"name":{"EN":"shoes", "FR":"chaussures"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/shoesM/", "colors":[16777215, 6262964, 3624028, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 13155208, 7232851, 3552822, 13395456, 10240062, 13411742, 3626049, 7957675]}},
					{"clothes":{"name":{"EN":"clothes", "FR":"vêtements"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/clothesM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641, 255, 16711680, 65280, 16776960, 0, 16777215, 16711935, 65535]}},
					{"belts":{"name":{"EN":"belts", "FR":"ceintures"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/beltsM/"}},
					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"hairs":{"name":{"EN":"hair", "FR":"cheveux"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/hairsM/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"ears":{"name":{"EN":"ears", "FR":"oreilles"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/ears/elvesM/", "linkColor":"bodies", "colors":[16639702, 16636065, 16573107, 16105113, 14083573]}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"high elf",
				"FR":"haut elfe",
				"JP":"ダークエルフ"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"high elves",
					  "FR":"hauts elfes",
					  "JP":"ハイエルフ"},
		"description":{"EN":"The high elves come from the legendary island of Ellesium. They are taller and slender than the other elves and their skin is paler.\nThe high elves worship the goddess of Ellesia and consider themselves as her direct offspring. Thus, they claim to be demi-gods and consider themselves superior to other races.\nThey are smarter and more skilled in magic but are less skilled in manual work. They think that their inability to do ungrateful tasks is also a proof of their superiority.\nA high elf is a good choice if you want to play a pure magician, but it will be harder for him to manufacture the rest of his equipment.",
					   "FR":"Les hauts elfes sont originaires de l'île légendaire d'Ellesium. Il sont plus grands et élancés que les autres elfes. Leur teint de peau est plus pâle.\nLes haut elfes vénèrent la déesse d'Ellesia et se considèrent comme ses descendants directs. De ce fait, ils prétendent être des demi-dieux et se considèrent comme supérieurs aux autres races.\nIls sont plus intelligents et doués en magie, mais sont moins adroits pour les travaux manuels. Ils considèrent que leur inaptitude aux tâches ingrates est également la preuve de leur supériorité.\nUn haut elfe constitue un bon choix pour créer un magicien pur. Par contre, il sera moins apte à se fabriquer le reste de son équipement.",
					   "JP":"ハイエルフは伝説の島、エレシウムから来ています。 彼らは他のエルフよりも背が高くて細いです、そして、彼らの皮膚はより薄いです。\nハイエルフはエルシアの女神を崇拝し、自分を直接の子孫と見なします。 したがって、彼らは半神であると主張し、他の種族よりも優れていると考えています。\n彼らはより賢く、魔法に精通しているが、手作業にはあまり精通していない。 彼らは恩知らずな仕事をすることができないことも彼らの優位性の証拠だと考えています。\nハイエルフは、純粋な魔術師をプレイしたい場合には良い選択ですが、彼が他の装備を製造するのはより困難です。"},
		"sex":"M",
		"otherSex":"highElF",

		"height":48,

		"health":80,
		"stamina":80,

		"pictures":[{"back":{"name":{"EN":"back", "FR":"dos"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/backF/", "visible":false,"forbidden":["mary.png"],"colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"cloakB":{"visible":false}},
					{"bodies":{"name":{"EN":"bodies", "FR":"corps"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/bodiesF/", "linkColor":"ears", "colors":[16639702, 16636065, 16573107, 16105113, 14083573]}},
					{"faces":{"name":{"EN":"faces", "FR":"visages"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/facesF/"}},
					{"shoes":{"name":{"EN":"shoes", "FR":"chaussures"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/shoesF/", "colors":[16777215, 6262964, 3624028, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 13155208, 7232851, 3552822, 13395456, 10240062, 13411742, 3626049, 7957675]}},
					{"clothes":{"name":{"EN":"clothes", "FR":"vêtements"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/clothesF/", "colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641, 255, 16711680, 65280, 16776960, 0, 16777215, 16711935, 65535]}},
					{"belts":{"name":{"EN":"belts", "FR":"ceintures"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/beltsF/"}},
					{"cloakF":{"visible":false}},
					{"hairs":{"name":{"EN":"hair", "FR":"cheveux"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/hairsF/", "linkShape":"back", "linkColor":"back","forbidden":["mary.png"],"colors":[16777215, 5548004, 2376796, 12632256, 14737632, 8421504, 16112758, 8017215, 3552822, 16225308, 10362395, 15768972, 29238, 7559641]}},
					{"ears":{"name":{"EN":"ears", "FR":"oreilles"}, "folder":"../../../data/characters/playables/ears/elvesF/", "linkColor":"bodies", "colors":[16639702, 16636065, 16573107, 16105113, 14083573]}},
					{"hat":{"visible":false}}],
		"name":{"EN":"high elf",
				"FR":"haut elfe",
				"JP":"ダークエルフ"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"high elves",
					  "FR":"hauts elfes",
					  "JP":"ハイエルフ"},
		"description":{"EN":"The high elves come from the legendary island of Ellesium. They are taller and slender than the other elves and their skin is paler.\nThe high elves worship the goddess of Ellesia and consider themselves as her direct offspring. Thus, they claim to be demi-gods and consider themselves superior to other races.\nThey are smarter and more skilled in magic but are less skilled in manual work. They think that their inability to do ungrateful tasks is also a proof of their superiority.\nA high elf is a good choice if you want to play a pure magician, but it will be harder for him to manufacture the rest of his equipment.",
					   "FR":"Les hauts elfes sont originaires de l'île légendaire d'Ellesium. Il sont plus grands et élancés que les autres elfes. Leur teint de peau est plus pâle.\nLes haut elfes vénèrent la déesse d'Ellesia et se considèrent comme ses descendants directs. De ce fait, ils prétendent être des demi-dieux et se considèrent comme supérieurs aux autres races.\nIls sont plus intelligents et doués en magie, mais sont moins adroits pour les travaux manuels. Ils considèrent que leur inaptitude aux tâches ingrates est également la preuve de leur supériorité.\nUn haut elfe constitue un bon choix pour créer un magicien pur. Par contre, il sera moins apte à se fabriquer le reste de son équipement.",
					   "JP":"ハイエルフは伝説の島、エレシウムから来ています。 彼らは他のエルフよりも背が高くて細いです、そして、彼らの皮膚はより薄いです。\nハイエルフはエルシアの女神を崇拝し、自分を直接の子孫と見なします。 したがって、彼らは半神であると主張し、他の種族よりも優れていると考えています。\n彼らはより賢く、魔法に精通しているが、手作業にはあまり精通していない。 彼らは恩知らずな仕事をすることができないことも彼らの優位性の証拠だと考えています。\nハイエルフは、純粋な魔術師をプレイしたい場合には良い選択ですが、彼が他の装備を製造するのはより困難です。"},
		"sex":"F",
		"otherSex":"highElfM",
		"width":32,
		"height":48,
		"scaleY":1.1,
		"health":80,
		"stamina":80,
		"mana":140,
		"attack":100, "attackEffect":"default",
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"defense":100,
		
		"strength":90,
		"endurance":90,
		"address":90,
		"rapidity":90,
		"intelligence":120,
		"willpower":120,
		"charisma":100,
		
		"building":-20,
		"repairing":-20,
		"fortification":-20,
		
		"picking":-20,
		"woodcutting":-20,
		"hunting":-20,
		"tanning":-20,
		"sawing":-20,
		"stonecutting":-20,
		"sculpting":-20,
		"harvesting":-20,
		"bakery":-20,
		"bowsCrafting":-20,
		"alcohols":-20,
		"sheepShearing":-20,
		"weaving":-20,
		"sewing":-20,
		"shoemaking":-20,
		"mining":-20,
		"metalSmelting":-20,
		"weaponsForging":-20,
		"crossbowsForging":-20,
		"armorsForging":-20,
		"firearmsForging":-20,
		"butchery":-20,
		"leatherwork":-20,
		"militaryEngineering":-20,
		"toolsForging":-20,
		"powerArmorsForging":-20,
		"papermaking":-20,
		
		"gemmology":20,
		"apothecary":20,
		"enchantment":20,
		"goldsmithery":20,
		
		"magicClothes":20,
		"jewellery":20,
		"clothes":20,
		"shoes":20,
		"gloves":20,
		
		"tools":-20,
		"throwingWeapons":-20,
		"powerArmors":-20,
		"firearms":-20,
		"bows":-20,
		"polearms":-20,
		"lightWeapons":-20,
		"edgedWeapons":-20,
		"bluntWeapons":-20,
		"axes":-20,
		"shootingWeapons":-20,
		"shields":-20,
		"lightArmors":-20,
		"mediumArmors":-20,
		"heavyArmors":-20,
		
		"chaoticMagic":20,
		"conjuration":20,
		"druidicMagic":20,
		"necromanticMagic":20,
		"pyrotechnicMagic":20,
		"redemptiveMagic":20,
		"repressiveMagic":20,
		"shamanicMagic":20,
		"speed":5,
		"talk":{
			"flee":{
				"EN":["Help!", "Help me!", "Please help!", "I need help!"],
				"FR":["Au secours !", "Aidez-moi !", "À l'aide !", "J'ai besoin d'aide !"],
				"DE":["Hilfe!", "Helfen Sie mir!", "Bitte helfen!", "Brauche Hilfe!"],
				"JP":["助けて！", "私を助けて！", "お願い……助けて！", "助けて欲しいの！"]
			},
			"thank":{
				"EN":["Thanks.", "Thank you very much!", "Thanks a lot!", "Great!", "That's nice."],
				"FR":["Merci.", "Merci beaucoup.", "Trop sympa !", "Super ! Merci.", "C'est gentil."],
				"DE":["Danke.", "Danke schön.", "Vielen Dank!", "Das ist schön."],
				"JP":["助かります。", "ありがとうございます！", "感謝します！", "素敵です！", "これはいいものですね。"]
			},
			"move":{
				"EN":["Go !", "Let's go!", "Come on!", "Move!"],
				"FR":["En avant !", "Allez !", "Allez-y !", "Avancez !"],
				"DE":["Vorwärts!", "Vorangehen!", "Gehen Sie vorwärts."],
				"JP":["行くわよ！", "さあ、やるわよ！", "来て下さい！", "付いてきて！", "進軍して！"]
			},
			"attack":{
				"EN":["Attack!"],
				"FR":["À l'attaque !"],
				"DE":["Attacke!", "Onslaught!"],
				"JP":["攻撃！", "蹴散らせ！", "突撃！"]
			},
			"destroy":{
				"EN":["Destroy this.", "Raze this."],
				"FR":["Détruisez ça.", "Rasez ça."],
				"DE":["Raze dies.", "Zerstören Sie diese."],
				"JP":["あれを壊して！", "あれを潰すのよ！"]
			}
		}
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/characters/townCenters/townCenters.js">
{
	"townCenterSteamAge":{
		"type":"townCenter",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"no":5,
		"picture":{"file":"townCenterSteamAge.png",
				   "file100":"townCenterSteamAge100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"town centre",
				"FR":"hôtel de ville",
				"JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"pluralName":{"EN":"town centres",
					  "FR":"hôtels de ville",
					  "JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"description":{"EN":"The town centre allows you to move to the next age.",
					   "FR":"L'hôtel de ville vous permet de passer à l'époque suivante.",
					   "JP":"蒸気の時代のタウンセンター。周囲の敵への攻撃能力を持つ他、次の年代に進むために必要です。収穫者の雇用元や資源倉庫にもなります。鋼鉄を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"steel":300},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":3},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":3},
			"prebuild":{"id":"townCenterSteamAgeYard", "time":1.5}
		},
		"title":{"EN":"Recruit servants", "FR":"Recruter des serviteurs", "JP":"収獲者の雇用"},
		"produce":[{
				"time":0.5,
				"gainItem":{"crown":1},
				"costRessource":{"silverCoin":600}
			},{
				"time":25,
				"createCharacter":{"servantM":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"conscription",
				"costRessource":{"silverCoin":50},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":50},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":50},
				"xpSkill":{"conscription":50},
				"repeat":true
			},{
				"time":25,
				"createCharacter":{"servantF":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"conscription",
				"costRessource":{"silverCoin":50},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":50},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":50},
				"xpSkill":{"conscription":50},
				"repeat":true
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":30,
			"time":1.5,
			"costRessource":{"steel":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":3},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":3}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":2}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":240,
		"visualHeight":256,
		"health":9000,
		"attack":700, "attackTime":3, "range":600, "missile":"microMissile", "attackDY":-215, "sound":"soundRocket", "special":{"selfGuided":0.125},
		"damage":["missile", "demolition"],
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"warehouse":true
	},
	"townCenterSteamAgeYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"townCenterSteamAgeYard.png",
				   "file100":"townCenterSteamAgeYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"town centre",
				"FR":"hôtel de ville",
				"JP":"タウンセンター"},
		"description":{"EN":"The town centre allows you to move to the next age.",
					   "FR":"L'hôtel de ville vous permet de passer à l'époque suivante.",
					   "JP":"蒸気の時代のタウンセンター。周囲の敵への攻撃能力を持つ他、次の年代に進むために必要です。収穫者の雇用元や資源倉庫にもなります。鋼鉄を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":2}
		},
		"width":192,
		"height":240,
		"visualHeight":256,
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2, "poison":0},
		"steps":3
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/arsenal.js">
{
	"arsenal":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"no":20,
		"picture":{"file":"arsenal.png",
				   "file100":"arsenal100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"arsenal",
				"FR":"arsenal",
				"JP":"造兵廠"},
		"description":{"EN":"The arsenal is a workshop which allows you to manufacture firearms from cast iron and sulphur.",
					   "FR":"L'arsenal est un atelier qui vous permet de fabriquer des armes à feu à partir de lingots de fonte et de soufre.",

			"sound":"soundBuilding",

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/bakeryOven.js">
{
	"bakeryOven":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":7,

				   "file100":"bakeryOven100.atf"},

				"JP":"製パン用オーブン"},

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/butcheryWorkshop.js">
{
	"butcheryWorkshop":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":6.5,
		"picture":{"file":"butcheryWorkshop.png",
				   "file100":"butcheryWorkshop100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"butchery workshop",
				"FR":"atelier de boucherie",
				"JP":"精肉所"},
		"description":{"EN":"The butchery workshop allows you to cook meat.",
					   "FR":"L'atelier de boucherie permet de cuisiner de la viande.",
					   "JP":"生肉を調理することが可能です。厚板を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"plank":10},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":1},
			"prebuild":{"id":"butcheryWorkshopYard", "time":0.5}
		},
		"quantity":200,
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I cannot find any butchery workshop."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je ne trouve pas d'atelier de boucherie."]},
				"JP":{"D":["精肉所が見当たらないな。"]}},
		"title":{"EN":"Cook meat",
				 "FR":"Cuisiner de la viande",
				 "JP":"肉の調理"},
		"produce":[{
				"time":1,
				"gainItem":{"steak":1},
				"sound":"soundPick",
				"bonusSkill":"butchery",
				"costRessource":{"rawMeat":1, "wood":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":2},
				"xpSkill":{"butchery":2},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-2
			},{
				"time":1,
				"gainItem":{"sausage":1},
				"sound":"soundPick",
				"bonusSkill":"butchery",
				"costRessource":{"rawMeat":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":2},
				"xpSkill":{"butchery":2},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-2
			},{
				"time":1,
				"gainItem":{"boiledMeat":1},
				"sound":"soundPick",
				"bonusSkill":"butchery",

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/distillery.js">
{
	"distillery":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"no":12,
		"picture":{"file":"distillery.png",
				   "file100":"distillery100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"distillery",
				"FR":"distillerie",
				"JP":"蒸溜所"},
		"description":{"EN":"The distillery is a workshop which allows to manufacture alcohol.",
					   "FR":"La distillerie permet de fabriquer de l'alcool.",
					   "JP":"各種の素材から酒類の蒸溜が可能です。鋳鉄を用いて建築することができます。"},

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":2},

			}],

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/foundry.js">
{
	"foundry":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"no":13,
		"picture":{"file":"foundry.png",
				   "file100":"foundry100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"foundry",
				"FR":"fonderie",
				"JP":"鋳造所"},
		"description":{"EN":"The foundry is a workshop which allows you to manufacture metal bars from minerals.",
					   "FR":"La fonderie permet de fabriquer des lingots de métal à partir de minerais.",
					   "JP":"原鉄などの鉱物から各種金属棒の鋳造が可能です。切石を用いて建築することができます。"},

				"FR":{"D":["Je ne trouve pas de fonderie."]},
				"JP":{"D":["鋳造所が見当たらないな。"]}},

				 "FR":"Fondre des lingots de métal",

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":5},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":5},
				"xpSkill":{"metalSmelting":5},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
			},{
				"time":5,
				"gainRessource":{"steel":2},
				"sound":"soundIronSteam",
				"bonusSkill":"metalSmelting",
				"costRessource":{"iron":1, "coal":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":10},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":10},
				"xpSkill":{"metalSmelting":10},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-2
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":15,
			"time":1,
			"costRessource":{"freeStone":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":2},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":2}
		},
		"death":{

		},
		"width":64,
		"height":64,
		"health":150,
		"defense":200,
		"resistance":{"death":0.5, "explosion":2}
	}
}

				   "file100":"ironworksWorkshopYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"ironwork workshop",
				"FR":"atelier de ferronnerie",
				"JP":"鉄製品工房"},
		"description":{"EN":"The ironwork workshop allows you to manufacture tools.",
					   "FR":"L'atelier de ferronnerie vous permet de fabriquer des outils.",
					   "JP":"鋳鉄などを用いて道具の製造が可能です。切石を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.25}
		},
		"width":41,
		"height":80,
		"defense":200,
		"resistance":{"death":0.5, "demolition":2},
		"steps":0
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/market.js">
{
	"market":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":10,

				   "file100":"market100.atf"},

				"FR":"marché",
				"JP":"市場"},
		"description":{"EN":"The market allows you to buy and sell resources.",
					   "FR":"Le marché permet d'acheter et de vendre des ressources.",
					   "JP":"資源の購入や売却のほか、アイテムの売却も可能です。厚板と織物を用いて建築することができます。"},

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/paperMill.js">
{
	"paperMill":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"no":19,
		"picture":{"file":"paperMill.png",
				   "file100":"paperMill100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"paper mill",
				"FR":"atelier de papeterie",
				"JP":"製紙場"},
		"description":{"EN":"The paper mill allows you to manufacture paper from wood or wool.",
					   "FR":"L'atelier de papeterie permet de fabriquer du papier à partir de bois ou de laine.",
					   "JP":"毛糸もしくは木材から紙の製造が可能です。厚板を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"plank":15},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":1},
			"prebuild":{"id":"paperMillYard", "time":0.5}
		},
		"quantity":100,
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I cannot find any paper mill."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je ne trouve pas d'atelier de papeterie."]},
				"JP":{"D":["製紙場が見当たらないな。"]}},
		"title":{"EN":"Manufacture paper",
				 "FR":"Fabriquer du papier",
				 "JP":"紙の製造"},
		"produce":[{
				"time":1,
				"gainRessource":{"paper":1},
				"sound":"soundPaper",
				"bonusSkill":"papermaking",
				"costRessource":{"wool":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":2},
				"xpSkill":{"papermaking":2},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
			},{
				"time":1,
				"gainRessource":{"paper":1},
				"sound":"soundPaper",
				"bonusSkill":"papermaking",
				"age":"steamAge",
				"costRessource":{"wood":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":2},
				"xpSkill":{"papermaking":2},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":10,
			"time":0.5,
			"costRessource":{"plank":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":1}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction"}
		},
		"width":64,
		"height":64,
		"health":150,
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"fire":2, "death":0.5, "demolition":2}
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/powerArmorsWorkshop.js">
{
	"powerArmorsWorkshop":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"no":22,
		"picture":{"file":"powerArmorsWorkshop.png",
				   "file100":"powerArmorsWorkshop100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"power armours workshop",
				"FR":"atelier d'armures assistées",
				"JP":"パワーアーマー工房"},
		"description":{"EN":"This workshop allows you to manufacture steam-powered armours.",
					   "FR":"Cet atelier permet de fabriquer des armures assistées fonctionnant à la vapeur.",
					   "JP":"鋼鉄を用いて蒸気駆動のパワーアーマーの製造が可能です。鋼鉄を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"steel":50},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":3},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":3},
			"prebuild":{"id":"powerArmorsWorkshopYard", "time":1.5}
		},
		"quantity":100,
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I cannot find any power armours workshop."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je ne trouve pas d'atelier d'armures assistées."]},
				"JP":{"D":["パワーアーマー工房が見当たらないな。"]}},
		"title":{"EN":"Manufacture power armours",
				 "FR":"Fabriquer des armures assistées",
				 "JP":"パワーアーマーの製造"},
		"produce":[{
				"time":50,
				"gainItem":{"mountWorkerPowerArmor":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"powerArmorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"steel":50},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":50},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":50},
				"xpSkill":{"powerArmorsForging":50},
				"quantity":-5
			},{
				"time":50,
				"gainItem":{"mountPredatorPowerArmor":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"powerArmorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"steel":50},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":50},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":50},
				"xpSkill":{"powerArmorsForging":50},
				"quantity":-5
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":8,
			"time":1.5,
			"costRessource":{"steel":3},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":3},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":3}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction"}
		},
		"width":96,
		"height":90,
		"health":400,
		"defense":200,
		"resistance":{"death":0.5, "demolition":2}
	},
	"powerArmorsWorkshopYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"powerArmorsWorkshopYard.png",
				   "file100":"powerArmorsWorkshopYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"power armours workshop",
				"FR":"atelier d'armures assistées",
				"JP":"パワーアーマー工房"},
		"description":{"EN":"This workshop allows you to manufacture steam-powered armours.",
					   "FR":"Cet atelier permet de fabriquer des armures assistées fonctionnant à la vapeur.",
					   "JP":"鋼鉄を用いて蒸気駆動のパワーアーマーの製造が可能です。鋼鉄を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction"}
		},
		"width":96,
		"height":90,

		"resistance":{"death":0.5, "demolition":2},
		"steps":0
	}
}

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/stable.js">
{
	"stable":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":9.5,
		"picture":{"file":"stable.png",
				   "file100":"stable100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"stables",
				"FR":"écurie",
				"JP":"厩舎"},
		"description":{"EN":"The stables allow to tame horses.",
					   "FR":"L'écurie vous permet de dresser des chevaux.",
					   "JP":"小麦などを用いて馬の育成が可能です。厚板を用いて建築することができます。"},

			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":50},

			"costRessource":{"plank":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":1}
		},

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/tanneryWorkshop.js">
{
	"tanneryWorkshop":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"woodenAge",
		"no":1,
		"picture":{"file":"tanneryWorkshop.png",
				   "file100":"tanneryWorkshop100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"tannery workshop",
				"FR":"atelier de tannerie",
				"JP":"製革所"},
		"description":{"EN":"The tannery workshop allows you to manufacture leather from animal skin.",
					   "FR":"L'atelier de tannerie permet de fabriquer du cuir à partir de peaux animales.",
					   "JP":"生皮からなめし革や羊皮紙の製造ができる他、一部革衣類の作成も可能です。木材を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"wood":5},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":1},
			"prebuild":{"id":"tanneryWorkshopYard", "time":0.5}
		},
		"quantity":100,
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I cannot find any tannery workshop."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je ne trouve pas d'atelier de tannerie."]},
				"JP":{"D":["製革所が見当たらないな。"]}},
		"title":{"EN":"Tan leather clothes",
				 "FR":"Tanner des vêtements de cuir",
				 "JP":"革製品の製造"},
		"produce":[{
				"time":0.5,
				"gainRessource":{"leather":1},
				"sound":"soundPick",
				"bonusSkill":"tanning",
				"costRessource":{"animalSkins":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":1},
				"xpSkill":{"tanning":1},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
			},{
				"time":1,
				"gainRessource":{"parchment":1},
				"sound":"soundPick",
				"bonusSkill":"tanning",
				"costRessource":{"animalSkins":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":2},
				"xpSkill":{"tanning":2},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-2
			},{
				"time":1,
				"gainItem":{"furShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"leather":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":2},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":2},
				"quantity":-2
			},{
				"time":3,
				"gainItem":{"furCoat":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"leather":6},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":6},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":6},

				"quantity":-6
			},{

				"gainItem":{"leatherArmor":1},

				"costRessource":{"leather":9},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":9},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":9},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":9},
				"quantity":-9
			},{
				"time":1.5,
				"gainItem":{"leatherCap":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"leather":3},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":3},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":3},
				"quantity":-3
			},{
				"time":6,
				"gainItem":{"studdedLeatherArmor":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"leather":9, "castIron":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":12},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":12},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":12},
				"quantity":-12
			},{
				"time":3,

				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"leather":3, "castIron":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":6},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":6},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":6},
				"quantity":-6
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":2,
			"time":0.5,
			"costRessource":{"wood":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":1}
		},

}

<file path="steamAge/characters/workshops/well.js">
{
	"well":{
		"type":"workshop",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":5.5,
		"picture":{"file":"well.png",
				   "file100":"well100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"well",
				"FR":"puits",
				"JP":"井戸"},
		"description":{"EN":"The well allows you to draw drinkable water.",
					   "FR":"Le puits permet de puiser de l'eau potable.",
					   "JP":"飲用可能な水を汲むことが可能です。厚板と切石を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"build":{
			"chooseLocation":true,
			"buildable":"all",
			"costRessource":{"plank":10, "freeStone":10},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"building",
			"xpSkill":{"building":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":1},
			"prebuild":{"id":"wellYard", "time":0.75}
		},
		"quantity":250,
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I cannot find any well."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je ne trouve pas de puits."]},
				"JP":{"D":["井戸が見当たらないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"time":1,
				"gainRessource":{"water":2},
				"sound":"soundWater",
				"bonusSkill":"picking",
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":2},
				"xpSkill":{"picking":2},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
			}],
		"repair":{
			"health":20,
			"time":0.5,
			"costRessource":{"plank":1, "freeStone":1},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
			"sound":"soundBuilding",
			"bonusSkill":"repairing",
			"xpSkill":{"repairing":1},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":1}
		},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.25}
		},
		"width":48,
		"height":96,
		"health":200,
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"fire":1.5, "death":0.5, "demolition":2}
	},
	"wellYard":{
		"type":"prebuild",
		"picture":{"file":"wellYard.png",
				   "file100":"wellYard100.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"well",
				"FR":"puits",
				"JP":"井戸"},
		"description":{"EN":"The well allows you to draw drinkable water.",
					   "FR":"Le puits permet de puiser de l'eau potable.",
					   "JP":"飲用可能な水を汲むことが可能です。厚板と切石を用いて建築することができます。"},
		"death":{
			"effect":{"name":"destruction", "scale":1.25}
		},
		"width":48,
		"height":96,
		"defense":150,
		"resistance":{"fire":1.5, "death":0.5, "demolition":2},
		"steps":0
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/factions/factions.js">
{
	"darkElves":{
		"type":"faction",
		"no":2,
		"name":{"EN":"dark elves",
				"FR":"elfes noirs",
				"DE":"Dunkelelfen",
				"JP":"ダークエルフ族"},
		"description":{"EN":"",
					   "FR":"",
					   "DE":"",
					   "JP":""},
		"races":["darkElfM","darkElfF"],
		"ais":["AI_darkElf", "AI_darkKnight","AI_necromancer"],
		"townCenters":["townCenterWoodenAge", "townCenterStoneAge", "townCenterIronAge", "townCenterEtherAge", "townCenterGoldenAge", "townCenterSteamAge", "townCenterRadiumAge"],
		"aiKings":["AI_king"]
	},
	"astalans":{
		"type":"faction",
		"no":3,
		"name":{"EN":"astalans",
				"FR":"astalans",
				"DE":"astalans",
				"JP":"アスタラン族"},
		"description":{"EN":"",
					   "FR":"",
					   "DE":"",
					   "JP":""},
		"races":["astalanM"],
		"ais":["AI_astalan", "AI_artilleryman","AI_Golemologue","AI_miner","AI_iceMage","AI_pikeman","AI_tank"],
		"townCenters":["townCenterWoodenAge", "townCenterStoneAge", "townCenterIronAge", "townCenterEtherAge", "townCenterGoldenAge", "townCenterSteamAge", "townCenterRadiumAge"],
		"aiKings":["AI_king"]
	},
	"beastFaction":{
		"type":"faction",
		"no":4,
		"name":{"EN":"beasts",
				"FR":"bêtes",
				"DE":"tiere",
				"JP":"獣群"},
		"description":{"EN":"The beasts are the nation of the animals and the beastmen.",
					   "FR":"Les bêtes représentent la nation des animaux et des hommes-bêtes.",
					   "DE":"Die Tiere repräsentieren die Nation von Tieren und Tiertieren.",
					   "JP":"動物たちと獣人の勢力です。"},
		"dungeon":"beastDungeon",
		"races":["bat","rat","wolf","minotaur","blackBear","werewolf"]
	},
	"undeadFaction":{
		"type":"faction",
		"no":5,
		"name":{"EN":"undead",
				"FR":"morts-vivants",
				"DE":"Undead",
				"JP":"不死群"},
		"description":{"EN":"The undead represent the nation of the skeletons, the zombies and the ghosts.",
					   "FR":"Les morts-vivants représentent la nation des squelettes, des zombies et des fantômes.",
					   "DE":"Die Untoten stellen die Nation der Skelette, Zombies und Geister dar.",
					   "JP":"スケルトンやゾンビ、幽霊などで構成された勢力です。"},
		"dungeon":"undeadDungeon",
		"races":["bat","blackKnight","skeleton","zombie","reaper","mummy"]
	},
	"elves":{
		"type":"faction",
		"no":6,
		"name":{"EN":"elves",
				"FR":"elfes",
				"DE":"elfen",
				"JP":"エルフ"},
		"description":{"EN":"",
					   "FR":"",
					   "DE":"",
					   "JP":""},
		"races":["elfeM","elfeF"],
		"ais":["AI_archer", "AI_breeder", "AI_druid", "AI_forester", "AI_iceMage", "AI_ranger"],
		"townCenters":["townCenterWoodenAge", "townCenterStoneAge", "townCenterIronAge", "townCenterEtherAge", "townCenterGoldenAge", "townCenterSteamAge", "townCenterRadiumAge"],
		"aiKings":["AI_king"]
	},
	"dwarfs":{
		"type":"faction",
		"no":7,
		"name":{"EN":"dwarves",
				"FR":"nains",
				"DE":"Zwerge",
				"JP":"ドワーフ族"},
		"description":{"EN":"",
					   "FR":"",
					   "DE":"",
					   "JP":""},

		"ais":["AI_berserker", "AI_engineer", "AI_grenadier", "AI_runic Priest", "AI_warrior"],
		"townCenters":["townCenterWoodenAge", "townCenterStoneAge", "townCenterIronAge", "townCenterEtherAge", "townCenterGoldenAge", "townCenterSteamAge", "townCenterRadiumAge"],
		"aiKings":["AI_king"]
	}
}
