<file path="steamAge/items/ammo/ammo.js">
{
	"boltsOfBiting":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"bolts",
		"picture":{"file":"boltsOfBiting.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"bolts of biting",
				"FR":"carreaux-serpent",
				"JP":"食いつきボルト"},
		"description":{"EN":"Bolts of biting inflict additional poison damage.",
					   "FR":"Les carreaux-serpent infligent des dégâts de poison supplémentaires.",
					   "JP":"各種クロスボウ用のボルト。追加で毒ダメージを与えることが可能です。射場で鋳鉄と薬草から製造できます。"},
		"tag":["ammo"],
		"ammoBonus":{
			"special":{"poison":{"attack":{"shootingWeapons":0.4}, "time":5}},
			"missile":"boltOfBiting",
			"damage":["missile", "piercing", "poison"]
		},
		"equip":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"shootingWeapons":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any bolt of biting."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de carreaux-serpents."]},
				"JP":{"D":["食いつきボルトを持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough bolts of biting."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de carreaux-serpents."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な食いつきボルトがないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of bolts of biting."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de carreaux-serpent."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["食いつきボルトが尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many bolts of biting."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de carreaux-serpents."]},
				"JP":{"D":["食いつきボルトはこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"archeryCamp",
				"no":4.4,
				"time":2,
				"gainItem":{"boltsOfBiting":20},
				"bonusSkill":"crossbowsForging",
				"costRessource":{"medicinalHerbs":1,"castIron":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":4},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":4},
				"xpSkill":{"crossbowsForging":4},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-3
		}]
	},
	"disks":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"disks",
		"picture":{"file":"disks.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"disks",
				"FR":"disques",
				"JP":"鋸刃ディスク"},
		"description":{"EN":"Disks are used with disk throwers.",
					   "FR":"Les disques sont les munitions des lances-disques.",
					   "JP":"ディスク投射機用の鋸刃ディスク。射場で鋼鉄から製造できます。"},
		"tag":["ammo"],
		"equip":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"shootingWeapons":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any disks."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de disques."]},
				"JP":{"D":["鋸刃ディスクを持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough disks."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de disques."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な鋸刃ディスクがないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of disks."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de disques."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["鋸刃ディスクが尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many disks."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de disques."]},
				"JP":{"D":["鋸刃ディスクはこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"archeryCamp",
				"no":14,
				"time":1.5,
				"gainItem":{"disks":20},
				"bonusSkill":"crossbowsForging",
				"costRessource":{"steel":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":1},
				"xpSkill":{"crossbowsForging":1},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-3
		}]
	},
	"fireArrows":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"etherAge",
		"category":"arrows",
		"picture":{"file":"fireArrows.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"fire arrows",
				"FR":"flèches de feu",
				"JP":"炎矢"},
		"description":{"EN":"Fire arrows inflict additional fire damage.",
					   "FR":"Les flèches de feu infligent des dégâts de feu supplémentaires.",
					   "JP":"各種弓用の矢。追加で炎ダメージを与えることが可能です。射場で木材と羊皮紙から製造できます。"},
		"tag":["ammo"],
		"ammoBonus":{
			"bonus":{"attack":{"bows":0.2}},
			"missile":"fireArrow",
			"damage":["missile", "piercing", "fire"]
		},
		"equip":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"bows":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any fire arrows."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de flèches de feu."]},
				"JP":{"D":["炎矢を持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough fire arrows."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de flèches de feu."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な炎矢がないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of fire arrows."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de flèches de feu."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["炎矢が尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many fire arrows."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de flèches de feu."]},
				"JP":{"D":["炎矢はこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"archeryCamp",
				"no":1.4,
				"time":1,
				"gainItem":{"fireArrows":5},
				"bonusSkill":"bowsCrafting",
				"costRessource":{"parchment":1, "wood":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":2},
				"xpSkill":{"bowsCrafting":2},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
		}]
	},
	"iceArrows":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"etherAge",
		"category":"arrows",
		"picture":{"file":"iceArrows.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"ice arrows",
				"FR":"flèches de glace",
				"JP":"氷矢"},
		"description":{"EN":"Ice arrows slow down your target.",
					   "FR":"Les flèches de glace ralentissent la cible.",
					   "JP":"各種弓用の矢。敵の移動速度を下げることが可能です。射場で木材と水晶から製造できます。"},
		"tag":["ammo"],
		"ammoBonus":{
			"missile":"iceArrow", "special":{"penality":{"id":"slowdown", "time":5}},
			"damage":["missile", "piercing", "ice"]
		},
		"equip":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"bows":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any ice arrows."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de flèches de glace."]},
				"JP":{"D":["氷矢を持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough ice arrows."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de flèches de glace."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な氷矢がないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of ice arrows."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de flèches de glace."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["氷矢が尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many ice arrows."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de flèches de glace."]},
				"JP":{"D":["氷矢はこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"archeryCamp",
				"no":1.2,
				"time":5.5,
				"gainItem":{"iceArrows":10},
				"bonusSkill":"bowsCrafting",
				"costRessource":{"crystals":1, "wood":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":11},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":11},
				"xpSkill":{"bowsCrafting":11},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
		}]
	},
	"microRockets":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"microRockets",
		"picture":{"file":"microRockets.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"micro rockets",
				"FR":"micro-roquettes",
				"JP":"マイクロミサイル"},
		"description":{"EN":"Micro rockets are used with light missile launchers.",
					   "FR":"Les micro-roquettes sont les munitions des petits lances-missiles.",
					   "JP":"小型ミサイルランチャー用のマイクロミサイル。造兵廠で鋼鉄と硫黄から製造できます。"},
		"tag":["ammo"],
		"equip":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"firearms":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any micro rockets."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de micro-roquettes."]},
				"JP":{"D":["マイクロミサイルを持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough micro rockets."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de micro-roquettes."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分なマイクロミサイルがないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of micro rockets."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de micro-roquettes."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["マイクロミサイルが尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many micro rockets."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de micro-roquettes."]},
				"JP":{"D":["マイクロミサイルはこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"poisonedDarts":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"category":"darts",
		"picture":{"file":"poisonedDarts.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"poisoned darts",
				"FR":"fléchettes empoisonnées",
				"JP":"毒吹き矢"},
		"description":{"EN":"Poisoned darts cause additional poison damage.",
					   "FR":"Les fléchettes empoisonnées infligent des dégâts de poison supplémentaires.",
					   "JP":"吹き筒用の矢。追加で毒ダメージを与えることが可能です。野営地で木材と薬草から製造できます。"},
		"tag":["ammo"],
		"ammoBonus":{
			"special":{"poison":{"attack":{"shootingWeapons":1}, "time":5}},
			"missile":"poisonedDart",
			"damage":["missile", "piercing", "poison"]
		},
		"equip":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"shootingWeapons":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any poisoned darts."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de fléchettes empoisonnées."]},
				"JP":{"D":["毒吹き矢を持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough poisoned darts."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de fléchettes empoisonnées."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な毒吹き矢がないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of poisoned darts."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de fléchettes empoisonnées."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["毒吹き矢が尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many poisoned darts."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de fléchettes empoisonnées."]},
				"JP":{"D":["毒吹き矢はこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"huntingCamp",
				"no":4.5,
				"time":1,
				"gainItem":{"poisonedDarts":10},
				"bonusSkill":"hunting",
				"costRessource":{"wood":1, "medicinalHerbs":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":2},
				"xpSkill":{"hunting":2},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
		}]
	},
	"rockets":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"rockets",
		"picture":{"file":"rockets.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"rockets",
				"FR":"roquettes",
				"JP":"ミサイル"},
		"description":{"EN":"Rockets are used with missiles launcher.",
					   "FR":"Les roquettes sont les munitions des lances-missiles.",
					   "JP":"ミサイルランチャー用のミサイル。造兵廠で鋼鉄と硫黄から製造できます。"},
		"tag":["ammo"],
		"equip":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"firearms":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any rockets."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de roquettes."]},
				"JP":{"D":["ミサイルを持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough rockets."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de roquettes."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分なミサイルがないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of rockets."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de roquettes."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["ミサイルが尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many rockets."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de roquettes."]},
				"JP":{"D":["ミサイルはこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"thunderBolts":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"etherAge",
		"category":"bolts",
		"picture":{"file":"thunderBolts.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"thunder bolts",
				"FR":"carreaux de foudre",
				"JP":"雷ボルト"},
		"description":{"EN":"Thunder bolts inflict additional electrical damages.",
					   "FR":"Les carreaux de foudre infligent des dégâts électriques supplémentaires.",
					   "JP":"各種クロスボウ用のボルト。追加で電気ダメージを与えることが可能です。射場で鋳鉄と羊皮紙から製造できます。"},
		"tag":["ammo"],
		"ammoBonus":{
			"bonus":{"attack":{"shootingWeapons":0.2}},
			"missile":"thunderBolt",
			"damage":["missile", "piercing", "electricity"]
		},
		"equip":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"shootingWeapons":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any thunder bolts."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de carreaux de foudre."]},
				"JP":{"D":["雷ボルトを持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough thunder bolts."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de carreaux de foudre."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な雷ボルトがないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of thunder bolts."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de carreaux de foudre."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["雷ボルトが尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many thunder bolts."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de carreaux de foudre."]},
				"JP":{"D":["雷ボルトはこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"archeryCamp",
				"no":4.2,
				"time":2,
				"gainItem":{"thunderBolts":20},
				"bonusSkill":"crossbowsForging",
				"costRessource":{"parchment":1,"castIron":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":4},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":4},
				"xpSkill":{"crossbowsForging":4},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-3
		}]
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/items/armors/light/lightArmors.js">
{

				"xpSkill":{"armorsForging":32},
				"quantity":-11

				"FR":"calotte de cuir clouté",
				"JP":"鋲打ち革帽子"},

					   "FR":"La calotte de cuir clouté est un casque léger fabriqué avec du cuir et du fer.",
					   "JP":"着用者の体力を向上させる軽兜。製革所にてなめし革と鋳鉄から製造できます。"},

<file path="steamAge/items/armors/medium/mediumArmors.js">
{
	"cabasset":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"head",
		"picture":{"file":"cabasset.atf"},

<file path="steamAge/items/armors/power/powerArmors.js">
{
	"mountPredatorPowerArmor":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"mount",
		"picture":{"file":"mountPredatorPowerArmor.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"power-assisted predator armour",
				"FR":"armure assistée de prédateur",
				"JP":"プレデターパワーアーマー"},
		"description":{"EN":"The power-assisted predator armour is a close combat armour.",
					   "FR":"L'armure assistée de prédateur est une armure de combat rapproché.",
					   "JP":"近接戦闘用のパワーアーマーです。パワーアーマー工房で鋼鉄から建造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"health":{"powerArmors":4}, "attack":{"powerArmors":4}, "defense":100},
		"damage":["closeCombat", "slashing"],
		"attackTime":4,
		"effect":"scratch",
		"resistance":{"electricity":0.5},
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.125},
			"xpSkill":{"powerArmors":0.5}
		},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"health":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"powerArmors":0.5}
				}
		},
		"speed":4,
		"mount":{"width":80, "height":90, "y":-50, "stepY":2, "file":"mountPredatorPowerArmorD.png", "plans":[true, true, true, true]},
		"equip":true,
		"gain":{
			"equip":true
		},
		"unequip":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"create":[{"id":"predatorPowerArmor"}]
		},
		"death":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"create":[{"id":"predatorPowerArmor"}]
		}
	},
	"mountWorkerPowerArmor":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"mount",
		"picture":{"file":"mountWorkerPowerArmor.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"power-assisted worker armour",
				"FR":"armure assistée de travail",
				"JP":"ワーカーパワーアーマー"},
		"description":{"EN":"The power-assisted worker armour gives you a powerful protection.",
					   "FR":"L'armure assistée d'ouvrier offre une excellente protection.",
					   "JP":"強力な防護を着用者に与えるパワーアーマーです。パワーアーマー工房で鋼鉄から建造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"health":{"powerArmors":4}, "strength":{"powerArmors":0.5}, "defense":100},
		"resistance":{"electricity":0.5},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"health":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"powerArmors":0.5}
				}
		},
		"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{
			"strength":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"powerArmors":0.5}
				}
		},
		"speed":4,
		"mount":{"width":75, "height":90, "y":-55, "stepY":2, "file":"mountWorkerPowerArmorD.png", "plans":[true, true, true, true]},
		"equip":true,
		"gain":{
			"equip":true
		},
		"unequip":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"create":[{"id":"workerPowerArmor"}]
		},
		"death":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"create":[{"id":"workerPowerArmor"}]
		}
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/items/belts/belts.js">
{
	"beltOfAgility":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"category":"belt",
		"picture":{"file":"beltOfAgility.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"belt of agility",
				"FR":"ceinture d'agilité",
				"JP":"敏捷のベルト"},
		"description":{"EN":"The belt of agility increases your rapidity.",
					   "FR":"La ceinture d'agilité augmente votre rapidité.",
					   "JP":"着用者の敏捷性を向上させるベルト。革工房でなめし革と鋳鉄から製造できます。"},

		"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{
			"rapidity":{

				}
		},

	},

					   "FR":"La ceinture de l'interprète augmente votre charisme.",
					   "JP":"着用者の魅力を向上させるベルト。革工房でなめし革と棒金から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"charisma":{"belts":0.125}},
		"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{
			"charisma":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"belts":1}
				}
		},
		"equip":true

	"leatherBelt":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"category":"belt",
		"picture":{"file":"leatherBelt.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"leather belt",
				"FR":"ceinture de cuir",
				"JP":"革のベルト"},
		"description":{"EN":"The leather belt is a rudimentary belt.",
					   "FR":"La ceinture de cuir est une ceinture rudimentaire.",
					   "JP":"着用者の持久力を向上させる原始的なベルト。革工房でなめし革から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"stamina":{"belts":0.15}},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"stamina":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"belts":1}
				}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"upgrade":[{
				"workshop":"leatherGoodsWorkshop",
				"time":1.5,
				"gainItem":{"beltOfFortitude":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"castIron":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":3},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":3},
				"quantity":-3

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},

				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":3},
				"quantity":-3

				"gainItem":{"beltOfGiantStrength":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"crystals":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":4},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":4},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":4},
				"quantity":-4
			},{

				"time":5,
				"gainItem":{"beltOfThePerformer":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"goldBar":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":10},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":10},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":10},
				"quantity":-10
			},{
				"workshop":"shamanicAltar",
				"time":8,
				"gainItem":{"snowflakeBelt":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"crystals":4},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":16},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":16},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":16},
				"quantity":-16
			}]
	},
	"snowflakeBelt":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"belt",
		"picture":{"file":"snowflakeBelt.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"snowflake belt",
				"FR":"ceinture de flocon de neige",
				"JP":"雪結晶のベルト"},
		"description":{"EN":"The snowflake belt can throw a slow ice attack spell.",
					   "FR":"La ceinture de flocon de neige projette une attaque lente de magie de glace.",
					   "JP":"当たった標的の移動速度を一時的に下げる雪結晶を放つ妖術の発動体となるベルト。祈祷所でなめし革と水晶から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"druidicMagic":2}},
		"attackTime":4, "range":300, "missile":"snowflake",
		"attacks":[{"range":300, "damage":["magic", "ice"], "missile":"snowflake", "selfGuided":0.05, "penality":{"id":"slowdown", "time":5}}],
		"damage":["magic", "ice"],
		"resistance":{"ice":-0.1},
		"attack":{
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":4}
		},
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":0.25},
			"xpSkill":{"druidicMagic":0.5}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"shamanicAltar",
				"no":18,
				"time":10,
				"gainItem":{"snowflakeBelt":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"leather":4, "crystals":4},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":20},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":20},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":20},
				"quantity":-20
		}]
	},
	"steelBelt":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"belt",
		"picture":{"file":"steelBelt.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"steel belt",
				"FR":"ceinture d'acier",
				"JP":"鋼鉄のベルト"},
		"description":{"EN":"The steel belt increases your endurance.",
					   "FR":"La ceinture de résistance augmente votre endurance.",
					   "JP":"着用者の体力を向上させるベルト。電気属性にわずかに弱くなります。革工房でなめし革と鋼鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"health":{"belts":0.25}},
		"resistance":{"electricity":0.1},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"health":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"belts":1}
				}
		},
		"equip":true
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/items/cloaks/cloaks.js">
{

					   "JP":"着用者の魔力、鎮圧・救済魔術技能を向上させ、光属性に耐性を与える魔法衣服。裁縫場で織物と水晶から製造できます。"},

<file path="steamAge/items/edibles/edibles.js">
{
	"addressElixir":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"addressElixir.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"address elixir",
				"FR":"élixir d'adresse",
				"JP":"アドレスエリクサー"},
		"description":{"EN":"Drink an address elixir to temporary increase your address and your rapidity.",
					   "FR":"L'élixir d'adresse augmente temporairement votre adresse et votre rapidité.",
					   "JP":"技量と敏捷性を一時的に向上させることが可能です。製剤所で薬草と水晶から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"increasedAddress":{"apothecary":3}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":8},
			"effect":"bonusEffect"
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"apothecary":1},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many address elixirs."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum d'élixirs d'adresse."]},
				"JP":{"D":["アドレスエリクサーはこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"laboratory",
				"no":9,
				"time":8.5,
				"gainItem":{"addressElixir":1},
				"sound":"soundBottle",
				"bonusSkill":"apothecary",
				"costRessource":{"medicinalHerbs":9, "crystals":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":17},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":17},
				"xpSkill":{"apothecary":17},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-8
		}]
	},
	"beer":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"beer.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"beer",
				"FR":"bière",
				"JP":"ビール"},
		"description":{"EN":"Beer used to restore your stamina and gain a temporary bonus in strength.",
					   "FR":"La bière vous permet de récupérer de l'énergie et de gagner un bonus temporaire en force.",
					   "JP":"持久力を回復し、筋力を一時的に向上させることが可能です。蒸溜所で水と小麦から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"foodBonusBeer":120},
			"gainPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":{"strength":0.3}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":3}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"alcohols":1},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many beer."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de bières."]},
				"JP":{"D":["ビールはこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"boiledMeat":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"etherAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"boiledMeat.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"boiled meat",
				"FR":"viande bouillie",
				"JP":"煮沸肉"},
		"description":{"EN":"Eat boiled meat to restore your stamina and gain a temporary bonus in endurance and rapidity.",
					   "FR":"La viande bouillie vous permet de récupérer de l'énergie et de gagner un bonus temporaire en endurance et en rapidité.",
					   "JP":"持久力を回復し、敏捷性と耐久力を一時的に向上させることが可能です。精肉所で生肉と水から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"foodBonusBoiledMeat":120},
			"gainPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":{"endurance":0.08, "rapidity":0.08}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.8, "rapidity":0.8}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"butchery":1},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too much boiled meat."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de viande bouillie."]},
				"JP":{"D":["煮沸肉はこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"intelligenceElixir":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"intelligenceElixir.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"intelligence elixir",
				"FR":"élixir d'intelligence",
				"JP":"インテリジェンスエリクサー"},
		"description":{"EN":"Drink an intelligence elixir to temporary increase your intelligence and your willpower.",
					   "FR":"L'élixir d'intelligence augmente temporairement votre intelligence et votre volonté.",
					   "JP":"知力と意志力を一時的に向上させることが可能です。製剤所で水晶から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"increasedIntelligence":{"apothecary":3}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":8},
			"effect":"bonusEffect"
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"apothecary":1},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many intelligence elixirs."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum d'élixirs d'intelligence."]},
				"JP":{"D":["インテリジェンスエリクサーはこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"laboratory",
				"no":10,
				"time":8,
				"gainItem":{"intelligenceElixir":1},
				"sound":"soundBottle",
				"bonusSkill":"apothecary",
				"costRessource":{"crystals":4},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":16},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":16},
				"xpSkill":{"apothecary":16},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-8
		}]
	},
	"meatloaf":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"meatloaf.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"meatloaf",
				"FR":"pain de viande",
				"JP":"ミートローフ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Eat meatloaves to restore your stamina and gain a temporary bonus to strength and endurance.",
					   "FR":"Le pain de viande vous permet de récupérer de l'énergie et de gagner un bonus temporaire en force et en endurance.",
					   "JP":"持久力を回復し、筋力と耐久力を一時的に向上させることが可能です。精肉所で生肉と小麦粉から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"foodBonusMeatloaf":120},
			"gainPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":{"strength":0.225, "endurance":0.225}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":2.25, "endurance":2.25}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"butchery":1},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many meatloaves."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de pains de viande."]},
				"JP":{"D":["ミートローフはこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"mixedPotion":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"mixedPotion.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"mixed potion",
				"FR":"potion mixte",
				"JP":"混合ポーション"},

			"quantity":-1,
			"gainPrimaryCharacteristic":{"health":{"willpower":0.4}, "mana":{"willpower":0.4}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":8}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"apothecary":1},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many mixed potions."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de potions mixtes."]},
				"JP":{"D":["混合ポーションはこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{

				"no":7,
				"time":8.5,
				"gainItem":{"mixedPotion":3},
				"sound":"soundBottle",
				"bonusSkill":"apothecary",
				"costRessource":{"medicinalHerbs":9, "crystals":2},

				"xpSkill":{"apothecary":17},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-8
		}]
	},

				"FR":"pâtes",

			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":3}

	},

		"picture":{"file":"purifiedWater.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"purified water",
				"FR":"eau purifiée",
				"JP":"精製水"},
		"description":{"EN":"Drink purified water to restore your stamina and gain a temporary bonus to defence.",
					   "FR":"L'eau purifiée vous permet de récupérer de l'énergie et de gagner un bonus temporaire en défense.",
					   "JP":"持久力を回復し、防御力を一時的に向上させることが可能です。蒸溜所で水と石炭から製造できます。"},

				"xpSkill":{"alcohols":6},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-3
		}]
	},
	"sausage":{

		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"sausage.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"sausage",
				"FR":"saucisson",
				"JP":"ソーセージ"},

					   "FR":"Le saucisson vous permet de récupérer de l'énergie et de gagner un bonus temporaire en endurance.",

				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de saucissons."]},

		"type":"item",

		"picture":{"file":"skewer.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"meat kebab",
				"FR":"brochette",
				"JP":"肉ケバブ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Eat meat kebab to restore your stamina and gain a temporary bonus to attack.",
					   "FR":"La brochette vous permet de récupérer de l'énergie et de gagner un bonus temporaire en attaque.",
					   "JP":"持久力を回復し、攻撃力を一時的に向上させることが可能です。精肉所で生肉と石炭から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"foodBonusSkewer":120},
			"gainPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":{"endurance":0.18}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":1.8}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"butchery":1},

				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de brochettes."]},
				"JP":{"D":["肉ケバブはこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"steak":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"steak.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"steak",
				"FR":"steak",
				"JP":"ステーキ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Eat steak to restore your stamina and gain a temporary bonus to health.",
					   "FR":"Le steak vous permet de récupérer de l'énergie et de gagner un bonus temporaire en santé.",
					   "JP":"持久力を回復し、体力を一時的に向上させることが可能です。精肉所で生肉と木材から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"foodBonusSteak":120},
			"gainPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":{"endurance":0.16}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":1.6}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"butchery":1},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too much steak."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de steak."]},
				"JP":{"D":["ステーキはこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"steamedBread":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"steamedBread.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"steamed bread",
				"FR":"pain à la vapeur",
				"JP":"蒸しパン"},
		"description":{"EN":"Eat steamed bread to restore your stamina and gain a temporary bonus to speed.",
					   "FR":"Le pain à la vapeur vous permet de récupérer de l'énergie et de gagner un bonus temporaire en vitesse.",
					   "JP":"持久力を回復し、移動速度を一時的に向上させることが可能です。製パン用オーブンで小麦粉と石炭から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"foodBonusSteamedBread":120},
			"gainPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":{"rapidity":0.45}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":4.5}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"bakery":1},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too much steamed bread."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de pain à la vapeur."]},
				"JP":{"D":["蒸しパンはこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"bakeryOven",
				"time":6.5,
				"no":4,
				"gainItem":{"steamedBread":5},
				"sound":"soundPick",
				"bonusSkill":"bakery",
				"costRessource":{"flour":4, "coal":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":13},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":13},
				"xpSkill":{"bakery":13},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-13
		}]
	},
	"strengthElixir":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"strengthElixir.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"strength elixir",
				"FR":"élixir de force",
				"JP":"ストレングスエリクサー"},
		"description":{"EN":"Drink a strength elixir to temporary increase your strength and your endurance.",
					   "FR":"L'élixir de force augmente temporairement votre force et votre endurance.",
					   "JP":"筋力と耐久力を一時的に向上させることが可能です。製剤所で薬草から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"increasedStrength":{"apothecary":3}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":8},
			"effect":"bonusEffect"
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"apothecary":1},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many strength elixirs."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum d'élixirs de force."]},
				"JP":{"D":["ストレングスエリクサーはこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"laboratory",
				"no":8,
				"time":9,
				"gainItem":{"strengthElixir":1},
				"sound":"soundBottle",
				"bonusSkill":"apothecary",
				"costRessource":{"medicinalHerbs":18},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":18},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":18},
				"xpSkill":{"apothecary":18},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-9
		}]
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/items/effects/effects.js">
{
	"blessing":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"blessing",
		"picture":{"file":"blessing.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"blessing",
				"FR":"bénédiction",
				"JP":"<<祝福>>"},
		"description":{"EN":"Blessings increase your characteristics.",
					   "FR":"Les bénédictions améliorent vos caractéristiques.",
					   "JP":"体力、持久力、魔力が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"health":{"redemptiveMagic":0.25}, "stamina":{"redemptiveMagic":0.25}, "mana":{"redemptiveMagic":0.25}},
		"lost":{"EN":"My blessing has dissipated.",
				"FR":"Ma bénédiction s'est dissipée.",
				"JP":"<<祝福>>の効果が切れてしまった。"},
		"equip":true
	},
	"foodBonusBoiledMeat":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"category":"foodBonusBoiledMeat",
		"picture":{"file":"foodBonusBoiledMeat.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"boiled meat bonus",
				"FR":"bonus de la viande bouillie",
				"JP":"煮沸肉効果"},
		"description":{"EN":"Boiled meat gives you a temporary bonus after consumption.",
					   "FR":"La viande bouillie vous accorde un bonus temporaire après ingestion.",
					   "JP":"煮沸肉を摂食したことによる効果。敏捷性と耐久力が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"endurance":10,
				 "rapidity":10},
		"bonusXP":0.01,
		"equip":true
	},
	"foodBonusMeatloaf":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"foodBonusMeatloaf",
		"picture":{"file":"foodBonusMeatloaf.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"meatloaf bonus",
				"FR":"bonus du pain de viande",
				"JP":"ミートローフ効果"},
		"description":{"EN":"Meatloaf gives you a temporary bonus after consumption.",
					   "FR":"Le pain de viande vous accorde un bonus temporaire après ingestion.",
					   "JP":"ミートローフを摂食したことによる効果。筋力と耐久力が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"strength":10,
				 "endurance":10},
		"bonusXP":0.01,
		"equip":true
	},
	"foodBonusPurifiedWater":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"foodBonusPurifiedWater",
		"picture":{"file":"foodBonusPurifiedWater.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"purified water bonus",
				"FR":"bonus de l'eau purifiée",
				"JP":"精製水効果"},
		"description":{"EN":"Purified water gives you a temporary bonus after consumption.",
					   "FR":"L'eau purifiée vous accorde un bonus temporaire après ingestion.",
					   "JP":"精製水を摂食したことによる効果。防御力が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"defense":10},
		"bonusXP":0.01,
		"equip":true
	},
	"foodBonusSausage":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"category":"foodBonusSausage",
		"picture":{"file":"foodBonusSausage.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"sausage bonus",
				"FR":"bonus de saucisson",
				"JP":"ソーセージ効果"},
		"description":{"EN":"Sausages give you a temporary bonus after consumption.",
					   "FR":"Le saucisson vous accorde un bonus temporaire après ingestion.",
					   "JP":"ソーセージを摂食したことによる効果。耐久力が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"endurance":10},
		"bonusXP":0.01,
		"equip":true
	},
	"foodBonusSkewer":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"foodBonusSkewer",
		"picture":{"file":"foodBonusSkewer.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"meat kebab bonus",
				"FR":"bonus des brochettes",
				"JP":"肉ケバブ効果"},
		"description":{"EN":"Meat kebab gives you a temporary bonus after consumption.",
					   "FR":"Les brochettes vous accordent un bonus temporaire après ingestion.",
					   "JP":"肉ケバブを摂食したことによる効果。攻撃力が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":10},
		"bonusXP":0.01,
		"equip":true
	},
	"foodBonusSteak":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"category":"foodBonusSteak",
		"picture":{"file":"foodBonusSteak.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"steak bonus",
				"FR":"bonus du steak",
				"JP":"ステーキ効果"},
		"description":{"EN":"Steak gives you a temporary bonus after consumption.",
					   "FR":"Le steak vous accorde un bonus temporaire après ingestion.",
					   "JP":"ステーキを摂食したことによる効果。体力が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"health":10},
		"bonusXP":0.01,
		"equip":true
	},
	"foodBonusSteamedBread":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"foodBonusSteamedBread",
		"picture":{"file":"foodBonusSteamedBread.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"steamed bread bonus",
				"FR":"bonus du pain à la vapeur",
				"JP":"蒸しパン効果"},
		"description":{"EN":"Steamed bread gives you a temporary bonus after consumption.",
					   "FR":"Le pain à la vapeur vous accordent un bonus temporaire après ingestion.",
					   "JP":"蒸しパンを摂食したことによる効果。移動速度が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"speed":0.5},
		"bonusXP":0.01,
		"equip":true
	},
	"increasedAddress":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"increasedAddress",
		"picture":{"file":"increasedAddress.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"increased address",
				"FR":"adresse accrue",
				"JP":"<<技量強化>>"},
		"description":{"EN":"Increases your address.",
					   "FR":"Améliore votre adresse.",
					   "JP":"技量と敏捷性が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"address":20, "rapidity":20},
		"lost":{"EN":"My increased address has dissipated.",
				"FR":"Mon adresse accrue s'est dissipée.",
				"JP":"<<技量強化>>の効果が切れてしまった。"},
		"equip":true
	},
	"increasedIntelligence":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"increasedIntelligence",
		"picture":{"file":"increasedIntelligence.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"increased intelligence",
				"FR":"intelligence accrue",
				"JP":"<<知力強化>>"},
		"description":{"EN":"Increase your intelligence.",
					   "FR":"Améliore votre intelligence.",
					   "JP":"知力と意志力が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"intelligence":20, "willpower":20},
		"lost":{"EN":"My increased intelligence has dissipated.",
				"FR":"Mon intelligence accrue s'est dissipée.",
				"JP":"<<知力強化>>の効果が切れてしまった。"},
		"equip":true
	},
	"increasedStrength":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"increasedStrength",
		"picture":{"file":"increasedStrength.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"increased strength",
				"FR":"force accrue",
				"JP":"<<筋力強化>>"},
		"description":{"EN":"Increase your strength.",
					   "FR":"Améliore votre force.",
					   "JP":"筋力と耐久力が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"strength":20, "endurance":20},
		"lost":{"EN":"My increased strength has dissipated.",
				"FR":"Ma force accrue s'est dissipée.",
				"JP":"<<筋力強化>>の効果が切れてしまった。"},
		"equip":true
	},
	"lichTransformation":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"transformation",
		"picture":{"file":"lichTransformation.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"lich transformation",
				"FR":"transformation en liche",
				"JP":"<<リッチ変化>>"},
		"description":{"EN":"The lich transformation increases your health and your mana.",
					   "FR":"La transformation en liche augmente votre vie et votre mana.",
					   "JP":"リッチに変化し、体力と、魔力及び回復速度が向上すると共に、死、毒属性に強くなりますが、光属性に弱くなります。"},
		"bonus":{"health":{"endurance":0.25}, "mana":{"willpower":0.25}},
		"bonusRegeneration":{"mana":1},
		"resistance":{"death":-0.5, "light":0.5, "poison":-1},
		"lost":{"EN":"My lich transformation has dissipated.",
				"FR":"Ma transformation en liche s'est dissipée.",
				"JP":"<<リッチ変化>>の効果が切れてしまった。"},
		"appearance":{"bodies":{"M":"lichTransformationM.png", "F":"lichTransformationF.png"},
					  "faces":{"M":"lichTransformationM.png", "F":"lichTransformationF.png"},
					  "ears":{"M":"lichTransformationB.png", "F":"lichTransformationB.png"}},
		"equip":true
	},
	"sprintBonus":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"etherAge",
		"category":"sprintBonus",
		"picture":{"file":"sprintBonus.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"sprint bonus",
				"FR":"bonus de sprint",
				"JP":"全力疾走効果"},
		"description":{"EN":"Sprint bonus increase your movement speed.",
					   "FR":"Le bonus de sprint augmente votre vitesse de déplacement.",
					   "JP":"移動速度が向上します。"},
		"bonusSpeed":2,
		"equip":true
	},
	"vitality":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"vitality",
		"picture":{"file":"vitality.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"vitality",
				"FR":"vitalité",
				"JP":"<<生命>>"},
		"description":{"EN":"Vitality increases your constitution.",
					   "FR":"La vitalité améliore votre constitution.",
					   "JP":"体力と耐久力が向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"health":{"shamanicMagic":0.5}, "endurance":10},
		"lost":{"EN":"My vitality has dissipated.",
				"FR":"Ma vitalité s'est dissipée.",
				"JP":"<<生命>>の効果が切れてしまった。"},
		"equip":true
	},
	"werewolfTransformation":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"transformation",
		"picture":{"file":"werewolfTransformation.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"werewolf transformation",
				"FR":"transformation en loup-garou",
				"JP":"<<獣人変化>>"},
		"description":{"EN":"Transforming into a werewolf increases your life and your health regeneration.",
					   "FR":"La transformation en loup-garou accroît votre vie et votre régénération de santé.",
					   "JP":"人狼に変化し、体力及び回復速度と、狩猟技能が向上しますが、火属性に弱くなります。"},
		"bonus":{"health":{"endurance":0.5},
				 "hunting":{"address":0.5}},
		"bonusRegeneration":{"health":1},
		"resistance":{"fire":0.25},
		"lost":{"EN":"My werewolf transformation has dissipated.",
				"FR":"Ma transformation en loup-garou s'est dissipée.",
				"JP":"<<獣人変化>>の効果が切れてしまった。"},
		"appearance":{"bodies":{"M":"werewolfTransformationM.png", "F":"werewolfTransformationF.png"},
					  "faces":{"M":"werewolfTransformationM.png", "F":"werewolfTransformationF.png"},
					  "ears":{"M":"werewolfTransformationB.png", "F":"werewolfTransformationB.png"}},
		"equip":true
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/items/gloves/gloves.js">
{
	"archerGloves":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"etherAge",

		"picture":{"file":"archerGloves.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"archer gloves",
				"FR":"gants d'archer",
				"JP":"弓手の手袋"},
		"description":{"EN":"The archer gloves increase your bow skills.",
					   "FR":"Les gants d'archer améliorent votre compétence de tir à l'arc.",
					   "JP":"着用者の弓技能を向上させる手袋。革工房でなめし革から製造できます。"},

		"xpSkill":{
			"bows":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.125},

	},

		"category":"hand",
		"picture":{"file":"battleGloves.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"battle gloves",
				"FR":"gants de combat",
				"JP":"戦いの手袋"},

					   "FR":"Les gants de combat augmentent vos compétences de combat au corps-à-corps.",
					   "JP":"着用者の小型武器・刀剣・鈍器・斧・長柄武器技能を向上させる手袋。革工房でなめし革と鋳鉄から製造できます。"},

				 "edgedWeapons":{"gloves":0.25},
				 "bluntWeapons":{"gloves":0.25},
				 "axes":{"gloves":0.25},
				 "polearms":{"gloves":0.25}},

				"xpSkill":{"gloves":1}
				},

				}

				"FR":"gants de dextérité",
				"JP":"器用さの手袋"},

					   "FR":"Les gants de dextérité augmente votre adresse.",
					   "JP":"着用者の技量を向上させる手袋。革工房でなめし革から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"address":{"gloves":0.125}},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{

				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"gloves":1}
				}
		},

	"glovesOfGhoulTouch":{

		"age":"etherAge",
		"category":"hand",
		"picture":{"file":"glovesOfGhoulTouch.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"gloves of ghoul touch",
				"FR":"gants de toucher de goule",
				"JP":"亡者の手袋"},
		"description":{"EN":"The gloves of ghoul touch inflict poison damage.",
					   "FR":"Les gants de toucher de goule infligent des dégâts de poison.",
					   "JP":"標的を一時的に毒状態にする混沌魔術のの発動体となる手袋。闇の祭壇でなめし革と薬草から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"chaoticMagic":0.4}},
		"attackTime":1,
		"effect":"poisonGasEffect",
		"special":{"poison":{"attack":{"chaoticMagic":0.8}, "time":10}},
		"damage":["magic", "poison"],
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":0.03125},
			"xpSkill":{"chaoticMagic":0.25}
		},
		"equip":true
	},
	"glovesOfStrength":{

		"category":"hand",
		"picture":{"file":"glovesOfStrength.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"gloves of strength",
				"FR":"gants de force",
				"JP":"筋力の手袋"},
		"description":{"EN":"The gloves of strength increase your strength.",
					   "FR":"Les gants de force augmentent votre force.",
					   "JP":"着用者の筋力を向上させる手袋。革工房でなめし革と鋼鉄から製造できます。"},

				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"gloves":1}
				}
		},
		"equip":true
	},
	"leatherGloves":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"category":"hand",
		"picture":{"file":"leatherGloves.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"leather gloves",
				"FR":"gants de cuir",
				"JP":"革の手袋"},
		"description":{"EN":"The leather gloves are a gloves made from leather.",
					   "FR":"Les gants de cuir sont des gants fabriqués avec du cuir.",
					   "JP":"着用者の持久力を向上させる手袋。革工房でなめし革から製造できます。"},

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":5},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":5},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":5},
				"quantity":-5
			},{

				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"crystals":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":4},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":4},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":4},
				"quantity":-4

				"costRessource":{"goldBar":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":10},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":10},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":10},
				"quantity":-10
			},{
				"workshop":"leatherGoodsWorkshop",
				"time":5,
				"gainItem":{"glovesOfStrength":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"steel":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":10},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":10},
				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":10},
				"quantity":-10
			},{
				"workshop":"leatherGoodsWorkshop",
				"time":1,
				"gainItem":{"glovesOfDexterity":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"leatherwork",
				"costRessource":{"leather":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":2},

			},{

				"costRessource":{"leather":2, "medicinalHerbs":6},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":8},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":8},
				"xpSkill":{"necromanticMagic":8},

			}]
	},
	"studdedLeatherGloves":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"category":"hand",
		"picture":{"file":"studdedLeatherGloves.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"studded leather gloves",
				"FR":"gants de cuir clouté",
				"JP":"鋲打ち革手袋"},
		"description":{"EN":"Studded leather gloves are battle gloves made from leather and cast iron.",
					   "FR":"Les gants de cuir clouté sont des gants de combat fabriqués avec du cuir et de la fonte.",
					   "JP":"着用者の体力を向上させる手袋。電気属性にわずかに弱くなります。革工房でなめし革と鋳鉄から製造できます。"},

		"resistance":{"electricity":0.05},

				"xpSkill":{"gloves":1}

				"xpSkill":{"leatherwork":2},
				"quantity":-2
			}]
	}
}

<file path="steamAge/items/jewelry/jewelry.js">
{
	"amuletOfMagicResistance":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"neck",
		"picture":{"file":"amuletOfMagicResistance.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"amulet of magic resistance",
				"FR":"amulette de résistance à la magie",
				"JP":"魔法耐性のお守り"},
		"description":{"EN":"This amulet increases your resistance to all sorts of magic.",
					   "FR":"Cette amulette augmente votre résistance à toutes les magies.",
					   "JP":"着用者の全魔法属性に対する耐性を向上させる首飾り。宝石細工場で棒金と水晶から製造できます。"},
		"resistance":{"magic":-0.2},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"health":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"jewellery":0.25}
				}

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":19},

		}]

		"name":{"EN":"ring of faith",
				"FR":"anneau de foi",
				"JP":"信仰の指輪"},
		"description":{"EN":"The ring of faith is a jewel made from gold bars.",
					   "FR":"L'anneau de foi est un bijou fabriqué avec des lingots d'or.",
					   "JP":"着用者の意志力を向上させる指輪。宝石細工場で棒金から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"willpower":25},
		"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{

				"xpSkill":{"jewellery":0.25}
				}

				"no":10,

		"name":{"EN":"ring of fire resistance",
				"FR":"anneau de résistance au feu",
				"JP":"火耐性の指輪"},
		"description":{"EN":"The ring of fire resistance protects you from pyrotechnic spells.",
					   "FR":"L'anneau de résistance au feu vous protège des attaques pyrotechniques.",
					   "JP":"着用者の火属性に対する耐性を大きく向上させる指輪。火の祭壇で棒金から製造できます。"},
		"resistance":{"fire":-0.4},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"health":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"jewellery":0.25}
				}

				"no":11.5,

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":15},

				"xpSkill":{"goldsmithery":15},
				"quantity":-6
		}]
	},

		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"ring",
		"picture":{"file":"ringOfHumanInfluence.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"ring of human influence",
				"FR":"anneau d'influence humaine",
				"JP":"魅力の指輪"},
		"description":{"EN":"The ring of human influence is a jewel made from gold bars.",
					   "FR":"L'anneau d'influence humaine est un bijou fabriqué avec des lingots d'or.",
					   "JP":"着用者の魅力を向上させる指輪。宝石細工場で棒金から製造できます。"},

				"no":11,
				"time":7.5,
				"gainItem":{"ringOfHumanInfluence":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"goldsmithery",
				"costRessource":{"goldBar":3},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":15},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":15},
				"xpSkill":{"goldsmithery":15},
				"quantity":-6
		}]
	},
	"ringOfKnowledge":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"ring",
		"picture":{"file":"ringOfKnowledge.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"ring of knowledge",
				"FR":"anneau de savoir",
				"JP":"知識の指輪"},
		"description":{"EN":"The ring of knowledge is a jewel made from gold bars.",
					   "FR":"L'anneau de savoir est un bijou fabriqué avec des lingots d'or.",
					   "JP":"着用者の知力を向上させる指輪。宝石細工場で棒金から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"intelligence":25},
		"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{
			"intelligence":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"jewellery":0.25}
				}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"jewelryWorkshop",
				"no":9,
				"time":7.5,
				"gainItem":{"ringOfKnowledge":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"goldsmithery",
				"costRessource":{"goldBar":3},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":15},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":15},
				"xpSkill":{"goldsmithery":15},
				"quantity":-6
		}]
	},
	"ringOfSoulProtection":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"ring",
		"picture":{"file":"ringOfSoulProtection.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"ring of soul protection",
				"FR":"anneau de protection de l'âme",
				"JP":"魂保護の指輪"},
		"description":{"EN":"The ring of soul protection automatically resurrects you when you die. It breaks after use.",
					   "FR":"L'anneau de protection de l'âme vous ressuscite automatiquement à votre mort. Il se brise après utilisation.",
					   "JP":"着用者が死亡した際、自動的に身代わりになって消失する指輪。闇の祭壇で棒金から製造できます。"},
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"death":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"resurrect":1,
			"effect":"poisonGasEffect"
		}
	},
	"rosary":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"neck",
		"picture":{"file":"rosary.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"rosary",
				"FR":"chapelet",
				"JP":"ロザリオ"},
		"description":{"EN":"The rosary is a collar which increases your magic of light skills.",
					   "FR":"Le chapelet est un collier qui augmente vos compétences de magie blanche.",
					   "JP":"着用者の鎮圧・救済魔術技能を向上させ、光属性への耐性を与える首飾り。光の祭壇で木材と羊毛から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"repressiveMagic":{"jewellery":0.25},
				 "redemptiveMagic":{"jewellery":0.25}},
		"resistance":{"light":-0.2},
		"xpSkill":{
			"repressiveMagic":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"jewellery":0.25}
				},
			"redemptiveMagic":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"jewellery":0.25}
				}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"redemptiveAltar",
				"no":12,
				"time":1.5,
				"gainItem":{"rosary":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"enchantment",
				"costRessource":{"wood":1, "wool":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":3},
				"xpSkill":{"enchantment":3},
				"quantity":-2
		}]
	},
	"strengthRing":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"ring",
		"picture":{"file":"strengthRing.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"strength ring",
				"FR":"anneau de force",
				"JP":"筋力の指輪"},
		"description":{"EN":"The strength ring is a jewel made from gold bars.",
					   "FR":"L'anneau de force est un bijou fabriqué avec des lingots d'or.",
					   "JP":"着用者の筋力を向上させる指輪。宝石細工場で棒金から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"strength":25},
		"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{
			"strength":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"charisma":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"jewellery":0.25}
				}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"jewelryWorkshop",
				"no":8,
				"time":7.5,
				"gainItem":{"strengthRing":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"goldsmithery",
				"costRessource":{"goldBar":3},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":15},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":15},
				"xpSkill":{"goldsmithery":15},
				"quantity":-6
		}]
	}
}

<file path="steamAge/items/mounts/mounts.js">
{
	"mountNightmare":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"mount",
		"picture":{"file":"mountNightmare.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"nightmare",
				"FR":"cheval de cauchemar",
				"JP":"ナイトメア"},
		"description":{"EN":"The nightmare is a mount which can throw flames.",
					   "FR":"Le cheval de cauchemar est une monture qui projette des flammes.",
					   "JP":"搭乗者の移動速度と体力、魔力を向上させ、己も火を吐く騎乗生物です。"},
		"bonus":{"health":{"riding":0.1}, "mana":{"riding":0.1}, "attack":{"pyrotechnicMagic":5}},
		"attackTime":4,
		"damage":["magic", "fire"],
		"effect":"flameThrowingEffect",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":0.25},
			"xpSkill":{"pyrotechnicMagic":0.25}
		},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"health":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":0.06},
				"xpSkill":{"riding":0.5}
				},
			"mana":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":0.06},
				"xpSkill":{"riding":0.5}
				}
		},
		"speed":10,
		"mount":{"width":56, "height":48, "y":-16, "stepY":1, "file":"mountNightmareD.png", "plans":[true, true, false, false]},
		"lost":{"EN":"My nightmare has dissipated.",
				"FR":"Mon cheval de cauchemar s'est dissipé.",
				"JP":"ナイトメアが消えてしまった。"},
		"equip":true,
		"gain":{
			"equip":true
		},
		"unequip":{
			"quantity":-1
		},
		"death":{
			"quantity":-1
		}
	},
	"mountPalfrey":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"mount",
		"picture":{"file":"mountPalfrey.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"palfrey",
				"FR":"palefroi",
				"JP":"乗用馬"},
		"description":{"EN":"The palfrey is a valuable and prestigious mount.",
					   "FR":"Le palefroi est une monture de prestige de grande valeur.",
					   "JP":"搭乗者の移動速度と体力、持久力、魔力を向上させる、高級で由緒ある騎乗生物です。"},
		"bonus":{"health":{"riding":0.1}, "stamina":{"riding":0.1}, "mana":{"riding":0.1}},
		"speed":10,
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"health":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":0.04},
				"xpSkill":{"riding":0.33}
				},
			"stamina":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":0.04},
				"xpSkill":{"riding":0.33}
				},
			"mana":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":0.04},
				"xpSkill":{"riding":0.33}
				}
		},
		"mount":{"width":56, "height":48, "y":-16, "stepY":1, "file":"mountPalfreyD.png", "plans":[true, true, false, false]},
		"equip":true,

		},

			"create":[{"id":"palfrey"}]
		},
		"death":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"create":[{"id":"palfrey"}]
		}
	},

<file path="steamAge/items/perks/perks.js">
{
	"perkAcolyteOfTheFlame":{
		"type":"item",
		"category":"perkAcolyteOfTheFlame",
		"picture":{"file":"acolyteOfTheFlame.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"acolyte of the flame",
				"FR":"acolyte de la flamme",
				"DE":"kumpel flame",
				"JP":"炎の侍祭"},
		"description":{"EN":"This perk increases your mastery of the fire magic.",
					   "FR":"Ce talent augmente votre maîtrise de la magie du feu.",
					   "DE":"Diese Vergünstigung erhöht die Beherrschung der Feuermagie.",
					   "JP":"火工魔術技能が基礎特性値に応じて向上します。また火耐性も強化されます。"},
		"bonus":{"pyrotechnicMagic":{"intelligence":0.5},
				 "conjuration":{"willpower":0.5}},
		"resistance":{"fire":-0.1},
		"equip":true,
		"secret":true,
		"indestructible":true,
		"perk":{"cost":25, "levelMin":30, "enhance":true,
				"races":{"highElfM":{"cost":0.75},
						 "highElfF":{"cost":0.75}}
		}
	},
	"perkAnimalFriend":{
		"type":"item",
		"category":"perkAnimalFriend",
		"picture":{"file":"animalFriend.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"friend of animals",
				"FR":"ami des animaux",
				"DE":"tierfreund",
				"JP":"動物の友"},
		"description":{"EN":"This perk increases your pet-related skills.",
					   "FR":"Ce talent augmente vos compétences liées aux animaux.",
					   "DE":"Diese Vergünstigung erhöht Ihre haustierbezogenen Fähigkeiten.",
					   "JP":"家畜関連技能が基礎特性値に応じて向上します。フェリーンは取得が容易です。"},
		"bonus":{"zoology":{"charisma":0.5},
				 "breeding":{"charisma":0.5},
				 "training":{"charisma":0.5},
				 "sheepShearing":{"charisma":0.1}},
		"equip":true,
		"secret":true,
		"indestructible":true,
		"perk":{"cost":9, "enhance":true,
				"races":{"felineM":{"cost":0.5},
						 "felineF":{"cost":0.5}}
			   }
	},
	"perkArmyOfTheDead":{
		"type":"item",
		"category":"perkArmyOfTheDead",
		"picture":{"file":"armyOfTheDead.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"army of the dead",
				"FR":"armée des morts",
				"DE":"armee der toten",
				"JP":"死者の軍団"},
		"description":{"EN":"This perk allows you to invoke skeletons.",
					   "FR":"Ce talent vous permet d'invoquer des squelettes.",
					   "DE":"Diese Vergünstigung erlaubt Ihnen, skelette aufzurufen.",
					   "JP":"スケルトンの召喚術を取得します。ダークエルフは取得が容易です。"},
		"use":{
			"cooldown":{"id":"armyOfTheDead",
						"time":30,
						"off":{"EN":{"D":["I can't use this perk yet."]},
							   "FR":{"D":["Je ne peux pas encore ré-utiliser ce talent."]},
							   "DE":{"D":["Ich kann diese Vergünstigung jetzt nicht benutzen."]},
							   "JP":{"D":["まだスケルトン召喚術を再使用できないな。"]}}},
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":20},
			"create":[{"id":"skeleton", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.2}}],
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":20},
			"xpSkill":{"necromanticMagic":20},
			"effect":"poisonGasEffect",
			"tooMany":{"EN":"No way! There are too many summoned creatures.",
					   "FR":"Impossible ! Il y a déjà trop d'invocations.",
					   "DE":"Auf keinen Fall! Es gibt zu viele Beschwörungen.",
					   "JP":"スケルトンはこれ以上喚べないぞ！"}
		},
		"secret":true,
		"indestructible":true,
		"perk":{"cost":100, "levelMin":100,
				"races":{"darkElfM":{"cost":0.5},
						 "darkElfF":{"cost":0.5},
						 "highElfM":{"cost":0.75},
						 "highElfF":{"cost":0.75}}
			   }
	},
	"perkArtist":{
		"type":"item",
		"category":"perkArtist",
		"picture":{"file":"artist.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"artist",
				"FR":"artiste",
				"DE":"künstler",
				"JP":"芸術家"},
		"description":{"EN":"This perk increases your skills affiliated with stone working.",
					   "FR":"Ce talent augmente vos compétences liées au travail de la pierre.",
					   "DE":"Diese Vergünstigung erhöht die Fähigkeiten, die mit der Arbeit von Stein verbunden sind.",
					   "JP":"石彫刻関連技能が基礎特性値に応じて向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"sculpting":{"address":0.5},
				 "stonecutting":{"strength":0.5}},
		"equip":true,
		"secret":true,
		"indestructible":true,
		"perk":{"cost":6, "enhance":true, "enhance":true}
	},
	"perkAssassin":{

		"category":"perkAssassin",
		"picture":{"file":"assassin.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"assassin",
				"FR":"assassin",
				"DE":"mörder",
				"JP":"暗殺者"},
		"description":{"EN":"This perk increases your light weapons and light armour skills.",
					   "FR":"Ce talent augmente vos compétences d'armes légères et d'armures légères.",
					   "DE":"Diese Vergünstigung erhöht Ihre Fähigkeiten Kleinwaffen und leichte Rüstung.",
					   "JP":"小型武器と軽鎧技能が基礎特性値に応じて向上します。"},

	"perkBottomlessBag":{
		"type":"item",
		"category":"perkBottomlessBag",
		"picture":{"file":"bottomlessBag.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"bottomless bag",
				"FR":"sac sans fond",
				"DE":"Bodenlose Tasche",
				"JP":"底なしバッグ"},
		"description":{"EN":"This talent increases the amount of resources you can carry by 1000 units.",
					   "FR":"Ce talent augmente la quantité de ressources que vous pouvez transporter de 1000 unités.",
					   "DE":"Dieses Talent erhöht die Menge an Ressourcen, die Sie mit 1000 Einheiten tragen können.",
					   "JP":"資源の所持最大数がそれぞれ1,000個増加します。"},
		"resourcesMaxQuantity":1000,

		"secret":true,

		"perk":{"cost":100, "levelMin":100}

					   "FR":"Ce talent augmente votre compétence d'équitation.",

				"FR":"enfant du soleil",

				"JP":"太陽の子"},
		"description":{"EN":"This perk increases your mastery of the magic of light.",
					   "FR":"Ce talent augmente votre maîtrise de la magie de lumière.",
					   "DE":"Diese Vergünstigung erhöht die Beherrschung der leichten magie.",

	"perkElvishBow":{
		"type":"item",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"elvishBow.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"elvish bow",
				"FR":"arc elfique",
				"DE":"Elfenbogen",
				"JP":"エルフの弓"},
		"description":{"EN":"The elvish bow is a powerful bow reserved for elves.",
					   "FR":"L'arc elfique est un puissant arc réservé aux elfes.",
					   "DE":"Der Elfenbogen ist ein mächtiger Bogen, der Elfen vorbehalten ist.",
					   "JP":"エルフの弓はエルフ専用の強力な弓です。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"bows":2.26}},
		"damage":["missile", "piercing"],
		"attackTime":2, "range":450, "missile":"arrow",
		"attack":{
			"costItem":{"arrows":1}
		},
		"sound":"soundBow",
		"anim":"shoot",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":1},
			"xpSkill":{"bows":1}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"secret":true,
		"indestructible":true,
		"perk":{"cost":48, "levelMin":20, "enhance":true,
				"restricted":["elfeM", "elfeF","halfElfM","halfElfF","highElfM","highElfF","darkElfM","darkElfF"],
				"races":{"elfeM":{"cost":0.75},
						 "elfeF":{"cost":0.75}}
			   }
	},
	"perkExcalibur":{
		"type":"item",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"excalibur.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"Excalibur",
				"FR":"Excalibur",
				"DE":"Elfenbogen",
				"JP":"エクスカリバー"},
		"description":{"EN":"Excalibur is an indestructible legendary weapon.",
					   "FR":"Excalibur est une arme légendaire et indestructible.",
					   "DE":"Excalibur ist eine unzerstörbare legendäre Waffe.",
					   "JP":"エクスカリバーは不滅の伝説的な武器です"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"edgedWeapons":1.71}},
		"damage":["closeCombat", "slashing"],
		"attackTime":1,
		"anim":"slash", "scale":1.25,
		"effect":"blade",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"edgedWeapons":0.5}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"secret":true,

		"description":{"EN":"This perk increases your attack and your defence.",
					   "FR":"Ce talent augmente votre attaque et votre défense.",
					   "DE":"Diese Vergünstigung erhöht deinen Angriff und deine Verteidigung.",
					   "JP":"攻撃力と防御力が基礎特性値に応じて向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"strength":0.1},
				 "defense":{"endurance":0.05}},
		"equip":true,
		"secret":true,
		"indestructible":true,
		"perk":{"cost":30, "levelMin":20, "enhance":true}
	},
	"perkWaterDivinerWand":{
		"type":"item",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"waterDivinerWand.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"water diviner wand",
				"FR":"baguette de sourcier",
				"DE":"Wasserspender Zauberstab",
				"JP":"水脈の杖"},
		"description":{"EN":"This wand generates water continuously.",
					   "FR":"Cette baguette génère de l'eau en continu.",
					   "DE":"Dieser Stab erzeugt kontinuierlich Wasser.",
					   "JP":"一定時間ごとに水を入手できます。エルフは取得が容易です。"},
		"autoUse":{
			"time":20,
			"gainRessource":{"water":1}
		},
		"secret":true,
		"indestructible":true,
		"perk":{"cost":35, "levelMin":50, "enhance":true,
				"races":{"elfeM":{"cost":0.8, "levelMin":0.8},
						 "elfeF":{"cost":0.8, "levelMin":0.8}}
				}
	},
	"perkWeightLauncher":{
		"type":"item",
		"category":"perkWeightLauncher",
		"picture":{"file":"weightLauncher.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"weight launcher",
				"FR":"lanceur de poids",
				"DE":"gewicht Launcher",
				"JP":"砲丸投げ"},
		"description":{"EN":"This perk increases your throwing weapons skills.",
					   "FR":"Ce talent augmente vos compétences d'armes de lancer.",
					   "DE":"Diese Vergünstigung erhöht die Waffe.",
					   "JP":"投擲武器技能が基礎特性値に応じて向上します。"},
		"bonus":{"throwingWeapons":{"address":0.5}},
		"equip":true,
		"secret":true,
		"indestructible":true,
		"perk":{"cost":13, "levelMin":30, "enhance":true,
				"races":{"highElfM":{"cost":1.25},
						 "highElfF":{"cost":1.25}}
		}
	},
	"perkWeightlifting":{
		"type":"item",
		"category":"perkWeightlifting",
		"picture":{"file":"weightlifting.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"weightlifting",
				"FR":"musculation",
				"DE":"gewichtheben",
				"JP":"重量挙げ"},
		"description":{"EN":"This perk increases your strength and your endurance.",
					   "FR":"Ce talent augmente votre force et votre endurance.",
					   "DE":"Dieser Vergünstigung erhöht Ihre Kraft und Ihre Ausdauer.",
					   "JP":"筋力と耐久力が向上します。コロッサスは取得が容易です。"},
		"bonus":{"strength":25,
				 "endurance":10},
		"equip":true,
		"secret":true,
		"indestructible":true,
		"perk":{"cost":18, "levelMin":20, "enhance":true,
				"races":{"colossusM":{"cost":0.5, "levelMin":0.5},
						 "colossusF":{"cost":0.5, "levelMin":0.5}}
			   }
	}
}
</file>

<file path="steamAge/items/shields/shields.js">
{
	"largeShield":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"largeShield.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"large shield",
				"FR":"pavois",
				"JP":"大盾"},
		"description":{"EN":"The large shield is a medieval protection made from cast iron.",
					   "FR":"Le pavois est une protection médiévale fabriquée avec des lingots de fonte.",
					   "JP":"中世的な片手持ちの盾。着用者の防御力を高め、近接攻撃と射撃攻撃への耐性を与えますが、電気属性にわずかに弱くなります。鎧工房で鋳鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"defense":{"shields":1}},
		"resistance":{"closeCombat":-0.1, "missile":-0.2, "electricity":0.1},
		"xpDefense":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"shields":0.5}
		},
		"tag":["shield"],
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"upgrade":[{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"time":7.5,
				"gainItem":{"steelShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"steel":5},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":15},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":15},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":15},
				"quantity":-5
		}]
	},
	"mediumShield":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"etherAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"mediumShield.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"medium shield",
				"FR":"écu",
				"JP":"盾"},
		"description":{"EN":"The medium shield is a medieval protection made from cast iron.",
					   "FR":"L'écu est une protection médiévale fabriquée avec des lingots de fonte.",
					   "JP":"中世的な片手持ちの盾。着用者の防御力を高め、近接攻撃と射撃攻撃への耐性を与えますが、電気属性にわずかに弱くなります。鎧工房で鋳鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"defense":{"shields":0.8}},
		"resistance":{"closeCombat":-0.15, "missile":-0.15, "electricity":0.1},
		"xpDefense":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"shields":0.5}
		},
		"tag":["shield"],
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"upgrade":[{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"time":1.5,
				"gainItem":{"largeShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"castIron":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":3},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":3},
				"quantity":-1
			},{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"time":7.5,
				"gainItem":{"steelShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"steel":5},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":15},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":15},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":15},
				"quantity":-5
		}]
	},
	"smallShield":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"smallShield.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"small shield",
				"FR":"rondache",
				"JP":"小盾"},
		"description":{"EN":"The small shield is a medieval protection made from wood and cast iron.",
					   "FR":"La rondache est une protection médiévale fabriquée avec du bois et des lingots de fonte.",
					   "JP":"中世的な片手持ちの盾。着用者の防御力を高め、近接攻撃と射撃攻撃への耐性を与えますが、電気属性にわずかに弱くなります。鎧工房で厚板と鋳鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"defense":{"shields":0.6}},
		"resistance":{"closeCombat":-0.2, "missile":-0.1, "electricity":0.1},
		"xpDefense":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"shields":0.5}
		},
		"tag":["shield"],
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"upgrade":[{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"time":4.5,
				"gainItem":{"mediumShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"castIron":3},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":9},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":9},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":9},
				"quantity":-3
			},{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"time":6,
				"gainItem":{"largeShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"castIron":4},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":12},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":12},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":12},
				"quantity":-4
			},{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"time":7.5,
				"gainItem":{"steelShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"steel":5},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":15},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":15},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":15},
				"quantity":-5
		}]
	},
	"steelShield":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"steelShield.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"steel shield",
				"FR":"bouclier d'acier",
				"JP":"鋼鉄の盾"},
		"description":{"EN":"The steel shield is a modern protection made from steel.",
					   "FR":"Le bouclier d'acier est une protection moderne fabriquée avec de l'acier.",
					   "JP":"現代的な片手持ちの盾。着用者の防御力を高め、近接攻撃と射撃攻撃への耐性を与えますが、電気属性にわずかに弱くなります。鎧工房で鋼鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"defense":{"shields":1.13}},
		"resistance":{"closeCombat":-0.1, "missile":-0.2, "electricity":0.1},
		"xpDefense":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"shields":0.5}
		},
		"tag":["shield"],
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"no":20,
				"time":9,
				"gainItem":{"steelShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"steel":6},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":18},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":18},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":18},
				"quantity":-6
		}]
	},
	"woodenShield":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"woodenShield.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"wooden shield",
				"FR":"targe",
				"JP":"木の盾"},
		"description":{"EN":"The wooden shield is a miedeval protection manufactured from planks.",
					   "FR":"La targe est une protection médiévale fabriquée avec des planches.",
					   "JP":"中世的な片手持ちの盾。着用者の防御力を高め、近接攻撃と射撃攻撃、電気属性への耐性を与えますが、火属性にわずかに弱くなります。鋸台で厚板から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"defense":{"shields":0.4}},
		"resistance":{"closeCombat":-0.2, "missile":-0.1, "fire":0.1, "electricity":-0.1},
		"xpDefense":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"shields":0.5}
		},
		"tag":["shield"],
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"upgrade":[{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"time":2,
				"gainItem":{"smallShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"plank":1, "castIron":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":4},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":4},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":4},
				"quantity":-1
			},{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"time":4.5,
				"gainItem":{"mediumShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"castIron":3},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":9},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":9},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":9},
				"quantity":-3
			},{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"time":6,
				"gainItem":{"largeShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"castIron":4},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":12},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":12},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":12},
				"quantity":-4
			},{
				"workshop":"armoryWorkshop",
				"time":7.5,
				"gainItem":{"steelShield":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"armorsForging",
				"costRessource":{"steel":5},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":15},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":15},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":15},
				"quantity":-5
		}]
	}
}

<file path="steamAge/items/shoes/shoes.js">
{
	"boots":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"category":"feet",
		"picture":{"file":"boots.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"boots",
				"FR":"bottes",
				"JP":"ブーツ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Boots are medieval shoes made from leather.",
					   "FR":"Les bottes sont des chaussures médiévales fabriquées avec du cuir.",
					   "JP":"着用者の持久力と移動速度を向上させる中世的な革靴。靴作り場でなめし革から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"stamina":{"shoes":0.15}, "speed":1},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"stamina":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"shoes":1}
				}
		},

		"upgrade":[{

				"time":1.5,
				"gainItem":{"studdedBoots":1},

				"gainItem":{"balShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"goldBar":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":10},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":10},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":10},
				"quantity":-10
			},{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",

				"gainItem":{"mageShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":6},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":6},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":6},
				"quantity":-6
			},{

				"time":6,
				"gainItem":{"sevenPlacesBoots":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":6},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":12},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":12},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":12},
				"quantity":-12
			},{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":8,
				"gainItem":{"wingedShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":8},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":16},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":16},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":16},
				"quantity":-16
			}]
	},
	"bootsOfTheNorth":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"feet",
		"picture":{"file":"bootsOfTheNorth.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"Nordic boots",
				"FR":"bottes nordiques",
				"JP":"北方民のブーツ"},
		"description":{"EN":"The Nordic boots protect you against the cold.",
					   "FR":"Les bottes nordiques vous protègent contre le froid.",
					   "JP":"着用者の移動速度を向上させ、氷属性への耐性を与える革靴。野営地で羊皮紙から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"speed":1},
		"resistance":{"ice":-0.4},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"health":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"shoes":1}
				}
		},
		"equip":true
	},
	"chainLeggings":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"category":"feet",
		"picture":{"file":"chainLeggings.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"chain leggings",
				"FR":"jambières de mailles",
				"JP":"鎖のすね当て"},
		"description":{"EN":"Chain leggings are battle shoes made from cast iron.",
					   "FR":"Les jambières de mailles sont des chausses de combat fabriquées avec de la fonte.",
					   "JP":"着用者の体力と移動速度を向上させる戦闘用靴。電気属性にわずかに弱くなります。靴作り場で鋳鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"health":{"shoes":0.2}, "speed":0.75},
		"resistance":{"electricity":0.1},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"health":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"endurance":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"shoes":1}
				}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"upgrade":[{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":1.5,
				"gainItem":{"plateBoots":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"castIron":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":3},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":3},
				"quantity":-3
			}]
	},
	"furShoes":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"woodenAge",
		"category":"feet",
		"picture":{"file":"furShoes.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"fur shoes",
				"FR":"chaussures de fourrure",
				"JP":"毛皮の靴"},
		"description":{"EN":"Fur shoes are prehistoric shoes made from leather.",
					   "FR":"Les chaussures de fourrure sont des chaussures préhistoriques fabriquées avec du cuir.",
					   "JP":"着用者の持久力と移動速度を向上させ、氷属性への耐性をわずかに与える有史以前の革靴。製革所でなめし革から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"stamina":{"shoes":0.05}, "speed":0.75},
		"resistance":{"ice":-0.1},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"stamina":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"shoes":1}
				}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"upgrade":[{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":0.5,
				"gainItem":{"sandals":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":1},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":1},
				"quantity":-1
			},{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":1,
				"gainItem":{"boots":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":2},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":2},
				"quantity":-2
			},{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":2.5,
				"gainItem":{"studdedBoots":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":2, "castIron":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":5},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":5},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":5},
				"quantity":-5
			},{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":1.5,
				"gainItem":{"urbanShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":3},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":3},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":3},
				"quantity":-3
			},{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":3,
				"gainItem":{"sorcererShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":2, "crystals":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":6},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":6},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":6},
				"quantity":-6
			},{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":6,
				"gainItem":{"balShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":2, "goldBar":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":12},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":12},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":12},
				"quantity":-12
			},{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":4,
				"gainItem":{"mageShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":4, "crystals":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":8},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":8},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":8},
				"quantity":-8
			},{

				"time":8,
				"gainItem":{"sevenPlacesBoots":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":8},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":16},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":16},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":16},
				"quantity":-16
			},{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":10,
				"gainItem":{"wingedShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":10},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":20},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":20},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":20},
				"quantity":-20
			}]
	},
	"sandals":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"category":"feet",
		"picture":{"file":"sandals.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"sandals",
				"FR":"sandales",
				"JP":"革のサンダル"},
		"description":{"EN":"Sandals are antique shoes made from leather.",
					   "FR":"Les sandales sont des chaussures antiques fabriquées avec du cuir.",
					   "JP":"着用者の持久力と移動速度を向上させる古風な革靴。靴作り場でなめし革から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"stamina":{"shoes":0.1}, "speed":1},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"stamina":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"shoes":1}
				}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"upgrade":[{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":0.5,
				"gainItem":{"boots":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",

				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":1},

				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":4},

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":5},

				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":7},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":7},

				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":14},
