	},
	"sevenPlacesBoots":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"feet",
		"picture":{"file":"sevenPlacesBoots.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"seven-league boots",
				"FR":"bottes des sept lieux",
				"JP":"セブンリーグブーツ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Seven-league boots are shoes which increase your walking speed.",
					   "FR":"Les bottes des sept lieux sont des chaussures qui améliorent votre vitesse de marche.",
					   "JP":"着用者の移動速度を大きく向上させる革靴。靴作り場でなめし革から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"speed":1.5},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"stamina":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"shoes":1}
				}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"upgrade":[{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":2,
				"gainItem":{"wingedShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":4},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":4},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":4},
				"quantity":-4
		}]
	},
	"sorcererShoes":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"etherAge",
		"category":"feet",
		"picture":{"file":"sorcererShoes.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"sorcerer shoes",
				"FR":"chaussures de sorcier",
				"JP":"魔術師の靴"},
		"description":{"EN":"The sorcerer shoes are magical shoes made from leather and crystal.",
					   "FR":"Les chaussures de sorcier sont des chaussures magiques fabriquées avec du cuir et des cristaux.",
					   "JP":"着用者の魔力と移動速度を向上させ、魔法属性への耐性をわずかに与える革靴。靴作り場でなめし革と水晶から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"mana":{"shoes":0.20}, "speed":1},
		"resistance":{"magic":-0.1},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"mana":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"shoes":1}
				}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"upgrade":[{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":1,
				"gainItem":{"mageShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":2},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":2},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":2},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":2},
				"quantity":-2
			}]
	},

		"age":"etherAge",
		"category":"feet",
		"picture":{"file":"urbanShoes.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"urban shoes",
				"FR":"chaussures citadines",
				"JP":"アーバンシューズ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Urban shoes are medieval shoes made from leather.",
					   "FR":"Les chaussures citadines sont des chaussures médiévales fabriquées avec du cuir.",
					   "JP":"着用者の持久力と移動速度を向上させる中世的な革靴。靴作り場でなめし革から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"stamina":{"shoes":0.20}, "speed":1},
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{

				"costRessource":{"crystals":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":4},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":4},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":4},

				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":10},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":10},
				"xpSkill":{"shoemaking":10},
				"quantity":-10
			},{
				"workshop":"shoemakingWorkshop",
				"time":2.5,
				"gainItem":{"mageShoes":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",
				"costRessource":{"leather":1, "crystals":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":5},

				"bonusTimeSkill":"shoemaking",

	"wingedShoes":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"feet",
		"picture":{"file":"wingedShoes.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"winged shoes",
				"FR":"chaussures ailées",
				"JP":"翼の靴"},
		"description":{"EN":"Winged shoes allow you to fly.",
					   "FR":"Les chaussures ailées vous permettent de voler.",
					   "JP":"着用者に飛行能力を与え、移動速度を向上させる革靴。靴作り場でなめし革から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"speed":1},
		"flying":true,
		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{

				"quantity":-24
			}]
	}
}

<file path="steamAge/items/spells/spells.js">
{
	"blessingBook":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"blessingBook.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"book of blessing",
				"FR":"livre de bénédiction",
				"JP":"祝福の書"},
		"description":{"EN":"Use a book of blessing to temporary increase your characteristics.",
					   "FR":"Le livre de bénédiction augmente temporairement vos caractéristiques.",
					   "JP":"体力、持久力、魔力を一時的に向上させる救済魔術の媒体。光の祭壇で紙から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":50},
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"blessing":{"redemptiveMagic":1}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":50},
			"xpSkill":{"redemptiveMagic":50},
			"effect":"bonusEffect"
		},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"redemptiveAltar",
				"no":11,
				"time":6,
				"gainItem":{"blessingBook":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"redemptiveMagic",
				"costRessource":{"paper":6},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":12},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":12},
				"xpSkill":{"redemptiveMagic":12},
				"quantity":-12
		}]
	},
	"lichTransformationBook":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"lichTransformationBook.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"book of lich transformation",
				"FR":"livre de transformation en liche",
				"JP":"リッチ変化の書"},
		"description":{"EN":"Use a book of lich transformation to temporary increase your health and your black magic power.",
					   "FR":"Le livre de transformation en liche augmente temporairement votre vie et votre puissance de magie noire.",
					   "JP":"一定時間リッチに変化し、体力と、魔力及び回復速度を一時的に向上させると共に、暗黒の鎧を纏う死霊術の媒体。闇の祭壇で紙から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":50},
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"lichTransformation":{"necromanticMagic":1}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":50},
			"xpSkill":{"necromanticMagic":50},
			"effect":"poisonGasEffect"
		}
	},
	"lycanthropyBook":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"lycanthropyBook.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"book of lycanthropy",
				"FR":"livre de lycanthropie",
				"JP":"獣人変化の書"},
		"description":{"EN":"Transform yourself into a werewolf to increase your life and your health regeneration.",
					   "FR":"La transformation en loup-garou accroît votre vie et votre régénération de santé.",
					   "JP":"一定時間人狼に変化し、体力及び回復速度と、狩猟技能を一時的に向上させる祈祷術の媒体。祈祷所で紙から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":50},
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"werewolfTransformation":{"shamanicMagic":1}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":50},
			"xpSkill":{"shamanicMagic":50},
			"effect":"bonusEffect"
		},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"shamanicAltar",
				"no":17,
				"time":6,
				"gainItem":{"lycanthropyBook":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shamanicMagic",
				"costRessource":{"paper":6},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":12},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":12},
				"xpSkill":{"redemptiveMagic":12},
				"quantity":-12
		}]
	},
	"summonMummyScroll":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"summonMummyScroll.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"scroll of mummy summoning",
				"FR":"parchemin d'invocation de momie",
				"JP":"マミー召喚の巻物"},
		"description":{"EN":"Use a scroll of mummy summoning to summon mummies which will help your to fight.",
					   "FR":"Le parchemin d'invocation de momie vous permet d'invoquer des momies pour vous aider au combat.",
					   "JP":"共に戦ってくれるマミーを召喚する死霊術の媒体。使用すると消失します。闇の祭壇で羊皮紙から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"cooldown":{"id":"summonMummy",
						"time":16,
						"off":{"EN":{"D":["I can't use this scroll yet."]},
							   "FR":{"D":["Je ne peux pas encore ré-utiliser ce parchemin."]},
							   "JP":{"D":["まだマミー召喚の巻物を追加使用できないな。"]}}},
			"quantity":-1,
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":40},
			"create":[{"id":"mummy", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.4}},
					  {"id":"mummy", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.4}},
					  {"id":"mummy", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.4}},
					  {"id":"mummy", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.4}}],
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":40},
			"xpSkill":{"necromanticMagic":40},
			"effect":"poisonGasEffect",
			"tooMany":{"EN":"No way! There are too many summoned creatures.",
					   "FR":"Impossible ! Il y a déjà trop d'invocations.",
					   "JP":"マミーはこれ以上喚べないぞ！"}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"necromanticMagic":1}
	},
	"summonNightmareScroll":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"summonNightmareScroll.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"scroll of nightmare summoning",
				"FR":"parchemin d'invocation de cheval de cauchemar",
				"JP":"ナイトメア召喚の巻物"},
		"description":{"EN":"Use a scroll of nightmare summoning  to summon a powerful mount.",
					   "FR":"Le parchemin d'invocation de cheval de cauchemar vous permet d'invoquer une puissante monture.",
					   "JP":"強力な騎乗生物であるナイトメアを召喚する死霊術の媒体。使用すると消失します。闇の祭壇で羊皮紙から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"quantity":-1,
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":80},
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"mountNightmare":{"necromanticMagic":1}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":80},
			"xpSkill":{"necromanticMagic":80},
			"effect":"poisonGasEffect"
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"necromanticMagic":1}
	},
	"summonReaperScroll":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"summonReaperScroll.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"scroll of reaper summoning",
				"FR":"scroll of reaper summoning",
				"JP":"リーパー召喚の巻物"},
		"description":{"EN":"Use a scroll of reaper summoning to summon a terrible reaper which will help your to fight.",
					   "FR":"Le parchemin d'invocation de faucheuse vous permet d'invoquer une redoutable faucheuse pour vous aider au combat.",
					   "JP":"共に戦ってくれるリーパーを召喚する死霊術の媒体。使用すると消失します。闇の祭壇で羊皮紙から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"cooldown":{"id":"summonReaper",
						"time":10,
						"off":{"EN":{"D":["I can't use this scroll yet."]},
							   "FR":{"D":["Je ne peux pas encore ré-utiliser ce parchemin."]},
							   "JP":{"D":["まだリーパー召喚の巻物を追加使用できないな。"]}}},
			"quantity":-1,
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":50},
			"create":[{"id":"reaper", "power":{"necromanticMagic":1}}],
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":50},
			"xpSkill":{"necromanticMagic":50},
			"effect":"poisonGasEffect",
			"tooMany":{"EN":"No way! There are too many summoned creatures.",
					   "FR":"Impossible ! Il y a déjà trop d'invocations.",
					   "JP":"リーパーはこれ以上喚べないぞ！"}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"necromanticMagic":1}
	},
	"summonSkeletonScroll":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"etherAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"summonSkeletonScroll.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"scroll of skeleton summoning",
				"FR":"parchemin d'invocations de squelette",
				"JP":"スケルトン召喚の巻物"},
		"description":{"EN":"Use a scroll of skeleton summoning to summon skeletons which will help your to fight.",
					   "FR":"Le parchemin d'invocation de squelette vous permet d'invoquer des squelettes pour vous aider au combat.",
					   "JP":"共に戦ってくれるスケルトンを召喚する死霊術の媒体。使用すると消失します。闇の祭壇で羊皮紙から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"cooldown":{"id":"summonSkeleton",
						"time":8,
						"off":{"EN":{"D":["I can't use this scroll yet."]},
							   "FR":{"D":["Je ne peux pas encore ré-utiliser ce parchemin."]},
							   "JP":{"D":["まだスケルトン召喚の巻物を追加使用できないな。"]}}},
			"quantity":-1,
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":20},
			"create":[{"id":"skeleton", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.2}},
					  {"id":"skeleton", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.2}},
					  {"id":"skeleton", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.2}},
					  {"id":"skeleton", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.2}}],
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":20},
			"xpSkill":{"necromanticMagic":20},
			"effect":"poisonGasEffect",
			"tooMany":{"EN":"No way! There are too many summoned creatures.",
					   "FR":"Impossible ! Il y a déjà trop d'invocations.",
					   "JP":"スケルトンはこれ以上喚べないぞ！"}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"necromanticMagic":1}
	},
	"summonZombieScroll":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"summonZombieScroll.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"scroll of zombie summoning",
				"FR":"parchemin d'invocation de zombie",
				"JP":"ゾンビ召喚の巻物"},
		"description":{"EN":"Use a scroll of zombie summoning to summon zombies which will help your to fight.",
					   "FR":"Le parchemin d'invocation de zombie vous permet d'invoquer des zombies pour vous aider au combat.",
					   "JP":"共に戦ってくれるゾンビを召喚する死霊術の媒体。使用すると消失します。闇の祭壇で羊皮紙から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"cooldown":{"id":"summonZombie",
						"time":12,
						"off":{"EN":{"D":["I can't use this scroll yet."]},
							   "FR":{"D":["Je ne peux pas encore ré-utiliser ce parchemin."]},
							   "JP":{"D":["まだゾンビ召喚の巻物を追加使用できないな。"]}}},
			"quantity":-1,
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":30},
			"create":[{"id":"zombie", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.3}},
					  {"id":"zombie", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.3}},
					  {"id":"zombie", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.3}},
					  {"id":"zombie", "power":{"necromanticMagic":0.3}}],
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":30},
			"xpSkill":{"necromanticMagic":30},
			"effect":"poisonGasEffect",
			"tooMany":{"EN":"No way! There are too many summoned creatures.",
					   "FR":"Impossible ! Il y a déjà trop d'invocations.",
					   "JP":"ゾンビはこれ以上喚べないぞ！"}
		},
		"maxQuantity":{"necromanticMagic":1}
	},
	"vitalityBook":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"edible",
		"picture":{"file":"vitalityBook.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"book of vitality",
				"FR":"livre de vitalité",
				"JP":"生命の書"},
		"description":{"EN":"Use a book of vitalty to temporary increase your health and your endurance.",
					   "FR":"Le livre de vitalité augmente temporairement votre vie et votre endurance.",
					   "JP":"体力と耐久力を一時的に向上させる祈祷術の媒体。祈祷所で紙から製造できます。"},
		"use":{
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":50},
			"gainTemporaryItem":{"vitality":{"shamanicMagic":1}},
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":50},
			"xpSkill":{"shamanicMagic":50},
			"effect":"bonusEffect"
		},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"shamanicAltar",
				"no":16,
				"time":6,
				"gainItem":{"vitalityBook":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"shamanicMagic",
				"costRessource":{"paper":6},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":12},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"willpower":12},
				"xpSkill":{"redemptiveMagic":12},
				"quantity":-12
		}]
	}
}
</file>

{
	"adjustableWrench":{

					   "JP":"片手持ちのゴーレム工学補助道具。鈍器としても使用可能です。鉄製品工房で鋼鉄から製造できます。"},

		"name":{"EN":"backpack",
				"FR":"sac à dos",

		"description":{"EN":"The backpack allows you to carry more resources.",
					   "FR":"Le sac à dos vous permet de transporter plus de ressources.",
					   "JP":"背負い式の道具袋。着用者の持久力を向上させ、資源の所持最大数をそれぞれ50個増加させます。革工房でなめし革から製造できます。"},

		"xpPrimaryCharacteristic":{
			"stamina":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"rapidity":0.125},
				"xpSkill":{"tools":0.25}
				}
		},
		"equip":true
	},

<file path="steamAge/items/weapons/magic/magicWeapons.js">
{
	"boneSpearStaff":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"boneSpearStaff.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"bone-spear staff",
				"FR":"bâton de lance d'os",
				"JP":"骨槍の杖"},
		"description":{"EN":"The bone-spear staff is a magical two-handed weapon made from wood and paper.",
					   "FR":"Le bâton de lance d'os est une arme magique à deux mains fabriquée avec du bois et du papier.",
					   "JP":"貫通する骨槍を放つ、両手持ちの混沌魔術発動体。闇の祭壇で木材と羊皮紙から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"chaoticMagic":2.5}},
		"attackTime":2, "range":400, "missile":"boneSpearMissile", "special":{"pierce":true},
		"damage":["magic", "death"],
		"anim":"magic", "scale":1.25,
		"attack":{
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":3}
		},
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":1},
			"xpSkill":{"chaoticMagic":1}
		},
		"equip":true
	},
	"brightLightStaff":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"brightLightStaff.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"bright light staff",
				"FR":"bâton de lumière intense",
				"JP":"光明の杖"},
		"description":{"EN":"The bright light staff is a magical two-handed weapon made from wood and paper.",
					   "FR":"Le bâton de lumière intense est une arme magique à deux mains fabriquée avec du bois et du papier.",
					   "JP":"誘導し、当たった標的を一時的に盲目にする光玉を前方5方向に放つ、両手持ちの鎮圧魔術発動体。光の祭壇で木材と紙から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"repressiveMagic":0.5}},
		"attackTime":2, "range":450, "missile":"lightOrb",
		"damage":["magic", "light"],
		"anim":"magic", "scale":1.25,
		"attacks":[{"range":675, "damage":["magic", "light"], "missile":"lightOrb", "angle":2, "selfGuided":0.2, "penality":{"id":"blind", "time":5}},
				   {"range":675, "damage":["magic", "light"], "missile":"lightOrb", "angle":1.35, "selfGuided":0.2, "penality":{"id":"blind", "time":5}},
				   {"range":675, "damage":["magic", "light"], "missile":"lightOrb", "angle":0, "selfGuided":0.2, "penality":{"id":"blind", "time":5}},
				   {"range":675, "damage":["magic", "light"], "missile":"lightOrb", "angle":-1.35, "selfGuided":0.2, "penality":{"id":"blind", "time":5}},
				   {"range":675, "damage":["magic", "light"], "missile":"lightOrb", "angle":-2, "selfGuided":0.2, "penality":{"id":"blind", "time":5}}],
		"attack":{
			"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":5}
		},
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":0.2},
			"xpSkill":{"repressiveMagic":0.2}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"redemptiveAltar",
				"no":10,
				"time":21,
				"gainItem":{"brightLightStaff":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"enchantment",
				"costRessource":{"wood":14, "paper":14},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":42},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":42},
				"xpSkill":{"enchantment":42},
				"quantity":-21
		}]
	},
	"brightMultipleFireScepter":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"brightMultipleFireScepter.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"multiple bright fire sceptre",
				"FR":"sceptre de feu multiple intense",
				"JP":"複炎光の短杖"},
		"description":{"EN":"The multiple bright fire sceptre can throw 5 fireballs.",
					   "FR":"Le sceptre de feu multiple intense projette 5 boules de feu.",
					   "JP":"一定範囲を巻き込む火弾を前方5方向に放つ、片手持ちの火工魔術発動体。火の祭壇で木材と紙から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"pyrotechnicMagic":1.25}},
		"attackTime":4, "range":400, "missile":"fireshot",
		"special":{"area":{"attack":{"pyrotechnicMagic":0.225}, "range":16, "effect":"miniExplosion"}},

				   {"range":400, "damage":["magic", "fire"], "missile":"fireshot", "angle":-0.15, "special":{"area":{"attack":{"pyrotechnicMagic":0.225}, "range":16, "effect":"miniExplosion"}}},
				   {"range":400, "damage":["magic", "fire"], "missile":"fireshot", "angle":-0.3, "special":{"area":{"attack":{"pyrotechnicMagic":0.225}, "range":16, "effect":"miniExplosion"}}}],
		"attack":{

		"description":{"EN":"The cristal star staff is a magical two-handed weapon which can throw 12 crystal shards.",

					   "JP":"誘導し、当たった標的の移動速度を一時的に下げる氷弾と水晶ボルトを6発づつ放つ、両手持ちの妖術発動体。祈祷所で木材と水晶から製造できます。"},

				   {"range":450, "damage":["magic", "ice"], "missile":"iceBolt", "fixedAngle":0.52, "attackDX":14, "attackDY":8, "attackDelay":1, "selfGuided":0.2, "penality":{"id":"slowdown", "time":5}},
				   {"range":900, "damage":["magic", "ice"], "missile":"cristalBolt", "fixedAngle":2.09, "attackDX":8, "attackDY":-14, "attackDelay":1, "selfGuided":0.02, "penality":{"id":"slowdown", "time":5}},
				   {"range":900, "damage":["magic", "ice"], "missile":"cristalBolt", "fixedAngle":-1.05, "attackDX":-8, "attackDY":14, "attackDelay":1, "selfGuided":0.02, "penality":{"id":"slowdown", "time":5}},
				   {"range":900, "damage":["magic", "ice"], "missile":"cristalBolt", "fixedAngle":1.05, "attackDX":-8, "attackDY":-14, "attackDelay":1, "selfGuided":0.02, "penality":{"id":"slowdown", "time":5}},

	"thunderHammer":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"thunderHammer.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"thunder hammer",
				"FR":"marteau de tonnerre",
				"JP":"雷の槌"},
		"description":{"EN":"The thunder hammer is a hammer which can throw lightning.",
					   "FR":"Le marteau de tonnerre est un marteau qui projette de la foudre.",
					   "JP":"雷を標的に直接投射する妖術発動体の機能も備えた、片手持ちの鈍器。祈祷所で木材と鋳鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"bluntWeapons":3}},
		"damage":["closeCombat", "crushing"],
		"attackTime":1.5,
		"anim":"slash",
		"effect":"shock",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"bluntWeapons":0.5}
		},
		"addItems":[{
			"id":"thunderHammer",
			"category":"weapon",
			"bonus":{"attack":{"druidicMagic":0.9}},
			"attackTime":2, "range":50,
			"damage":["magic", "electricity"],
			"effect":"lightningImpact","effectLine":"lightningLine",
			"attack":{
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"mana":4}
			},
			"anim":"slash",
			"xpAttack":{
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"intelligence":0.5},
				"xpSkill":{"druidicMagic":0.5}
			}}],
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"shamanicAltar",
				"no":14,
				"time":12,
				"gainItem":{"thunderHammer":1},
				"bonusTimeSkill":"weaponsForging",
				"costRessource":{"wood":9, "castIron":5},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":24},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":24},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":24},
				"quantity":-12
		}]
	}
}

<file path="steamAge/items/weapons/range/rangeWeapons.js">
{
	"assegai":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"woodenAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"assegai.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"assegai",
				"FR":"sagaie",
				"JP":"アセガイ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Assegais are primitive throwing weapons made from wood.",
					   "FR":"Les sagaies sont des armes de lancer primitives fabriquée en bois.",
					   "JP":"原始的な片手持ちの投擲武器。野営地で木材から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"throwingWeapons":0.2}},
		"attackTime":1.5, "range":112, "missile":"assegaiMissile",
		"damage":["missile", "crushing"],
		"attack":{
			"costItem":{"assegai":1}
		},
		"sound":"soundThrow",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"throwingWeapons":0.5}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"throwingWeapons":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any assegai."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de sagaies."]},
				"JP":{"D":["アセガイを持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough assegais."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de sagaies."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分なアセガイがないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of assegais."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de sagaie"]},
			   "JP":{"D":["アセガイが尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many assegais."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de sagaies."]},
				"JP":{"D":["アセガイはこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"huntingCamp",
				"no":2.5,
				"time":0.5,
				"gainItem":{"assegai":5},
				"bonusSkill":"hunting",
				"costRessource":{"wood":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":1},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":1},
				"xpSkill":{"hunting":1},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-1
		}]
	},
	"backMissileLauncher":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"category":"back",
		"picture":{"file":"backMissileLauncher.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"back missile launcher",
				"FR":"lance-missiles dorsal",
				"JP":"背負い式マイクロミサイルランチャー"},
		"description":{"EN":"The back missile launcher allows you to fire micro-missiles without using your hands. It requires micro-missiles as ammo.",
					   "FR":"Le lance-missiles dorsal permet de tirer des missiles sans les mains. Il requiert des micro missiles comme munitions.",
					   "JP":"一定範囲を巻き込むマイクロミサイルを2発射出する、背負い式の銃器。造兵廠で鋼鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"firearms":4}},
		"damage":["missile", "demolition"],
		"attackTime":6, "range":500, "missile":"microMissile",
		"attacks":[{"range":500, "damage":["missile", "demolition"], "missile":"microMissile", "fixedAngle":-1.57, "attackDX":10, "selfGuided":0.125,
						"special":{"area":{"attack":{"firearms":1.05}, "range":32, "effect":"miniExplosion"}}},
				   {"range":500, "damage":["missile", "demolition"], "missile":"microMissile", "fixedAngle":-1.57, "attackDX":-10, "selfGuided":0.125,
						"special":{"area":{"attack":{"firearms":1.05}, "range":32, "effect":"miniExplosion"}}}],
		"attack":{
			"costItem":{"microRockets":2}
		},
		"sound":"soundRocket",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.125},
			"xpSkill":{"firearms":0.125}
		},
		"equip":true
	},
	"boomerang":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"boomerang.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"boomerang",
				"FR":"boomerang",
				"JP":"ブーメラン"},
		"description":{"EN":"The boomerang is a throwing weapon that comes back into the hand of its thrower if it misses its target.",
					   "FR":"Le boomerang est une arme de lancer qui revient dans la main de son lanceur si elle manque sa cible.",
					   "JP":"片手持ちの投擲武器。外れた場合は手元に戻ってこようとします。野営地で木材から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"throwingWeapons":0.4}},
		"damage":["missile", "crushing"],
		"attackTime":1.5, "range":200, "missile":"boomerangMissile",
		"special":{"back":{"boomerang":1}},
		"attack":{
			"costItem":{"boomerang":1}
		},
		"sound":"soundThrow",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"throwingWeapons":0.5}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"throwingWeapons":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any boomerang."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de boomerangs."]},
				"JP":{"D":["ブーメランを持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough boomerangs."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de boomerangs."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分なブーメランがないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of boomerang."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de boomerangs."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["ブーメランが尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many boomerangs."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de boomerangs."]},
				"JP":{"D":["ブーメランはこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},

		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"bow.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"bow",
				"FR":"arc",
				"JP":"弓"},
		"description":{"EN":"The bow is an antique two-handed range weapon made from wood.",
					   "FR":"L'arc est une arme de tir médiévale à deux mains fabriquée en bois.",

		"name":{"EN":"composite bow",
				"FR":"arc composite",
				"JP":"合成弓"},

					   "FR":"L'arc composite est une puissante arme de tir à deux mains fabriquée en bois.",
					   "JP":"各種の矢を放つ、強力な両手持ちの弓。射場で木材から製造できます。"},

					   "FR":"L'arc à poulies est une arme de tir moderne à deux mains fabriquée en bois et en acier.",
					   "JP":"各種の矢を放つ、現代的な両手持ちの弓。射場で木材と鋼鉄から製造できます。"},

		"name":{"EN":"crossbow",
				"FR":"arbalète",
				"JP":"クロスボウ"},
		"description":{"EN":"The crossbow is a medieval two-handed range weapon made from cast iron.",
					   "FR":"L'arbalète est une arme de tir médiévale à deux mains fabriquée avec de la fonte.",
					   "JP":"各種のボルトを放つ、中世的な両手持ちの射撃武器。射場で鋳鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"shootingWeapons":1.5}},

		"name":{"EN":"disk thrower",
				"FR":"lance-disques",
				"JP":"ディスク投射機"},

		"description":{"EN":"The steel boomerang is a throwing weapon that comes back into the hand of its thrower if it misses its target.",
					   "FR":"Le boomerang d'acier est une arme de lancer qui revient dans la main de son lanceur si elle manque sa cible.",
					   "JP":"片手持ちの投擲武器。外れた場合は手元に戻ってこようとします。野営地で鋼鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"throwingWeapons":0.75}},
		"damage":["missile", "slashing"],
		"attackTime":1.5, "range":350, "missile":"steelBoomerangMissile",
		"special":{"back":{"steelBoomerang":1}},
		"attack":{
			"costItem":{"steelBoomerang":1}
		},
		"sound":"soundThrow",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"throwingWeapons":0.5}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"throwingWeapons":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any steel boomerangs."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de boomerangs d'acier."]},
				"JP":{"D":["鋼鉄のブーメランを持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough steel boomerangs."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de boomerangs d'acier."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な鋼鉄のブーメランがないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of steel boomerangs."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de boomerangs d'acier."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["鋼鉄のブーメランが尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many steel boomerangs."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de boomerangs d'acier."]},
				"JP":{"D":["鋼鉄のブーメランはこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"stoneJavelin":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"stoneJavelin.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"stone javelin",
				"FR":"javelot de pierre",
				"JP":"石投げ槍"},
		"description":{"EN":"Stone javelins are rudimentary throwing weapons made from wood and stone.",
					   "FR":"Les javelots de pierre sont des armes de lancer rudimentaires fabriquées en bois et en pierre.",
					   "JP":"原始的な片手持ちの投擲武器。野営地で木材と石材から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"throwingWeapons":0.4}},
		"damage":["missile", "piercing"],
		"attackTime":1.5, "range":200, "missile":"stoneJavelinMissile",
		"attack":{
			"costItem":{"stoneJavelin":1}
		},
		"sound":"soundThrow",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"throwingWeapons":0.5}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"throwingWeapons":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any stone javelins."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de javelots de pierre."]},
				"JP":{"D":["石投げ槍を持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough stone javelins."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de javelots de pierre."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な石投げ槍がないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of stone javelins."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de javelots de pierre."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["石投げ槍が尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many stone javelins."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de javelots de pierre."]},
				"JP":{"D":["石投げ槍はこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"throwingAxe":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"goldenAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"throwingAxe.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"throwing axe",
				"FR":"hache de lancer",
				"JP":"投げ斧"},
		"description":{"EN":"Throwing axes are weapons made from cast iron.",
					   "FR":"Les haches de lancer sont des armes fabriquées avec des lingots de fonte.",
					   "JP":"片手持ちの投擲武器。射場で鋳鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"throwingWeapons":0.5, "axes":0.5}},
		"damage":["slashing"],
		"attackTime":2, "range":225, "missile":"throwingAxeMissile",
		"attack":{
			"costItem":{"throwingAxe":1}
		},
		"sound":"soundThrow",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.25, "strength":0.25},
			"xpSkill":{"throwingWeapons":0.25, "axes":0.25}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"throwingWeapons":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any throwing axes."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de haches de lancer."]},
				"JP":{"D":["投げ斧を持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough throwing axes."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de haches de lancer."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な投げ斧がないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of throwing axes."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de haches de lancer."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["投げ斧が尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many throwing axes."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de haches de lancer."]},
				"JP":{"D":["投げ斧はこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"archeryCamp",
				"no":10,
				"time":4.5,
				"gainItem":{"throwingAxe":20},
				"bonusSkill":"hunting",
				"costRessource":{"castIron":3},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":9},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":9},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":9},
				"repeat":true,
				"quantity":-9
		}]
	},
	"throwingKnife":{
		"type":"item",
		"age":"ironAge",
		"category":"weapon",
		"picture":{"file":"throwingKnife.atf"},
		"name":{"EN":"throwing knife",
				"FR":"couteau de lancer",
				"JP":"投げナイフ"},
		"description":{"EN":"Throwing knives are weapons made from cast iron.",
					   "FR":"Les couteaux de lancer sont des armes fabriquées avec des lingots de fonte.",
					   "JP":"片手持ちの投擲武器。射場で鋳鉄から製造できます。"},
		"bonus":{"attack":{"throwingWeapons":0.3, "lightWeapons":0.3}},
		"damage":["missile", "piercing"],
		"attackTime":1.5, "range":188, "missile":"throwingKnifeMissile",
		"attack":{
			"costItem":{"throwingKnife":1}
		},
		"sound":"soundThrow",
		"xpAttack":{
			"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"address":0.5},
			"xpSkill":{"throwingWeapons":0.25, "lightWeapons":0.25}
		},
		"equip":true,
		"oneHand":true,
		"maxQuantity":{"throwingWeapons":1},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any throwing knives."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de couteaux de lancer."]},
				"JP":{"D":["投げナイフを持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough throwing knives."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de couteaux de lancer."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な投げナイフがないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of throwing knives."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de couteaux de lancer."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["投げナイフが尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too many throwing knives."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de couteaux de lancer."]},
				"JP":{"D":["投げナイフはこれ以上持てないな。"]}},
		"produce":[{
				"workshop":"archeryCamp",
				"no":4.5,
				"time":1.5,
				"gainItem":{"throwingKnife":10},
				"bonusSkill":"hunting",
				"costRessource":{"castIron":1},
				"costPrimaryCharacteristic":{"stamina":3},
				"xpSecondaryCharacteristic":{"strength":3},
				"xpSkill":{"weaponsForging":3},
				"repeat":true,

		}]
	}
}

<file path="steamAge/resources/resources.js">
{
	"water":{
		"type":"ressource",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":10.5,
		"maxQuantity":{"picking":1},
		"value":0.25,
		"picture":{"file":"water.png"},
		"gain":{"stamina":3},
		"name":{"EN":"water",
				"FR":"eau",
				"DE":"Wasser",
				"JP":"水"},
		"description":{"EN":"You can drink water or use it for cooking.",
					   "FR":"L'eau peut être bue ou utilisée en cuisine.",
					   "DE":"Wasser kann getrunken und in der Küche serviert werden.",
					   "JP":"調理用途だけでなく、飲んで持久力の回復もできます。"},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any water."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas d'eau."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe kein Wasser."]},
				"JP":{"D":["水を持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough water."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez d'eau."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe nicht genug Wasser."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な水がないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of water."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus d'eau."]},
			   "DE":{"D":["Ich habe kein Wasser."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["水が尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too much water."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum d'eau."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe das Maximum an Wasser."]},
				"JP":{"D":["水はこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"milk":{
		"type":"ressource",
		"age":"stoneAge",
		"no":10.75,
		"maxQuantity":{"breeding":1},
		"value":1,
		"picture":{"file":"milk.png"},
		"gain":{"stamina":6},
		"name":{"EN":"milk",
				"FR":"lait",
				"DE":"Milch",
				"JP":"牛乳"},
		"description":{"EN":"You can drink milk or use it for cooking.",
					   "FR":"Le lait peut être bu ou utilisé en cuisine.",
					   "DE":"Milch kann getrunken und in der Küche serviert werden.",
					   "JP":"調理用途だけでなく、飲んで持久力の回復もできます。"},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any milk."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de lait."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe keine Milch."]},
				"JP":{"D":["牛乳を持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough milk."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de lait."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe nicht genug Milch."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な牛乳がないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of milk."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de lait."]},
			   "DE":{"D":["Ich habe keine Milch mehr."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["牛乳が尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too much milk."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de lait."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe das Maximum an Milch."]},
				"JP":{"D":["牛乳はこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"coal":{
		"type":"ressource",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"no":23,
		"maxQuantity":{"mining":1},
		"value":3,
		"picture":{"file":"coal.png"},
		"name":{"EN":"coal",
				"FR":"charbon",
				"DE":"Kohle",
				"JP":"石炭"},
		"description":{"EN":"Use coal to manufacture steel.",
					   "FR":"Le charbon permet de fabriquer de l'acier.",
					   "DE":"Kohle wird verwendet, um Stahl zu machen.",
					   "JP":"鋼鉄の製造などに用いられます。"},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any coal."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas de charbon."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe keine Kohle."]},
				"JP":{"D":["石炭を持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough coal."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez de charbon."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe nicht genug Kohle."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な石炭がないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of coal."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus de charbon."]},
			   "DE":{"D":["Ich habe keine Kohle mehr."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["石炭が尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too much coal."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum de charbon."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe das Maximum an Kohle."]},
				"JP":{"D":["石炭はこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	},
	"steel":{
		"type":"ressource",
		"age":"steamAge",
		"no":24,
		"maxQuantity":{"metalSmelting":1},
		"value":7,
		"picture":{"file":"steel.png"},
		"name":{"EN":"steel",
				"FR":"acier",
				"DE":"Stahl",
				"JP":"鋼鉄"},
		"description":{"EN":"Use steel to manufacture advanced items.",
					   "FR":"L'acier permet de fabriquer des équipements évolués.",
					   "DE":"Stahl macht es möglich, fortschrittliche Ausrüstung herzustellen.",
					   "JP":"先進的な物品の製造に用いられます。鋳造所にて原鉄および石炭から加工できます。"},
		"zero":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have any steel."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas d'acier."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe keinen Stahl."]},
				"JP":{"D":["鋼鉄を持ってないな。"]}},
		"lack":{"EN":{"D":["I don't have enough steel."]},
				"FR":{"D":["Je n'ai pas assez d'acier."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe nicht genug Stahl."]},
				"JP":{"D":["十分な鋼鉄がないな。"]}},
		"out":{"EN":{"D":["I have run out of steel."]},
			   "FR":{"D":["Je n'ai plus d'acier."]},
			   "DE":{"D":["Ich habe keinen Stahl mehr."]},
			   "JP":{"D":["鋼鉄が尽きた。"]}},
		"full":{"EN":{"D":["I have too much steel."]},
				"FR":{"D":["J'ai le maximum d'acier."]},
				"DE":{"D":["Ich habe das Maximum an Stahl."]},
				"JP":{"D":["鋼鉄はこれ以上持てないな。"]}}
	}
}
</file>
